meanings.meaning_en: to buy and sell goods, services etc as your job or business
meanings.example: They had to travel into town to trade the produce from their farm.
meanings.example_cn: 他们不得不到镇上去出售他们农场的产品。

meanings.meaning_en: to buy and sell illegal drugs
meanings.example: Many users end up dealing to support their habit.
meanings.example_cn: 许多吸毒者最后都是靠做毒品买卖来供自己吸毒。

meanings.meaning_en: to take a long walk in the mountains or countryside
meanings.example: He wants to hike round the world.
meanings.example_cn: 他打算徒步旅行环游世界一周。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of doing something, especially in order to achieve a particular thing
meanings.example: The government must take action (=do something) now to stop the rise in violent crime.
meanings.example_cn: 政府现在必须采取行动遏止暴力犯罪的上升。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or existing because of something
meanings.example: She is still trying to get over the attack and the resultant injuries.
meanings.example_cn: 她仍在努力从袭击以及由此造成的伤害中恢复过来。

meanings.meaning_en: happening as a result of a particular event or situation
meanings.example: the rise in inflation and consequent fall in demand
meanings.example_cn: 通货膨胀的加剧和随之而来的需求下降

meanings.meaning_en: someone who writes music
meanings.example: ...music by Strauss, Mozart, Beethoven, and other great composers.
meanings.example_cn: …施特劳斯、莫扎特、贝多芬及其他伟大作曲家创作的音乐。

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that a person is slaving over something or is slaving for someone, you mean that they are working very hard
meanings.example: When you're busy all day the last thing you want to do is spend hours slaving over a hot stove.
meanings.example_cn: 当你忙碌了一整天后，你最不愿意做的事就是花好几个钟头在灼热的火炉边辛苦地劳作。

meanings.meaning_en: if a person or animal grunts, they make short low sounds in their throat
meanings.example: Grunting with effort, she lifted me up.
meanings.example_cn: 她哼哧着费力地把我抱起来。

meanings.meaning_en: bear, stand
meanings.example: I can't abide people with no sense of humour.
meanings.example_cn: 我讨厌和没有幽默感的人打交道。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that someone or something is important
meanings.example: Shelley valued her privacy.
meanings.example_cn: 谢利很重视自己的隐私。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to behave in a calm controlled way even in a difficult situation
meanings.example: We do this because we believe in the dignity and value of every person.
meanings.example_cn: 我们这样做是因为我们相信每个人的尊严和价值。

meanings.meaning_en: furthest from the middle
meanings.example: the outermost stars
meanings.example_cn: 最远的恒星

meanings.meaning_en: the best or most suitable for a particular purpose or in a particular situation
meanings.example: optimum conditions for growth
meanings.example_cn: 最适宜生长的条件

meanings.meaning_en: at the beginning
meanings.example: Stan initially wanted to go to medical school.
meanings.example_cn: 斯坦最初想进医学院。

meanings.meaning_en: Makeup consists of things such as lipstick, eye shadow, and powder which some women put on their faces to make themselves look more attractive or which actors use to change or improve their appearance
meanings.example: Normally she wore little makeup, but this evening was clearly an exception.
meanings.example_cn: 通常她很少化妆，可今晚显然是个例外。

meanings.meaning_cn: 作为组成部分的；内置的
meanings.meaning_en: provided as part of something, rather than being separate
meanings.example: a TV and integral video recorder
meanings.example_cn: 内置录像机的电视

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which something is made up of different parts, things, or members
meanings.example: Some minerals have complex chemical compositions.
meanings.example_cn: 有些矿物的化学构成很复杂。

meanings.meaning_en: something that prevents movement or progress
meanings.example: a major block to progress
meanings.example_cn: 进步的重大阻碍

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that a person or a news report damns something such as a policy or action, you mean that they are very critical of it
meanings.example: ...a sensational book in which she damns the ultraright party.
meanings.example_cn: …她谴责极右党派的一本耸人听闻的书。

meanings.meaning_en: more than enough
meanings.example: There'll be ample opportunity to relax, swim and soak up some sun.
meanings.example_cn: 将会有充足的机会来放松、游泳和接受一些阳光。

meanings.meaning_en: to be enough
meanings.example: A light lunch will suffice.
meanings.example_cn: 简单的午餐就够了。

meanings.meaning_en: a legal agreement which allows you to use a building, car etc for a period of time, in return for rent
meanings.example: The landlord refused to renew his lease.
meanings.example_cn: 房东拒绝和他续签租约。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay a company for the use of their aircraft, boat etc
meanings.example: We chartered a boat to take us to some of the smaller islands.
meanings.example_cn: 我们包了一条船带我们到一些较小的岛上去。

meanings.meaning_en: the main building or offices used by a large company or organization
meanings.example: the headquarters of the United Nations
meanings.example_cn: 联合国总部

meanings.meaning_en: a manager in an organization or company who helps make important decisions
meanings.example: a marketing executive
meanings.example_cn: 营销主管

meanings.meaning_en: a large pipe or wire carrying the public supply of water, electricity, or gas
meanings.example: The report found that many of Yorkshire’s water mains needed replacing.
meanings.example_cn: 报告中说约克郡的很多自来水总管道需要更换。

meanings.meaning_en: You use overall to indicate that you are talking about a situation in general or about the whole of something
meanings.example: ...the overall rise in unemployment.
meanings.example_cn: …失业人数的总体上升。

meanings.meaning_en: an attitude that shows you have too high an opinion of your own abilities or importance
meanings.example: The conceit of the woman!
meanings.example_cn: 这个自负的女人！

meanings.meaning_en: ultraviolet light cannot be seen by people, but is responsible for making your skin darker when you are in the sun
meanings.example: The sun's ultraviolet rays are responsible for both tanning and burning.
meanings.example_cn: 太阳的紫外线是皮肤晒黑和晒伤的原因。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is related to a person who lived a long time ago, or to a family, group of people etc that existed in the past
meanings.example: He was a direct descendant of Napoleon Bonaparte.
meanings.example_cn: 他是拿破仑·波拿巴的嫡系后裔。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a college, hospital etc a large sum of money that provides it with an income
meanings.example: The ambassador has endowed a $1 million public-service fellowships programme.
meanings.example_cn: 大使资助了一个100万美元的公共服务奖学金项目。

meanings.meaning_en: Datum is the singular form of data
if you have a qualification, you have passed an examination or course to show you have a particular level of skill or knowledge in a subject
meanings.example: He left school without any qualifications.
meanings.example_cn: 他离校时没有拿到任何文凭。

meanings.meaning_cn: 中产阶级的；庸俗的；资产阶级的
meanings.meaning_en: belonging to the  middle class
meanings.example: She came from a bourgeois family.
meanings.example_cn: 她来自一个中产阶级家庭。

meanings.meaning_en: a bird with a long beak that it uses to make holes in trees
meanings.example: A woodcutter and a woodpecker lived in the forest.
meanings.example_cn: 森林里居住着一个樵夫和一个啄木鸟。

meanings.meaning_en: If you bump into something or someone, you accidentally hit them while you are moving
meanings.example: They stopped walking and he almost bumped into them.
meanings.example_cn: 他们停下了脚步，这下他几乎撞到他们。

meanings.meaning_en: If something crashes somewhere, it moves and hits something else violently, making a loud noise
meanings.example: The door swung inwards to crash against a chest of drawers behind it.
meanings.example_cn: 门摆向里面，砰的一声猛力撞上了门后的五斗橱。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular state or condition
meanings.example: My family was in a bad way financially.
meanings.example_cn: 我家当时经济窘迫。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely good
meanings.example: The food was superb.
meanings.example_cn: 食物好吃极了。

meanings.meaning_en: a small object that you keep in your house because it is beautiful rather than useful
meanings.example: a shelf covered with books and ornaments
meanings.example_cn: 摆满书籍和装饰品的架子

meanings.meaning_en: pretty or attractive, but not always necessary or useful
meanings.example: a decorative panel above the door
meanings.example_cn: 门楣上的饰板

meanings.meaning_en: Something that is ornamental is attractive and decorative
meanings.example: ...an ornamental fountain.
meanings.example_cn: …一个装饰性喷泉。

meanings.meaning_en: If you mount an object on something, you fix it there firmly
meanings.example: Her husband mounts the work on velour paper and makes the frame.
meanings.example_cn: 她丈夫把作品装裱到丝绒纸上，又做了框架。

meanings.meaning_en: a load of goods sent by sea, road, or air, or the act of sending them
meanings.example: The goods are ready for shipment.
meanings.example_cn: 货物已经准备好装运。

meanings.meaning_en: When food or drink is canned, it is put into a metal container and sealed so that it will remain fresh.
meanings.example: ...fruits and vegetables that will be canned, skinned, diced, or otherwise processed.
meanings.example_cn: …将要经过装罐、去皮、切块或其他加工程序的水果和蔬菜。

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange something in an attractive way
meanings.example: make-up arrayed on the bathroom counter
meanings.example_cn: 盥洗台上摆放整齐的化妆品

meanings.meaning_en: An array of objects is a collection of them that is displayed or arranged in a particular way.
meanings.example: We visited the local markets and saw wonderful arrays of fruit and vegetables.
meanings.example_cn: 我们参观了当地的市场，看到了漂亮地摆放着的水果蔬菜。

meanings.meaning_en: a change in the direction or use of something, or the act of changing it
meanings.example: A slight diversion in the road is causing major headaches for businesses along El Camino Real.
meanings.example_cn: 马路上的一小段绕行道让国王大道沿街的商家十分头疼。

meanings.meaning_en: to change something into a different form, or to change something so that it can be used for a different purpose or in a different way
meanings.example: a 19th-century converted barn
meanings.example_cn: 由19世纪谷仓改建的房子

meanings.meaning_en: when something changes from one form or state to another
meanings.example: Making the transition from youth to adulthood can be very painful.
meanings.example_cn: 从青少年过渡到成年有时是一个非常痛苦的过程。

meanings.meaning_en: the force or power that makes something turn around a central point, especially in an engine
meanings.example: In rotation, force becomes torque, mass becomes moment of inertia, and acceleration becomes angular acceleration.
meanings.example_cn: 在旋转时，力变成力矩，质量变成转动惯量，加速度变成角加速度。

meanings.meaning_en: a small area of a theatre or court that is separate from where other people are sitting
meanings.example: the jury box
meanings.example_cn: 陪审团席

meanings.meaning_en: A workshop is a period of discussion or practical work on a particular subject in which a group of people share their knowledge or experience
meanings.example: Trumpeter Marcus Belgrave ran a jazz workshop for young artists.
meanings.example_cn: 鼓手马库斯马贝尔格瑞夫为年轻艺术家们举办了一场爵士乐研讨会。

meanings.meaning_en: protected by a patent
meanings.example: a patent lock
meanings.example_cn: 专利锁

meanings.meaning_en: A patent is an official right to be the only person or company allowed to make or sell a new product for a certain period of time.
meanings.example: He held a number of patents for his many innovations.
meanings.example_cn: 他为他的许多革新申请了几项专利。

meanings.meaning_en: to hold something tightly because you do not want to lose it
meanings.example: She was clutching a bottle of champagne.
meanings.example_cn: 她手里紧紧抓着一瓶香槟酒。

meanings.meaning_en: to build or use a nest
meanings.example: They say eagles used to nest in those rocks.
meanings.example_cn: 他们说以前常有老鹰在那些岩石中筑巢。

meanings.meaning_en: to make pieces of money from metal
well known or famous, especially because of some special quality or ability
meanings.example: a noted author
meanings.example_cn: 著名作家

meanings.meaning_en: very careful to notice what is happening, and to make sure that everything is all right
meanings.example: The entrances are guarded by watchful security staff.
meanings.example_cn: 入口处由警惕的保安人员把守。

meanings.meaning_en: to put liquid, especially a drug, into someone’s body by using a special needle
meanings.example: His son was injected with strong drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 他的儿子被注射了强效的药。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of keeping or putting something in a special place while it is not being used
meanings.example: the storage of highly radioactive material
meanings.example_cn: 高放射性材料的存放

meanings.meaning_en: the situation that someone is in, especially when this affects what they can and cannot do
meanings.example: I’m not sure what I would do if I were in your position .
meanings.example_cn: 我不知道如果我身在你的处境会怎么办。

meanings.meaning_en: relating or belonging to a very large city
meanings.example: a metropolitan area of South Australia
meanings.example_cn: 南澳大利亚的一个都市区

meanings.meaning_en: a metropolitan is an important priest in the Orthodox and Catholic Churches. He has authority over other priests and is in charge of a particular area.
meanings.example: ...the Ukrainian Catholic representatives, Metropolitan Volodymyr and Bishop Sofron.
meanings.example_cn: 乌克兰的天主教代表——弗拉基米尔大主教和索夫龙主教

meanings.meaning_en: mainly
meanings.example: The money is principally invested in stocks and shares.
meanings.example_cn: 这笔钱主要投资于股票。

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow part of a plant that supports leaves, fruits, or flowers
meanings.example: celery stalks
meanings.example_cn: 芹菜茎

meanings.meaning_en: to be in charge of a formal event, organization, ceremony etc
meanings.example: I shall be pleased to preside at your meetings.
meanings.example_cn: 我很高兴主持你们的会议。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone leave a place or building by using force
meanings.example: The demonstrators were ejected from the hall.
meanings.example_cn: 示威者被赶出大厅。

meanings.meaning_en: a tall tropical plant with hollow stems that is used for making furniture
meanings.example: ...huts with walls of bamboo.
meanings.example_cn: …竹墙小屋。

meanings.meaning_en: small things that you wear for decoration, such as rings or necklaces
meanings.example: She wears a lot of gold jewelry.
meanings.example_cn: 她戴了许多金首饰。

meanings.meaning_en: wrinkles are lines on your face and skin that you get when you are old
meanings.example: Her face was a mass of wrinkles.
meanings.example_cn: 她的脸上布满皱纹。

meanings.meaning_en: if you wrinkle a part of your face, or if it wrinkles, small lines appear on it
meanings.example: Alex wrinkled up her nose at the smell.
meanings.example_cn: 闻到那股味道，亚历克丝皱起了鼻子。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to, forming, or characteristic of an axis
meanings.example: Angular momentum is an axial vector quantity.
meanings.example_cn: 角动量是一种轴矢量。

meanings.meaning_en: the imaginary line around which a large round object, such as the Earth, turns
meanings.example: The Earth rotates on an axis between the north and south poles.
meanings.example_cn: 地球绕着南北两极之间的地轴自转。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the surrounding area; on all sides
meanings.example: ...ambient sounds of children in the background.
meanings.example_cn: ...背景处环绕着孩子们的声音。

meanings.meaning_en: happening a number of times, usually at regular times
meanings.example: periodic home visits by nurses
meanings.example_cn: 护士的定期上门探访

meanings.meaning_en: a date on which something special or important happened in a previous year
meanings.example: Jack and Kim celebrated their twentieth wedding anniversary in January.
meanings.example_cn: 1月，杰克和金庆祝了他们的结婚20周年纪念日。

meanings.meaning_en: in the outer area of something, or relating to this area
meanings.example: the city’s peripheral suburbs
meanings.example_cn: 这座城市的市郊

meanings.meaning_en: the border around an enclosed area such as a military camp
meanings.example: ...the perimeter of the airport.
meanings.example_cn: …机场周边。

meanings.example: She wasn't anybody before she got that job.
meanings.example_cn: 她在获得那个职位之前不过是个无名之辈。

meanings.meaning_en: (of people or their actions or behavior) that you can trust and rely on
meanings.example: You can leave the children with Billy – he’s very responsible.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以把孩子交给比利，他非常可靠。

meanings.meaning_en: importance
meanings.example: I don’t suppose it is of any consequence now.
meanings.example_cn: 现在我觉得这事一点都无所谓了。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people or things that are all of the same type
meanings.example: people in the over-45 age category
meanings.example_cn: 属45岁以上年龄组的人

meanings.meaning_en: a group of animals or plants whose members are similar and can breed together to produce young animals or plants
meanings.example: Seven species of birds of prey have been observed.
meanings.example_cn: 已有七种猛禽被观察到。

meanings.meaning_en: happy and friendly and usually loud
meanings.example: a hearty laugh
meanings.example_cn: 开怀大笑

meanings.meaning_en: a part of an atom that has no electrical charge
meanings.example: Each atomic cluster is made up of neutrons and protons.
meanings.example_cn: 每个原子团簇是由中子和质子组成的。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small piece of matter with a positive electrical  charge  that is in the central part of an atom
meanings.example: When a neutron inside an atom decays, it produces a proton, an electron, and a neutrino.
meanings.example_cn: 原子内的一个中子衰变后会产生一个质子、一个电子和一个中微子。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the quality or standard of something rather than the quantity
meanings.example: There are qualitative differences in the way children of different ages and adults think.
meanings.example_cn: 不同年龄的儿童和成人在思维方式上有着质的差异。

meanings.meaning_en: to invent a story, piece of information etc in order to deceive someone
meanings.example: The police were accused of fabricating evidence.
meanings.example_cn: 警方被控捏造证据。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of information or story that someone has invented in order to deceive people
meanings.example: Her story was a complete fabrication from start to finish.
meanings.example_cn: 她的叙述从头到尾都是编造出来的。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does a job willingly without being paid
meanings.example: Most of the relief work was done by volunteers.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分救援工作都由志愿人员完成。

meanings.meaning_en: to offer to do something without expecting any reward, often something that other people do not want to do
meanings.example: I volunteered my services as a driver.
meanings.example_cn: 我主动提出来当司机。

meanings.meaning_en: to speak to someone severely about something they have done wrong
meanings.example: The president rebuked the House and Senate for not passing those bills within 100 days.
meanings.example_cn: 总统谴责参众两院未在100天内通过那些法案。

meanings.meaning_en: showing or suggesting sth
meanings.example: This behaviour is indicative of her whole attitude, I’m afraid.
meanings.example_cn: 这一行为恐怕已表明了她的总体态度。

meanings.meaning_en: to mean something
meanings.example: What does the word ‘curriculum’ denote that ‘course’ does not?
meanings.example_cn: curriculum一词的哪些含义是course没有的？

meanings.meaning_en: someone who teaches a sport or practical skill
meanings.example: a driving instructor
meanings.example_cn: 驾驶教练

meanings.meaning_en: to say officially that sth has a particular character or name; to describe sth in a particular way
meanings.example: This floor has been designated a no-smoking area.
meanings.example_cn: 这楼层已定为无烟区。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a country that controls and rules other countries, usually ones that are far away
meanings.example: the struggle against colonial rule
meanings.example_cn: 反抗殖民统治的斗争

meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of work that you feel is right for you
meanings.example: At 17 she found her true vocation as a writer.
meanings.example_cn: 17岁时她找到了自己真正的使命——当一名作家。

meanings.meaning_en: important, interesting, excellent, or unusual enough to be noticed or mentioned
meanings.example: The town is notable for its busy open-air market.
meanings.example_cn: 该城镇因其热闹的露天市场而出名。

meanings.meaning_en: to do sth to deserve praise, attention,etc.
meanings.example: The results have been encouraging enough to merit further investigation.
meanings.example_cn: 结果令人振奋，值得进一步调查研究。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to weave cloth
meanings.example: basket weavers
meanings.example_cn: 编篮子的人

meanings.meaning_en: something that is used to strengthen or support something, or to make it stiff
meanings.example: She had to wear a brace after the accident.
meanings.example_cn: 出事以后她只得使用支架。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something stronger by supporting it
meanings.example: Wait until we’ve braced the ladder.
meanings.example_cn: 等我们把梯子支撑住再说。

meanings.meaning_en: the American spelling of  cheque
meanings.example: Can I pay by check?
meanings.example_cn: 我可以用支票付款吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to formally support a suggestion made by another person in a meeting
meanings.example: Any proposal must be seconded by two other members of the committee.
meanings.example_cn: 任何提案须有委员会其他两位委员附议。

meanings.meaning_cn: 方位；（机器的）承座；轴承；忍受
meanings.meaning_en: a direction or angle that is shown by a  compass
meanings.example: learning to take a compass bearing
meanings.example_cn: 学习用罗盘辨别方向

meanings.meaning_en: something wrong with your body or mind which shows that you have a particular illness
meanings.example: One of the most common symptoms of schizophrenia is hearing imaginary voices.
meanings.example_cn: 精神分裂症最常见的症状之一是幻听。

meanings.meaning_en: a government, especially one that was not elected fairly or that you disapprove of for some other reason
meanings.example: The regime got rid of most of its opponents.
meanings.example_cn: 该政权清除了大多数反对者。

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s political beliefs and opinions
meanings.example: I assume her politics must be fairly conservative.
meanings.example_cn: 我猜她的政治观点一定相当保守。

meanings.meaning_en: the main ideas and aims of a political party, especially the ones that they state just before an election
meanings.example: a strong women’s rights platform
meanings.example_cn: 强硬的妇女权利政纲

meanings.meaning_en: a statement, document etc that says that something is definitely true
meanings.example: There has still been no official confirmation of the report.
meanings.example_cn: 这则报道仍未得到官方证实。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a formal statement of what is true, especially in a court of law
meanings.example: Mr Molto has agreed to testify at the trial.
meanings.example_cn: 莫尔托先生已经同意出庭作证。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal meeting with a very important person
meanings.example: He was granted an audience with the Pope.
meanings.example_cn: 他获准觐见教皇。

meanings.meaning_en: having no mistakes
meanings.example: The writer expresses himself correctly in English.
meanings.example_cn: 作家用英语正确地表达自己的意思。

meanings.meaning_cn: 正的，阳性的；正的，正极的，阳性的；正的，正数的
meanings.meaning_en: showing signs of the medical condition or chemical that is being looked for
meanings.example: The test results came back positive.
meanings.example_cn: 化验结果呈阳性。

meanings.example: the normalization of relations
meanings.example_cn: 关系的正常化

meanings.meaning_en: an event, fact etc that shows that something is happening or that something is true or exists
meanings.example: A paw print in the dust was a sign that a tiger was close.
meanings.example_cn: 沙土里的一个爪印表明附近有老虎。

meanings.meaning_en: The conquerors of a country or group of people are the people who have taken complete control of that country or group's land
meanings.example: The people of an oppressed country obey their conquerors because they want to go on living.
meanings.example_cn: 一个被压迫国家的人民顺从他们的征服者，是因为他们想活下去。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious argument about something that involves many people and continues for a long time
meanings.example: a political controversy
meanings.example_cn: 政治争议

meanings.meaning_cn: 镇压；抑制；禁止发表；封锁；查禁
meanings.meaning_en: to stop people from opposing the government, especially by using force
meanings.example: The uprising was ruthlessly suppressed.
meanings.example_cn: 起义受到了残酷的镇压。

meanings.meaning_en: a short, strong, sudden rush of wind
meanings.example: A gust of wind drove down the valley.
meanings.example_cn: 一阵狂风掠过山谷。

meanings.meaning_cn: 诊所，医务室；会诊；会诊时间；门诊时间
meanings.meaning_en: a place, often in a hospital, where medical treatment is given to people who do not need to stay in the hospital
meanings.example: an appointment at an outpatient clinic
meanings.example_cn: 门诊预约

meanings.meaning_en: to find out what illness someone has, or what the cause of a fault is, after doing tests, examinations etc
meanings.example: The soldiers were diagnosed as having flu.
meanings.example_cn: 这些士兵被诊断为患了流感。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is sincere and really means what they are saying
meanings.example: I don’t doubt her sincerity, but I think she’s got her facts wrong.
meanings.example_cn: 我不怀疑她的诚意，但我认为她没弄清楚事实。

meanings.meaning_en: to love someone or something very much and take care of them well
meanings.example: In marriage, a man promises to cherish his wife.
meanings.example_cn: 在婚姻中，男人承诺要爱护妻子。

meanings.meaning_cn: 侦探，警探；私人侦探，私家侦探
meanings.meaning_en: a police officer whose job is to discover information about crimes and catch criminals
meanings.example: Now detectives are appealing for witnesses who may have seen anything suspicious last night.
meanings.example_cn: 现在侦探们正在呼吁昨晚可能看到任何可疑情况的人出来作证。

meanings.meaning_en: to show that something is important
meanings.example: This tragic incident underlines the need for immediate action.
meanings.example_cn: 这一悲剧事件突显了立即采取行动的必要性。

meanings.meaning_en: to break something such as corn or coffee beans into small pieces or powder, either in a machine or between two hard surfaces
meanings.example: Store the peppercorns in an airtight container and grind the pepper as you need it.
meanings.example_cn: 将胡椒子储藏在密封容器里，当你需要的时候把它磨成粉。

meanings.meaning_en: a reduction in the usual price of something
meanings.example: They are often available at a discount.
meanings.example_cn: 它们经常可以以折扣价买到。

meanings.meaning_en: to reduce the price of something
meanings.example: Games were discounted to as little as 5.
meanings.example_cn: 游戏减价到只要5美元。

meanings.meaning_en: according to the most basic or original meaning of a word or expression
meanings.example: The name of the cheese is Dolcelatte, literally meaning ‘sweet milk’.
meanings.example_cn: 这种奶酪名叫Dolcelatte，字面意思是 “甜牛奶” 。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a light shine on something, or to fill a place with light
meanings.example: A single candle illuminated his face.
meanings.example_cn: 一支蜡烛照亮了他的脸。

meanings.meaning_en: to order someone to come to a place
meanings.example: Robert summoned the waiter for the bill.
meanings.example_cn: 罗伯特召唤服务员结账。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of low flat ground that is always wet and soft
meanings.example: Cows were grazing on the marshes.
meanings.example_cn: 牛群在湿地上吃草。

meanings.meaning_en: when you entertain someone at home, or for business
meanings.example: the entertainment of friends
meanings.example_cn: 招待朋友

meanings.meaning_en: something or someone that makes it difficult for you to do something
meanings.example: A degree is more of a hindrance than a help in British industry.
meanings.example_cn: 在英国工业界，学位反倒是个累赘。

meanings.meaning_cn: 软管；袜类（包括连裤袜、长筒袜、短袜）
meanings.meaning_en: a long rubber or plastic tube that can be moved and bent to put water onto fires, gardens etc
meanings.example: You've left the garden hose on.
meanings.example_cn: 你没有关花园的水管。

meanings.meaning_en: a comfortable seat with raised arms and a back, that is wide enough for two or three people to sit on
able to be stretched without breaking
meanings.example: tensile rubber
meanings.example_cn: 有伸缩性的橡胶

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of fighting in a war – used especially when talking about particular methods of fighting
meanings.example: the realities of modern warfare
meanings.example_cn: 现代战争的真实面貌

meanings.meaning_en: to take part in a fight or war
meanings.example: ...the notorious Montonero guerrilla group who did battle with the army during the dirty war...
meanings.example_cn: 曾在那场肮脏的战争中与这支部队交战的臭名昭著的蒙特内罗游击队

meanings.meaning_en: more powerful, more common, or more easily noticed than others
meanings.example: the predominant group in society
meanings.example_cn: 社会中的主导群体

meanings.meaning_en: to spread open or flat sth that has previously been folded; to become open and flat
meanings.example: She unfolded her arms.
meanings.example_cn: 她张开双臂。

meanings.meaning_en: to stick to someone or something, or seem to surround them
meanings.example: His wet shirt clung to his body.
meanings.example_cn: 他的湿衬衫紧紧地贴在身上。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a liquid 液体) thick and sticky; not flowing freely
meanings.example: As the liquid cools, it becomes viscous.
meanings.example_cn: 这液体冷却后会变黏稠。

meanings.meaning_cn: （文章、观点等）连贯的，有条理的，一致的
meanings.meaning_en: (of writing, ideas, etc.) easy to understand because it is clear and reasonable
meanings.example: The three years of the course are planned as a coherent whole.
meanings.example_cn: 这三年的课程是作为连贯的整体来安排的。

meanings.meaning_cn: （收存照片或邮票的） 册子
meanings.meaning_en: a book that you put photographs, stamps etc in
meanings.example: a photograph album
meanings.example_cn: 相册

meanings.meaning_en: to join two things together using glue
meanings.example: Glue the fabric around the window.
meanings.example_cn: 用胶把这布粘在窗户四周。

meanings.meaning_en: to join two things together using cement , glue, etc.
meanings.example: Most artificial joints are cemented into place.
meanings.example_cn: 绝大部分人造关节是被黏结复位的。

meanings.meaning_en: to stick firmly to something
meanings.example: Small particles adhere to the seed.
meanings.example_cn: 微小的粒子紧贴着种子。

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow piece of paper, cloth etc
meanings.example: a strip of paper
meanings.example_cn: 一张纸条

meanings.meaning_en: an insect that has long back legs for jumping and that makes short loud noises
meanings.example: One day a grasshopper came upon an ant at work in a garden.
meanings.example_cn: 一天， 蚱蜢碰到了一只正在花园里干活的蚂蚁。

meanings.meaning_en: to close and open one eye quickly to communicate something or show that something is a secret or joke
meanings.example: He winked an eye at his companion.
meanings.example_cn: 他朝同伴眨眨眼。

meanings.meaning_en: to help something progress or be successful
meanings.example: Education needn't only be about furthering your career.
meanings.example_cn: 教育不必只是与推进你的事业有关。

meanings.meaning_en: a method of calculating in which you add a number to itself a particular number of times
meanings.example: There will be simple tests in addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.
meanings.example_cn: 将会有加减乘除的简单测试。

meanings.meaning_en: legal responsibility for something, especially for paying money that is owed, or for damage or injury
meanings.example: Tenants have legal liability for any damage they cause.
meanings.example_cn: 承租人造成任何损坏都要负法律责任。

meanings.meaning_en: the industry of making ships
meanings.example: a shipbuilding yard
meanings.example_cn: 造船厂

meanings.meaning_en: a place where coins are officially made
meanings.example: coins issued by the Royal Mint
meanings.example_cn: 皇家铸币局发行的硬币

meanings.meaning_en: to make a hole or empty space by removing the inside part of something
meanings.example: Hollow out the cake and fill it with cream.
meanings.example_cn: 在蛋糕上挖个洞，填入奶油。

meanings.meaning_en: a song of praise to God
meanings.example: He liked to sing hymns as he worked.
meanings.example_cn: 他工作时喜欢唱赞美诗。

meanings.meaning_en: to praise someone or something, especially God
meanings.example: This magazine in no way glorifies gangs.
meanings.example_cn: 本杂志决不美化各种犯罪团伙。

meanings.meaning_cn: 在（或向）船头；在（或向）飞行器头部
meanings.meaning_en: at or towards the front of a ship or an aircraft
meanings.example: Our yacht was well equipped with two double cabins fore and aft.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的游艇设施完备，首尾有两个双人舱。

meanings.meaning_en: in that place, or in that piece of writing
meanings.example: See Thompson, 1983, and the references cited therein.
meanings.example_cn: 见汤普森（1983）以及书中引用的参考资料。

meanings.meaning_en: to or in a foreign country that is across the sea
meanings.example: Chris is going to work overseas.
meanings.example_cn: 克里斯要去国外工作。

meanings.meaning_en: on or towards the shore of a lake, river, sea etc
meanings.example: Several dead birds had been washed ashore.
meanings.example_cn: 几只死鸟被冲上了岸。

meanings.meaning_en: on or to a place on the outside of sth
meanings.example: You can park your car outside our house.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以把汽车停在我们家屋外。

meanings.meaning_en: to burn a mark onto something, especially a farm animal, in order to show who it belongs to
meanings.example: The owner couldn't be bothered to brand the cattle.
meanings.example_cn: 主人懒得给这牛打上烙印。

meanings.meaning_en: next to the side of something
meanings.example: He crossed the street and walked alongside Central Park.
meanings.example_cn: 他过了马路，然后在中央公园旁边走着。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk or travel, usually for a long time, with no clear purpose or direction
meanings.example: Chickens and geese roam freely in the back yard.
meanings.example_cn: 鸡和鹅在后院随意溜达。

meanings.meaning_en: during
meanings.example: Will you be home over the summer vacation?
meanings.example_cn: 暑假期间你在家吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of producing babies, young animals, or plants
meanings.example: Scientists studied the reproduction, diet, and health of the dolphins.
meanings.example_cn: 科学家研究了海豚的繁殖情况、进食规律和健康状况。

meanings.meaning_en: a detailed instruction about how a car, building, piece of equipment etc should be made
meanings.example: The bolts met all the engineering specifications.
meanings.example_cn: 这些螺栓符合所有的工程设计规格。

meanings.meaning_en: very bad, or ending in failure
meanings.example: a disastrous first marriage
meanings.example_cn: 以失败告终的第一次婚姻

meanings.meaning_en: an action done by a computer
meanings.example: The whole operation is performed in less than three seconds.
meanings.example_cn: 全部运算在三秒内完成。

meanings.meaning_en: goods that are carried by ship, train, or aircraft, and the system of moving these goods
meanings.example: freight services
meanings.example_cn: 货运公司

meanings.meaning_en: relating to movement
meanings.example: an increase in locomotive power
meanings.example_cn: 运动力的增加

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the Moon or to travel to the Moon
meanings.example: studies of the lunar surface
meanings.example_cn: 对月球表面的研究

meanings.meaning_en: to accept that you are responsible for a piece of work, and start to do it
meanings.example: She undertook the task of monitoring the elections.
meanings.example_cn: 她承担了监督选举的任务。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to a simple way of life that existed in the past and does not have modern industries and machines
meanings.example: a primitive society
meanings.example_cn: 原始社会

meanings.meaning_en: a round roof on a building
meanings.example: ...the dome of the Capitol.
meanings.example_cn: …国会大厦的穹顶。

meanings.meaning_en: a shape, object, or container with circular ends and long straight sides
meanings.example: The gases are stored in cylinders.
meanings.example_cn: 气体储存在圆筒内。

meanings.meaning_en: good enough for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Her disappearance has never been satisfactorily explained.
meanings.example_cn: 她的失踪一直没有得到令人信服的解释。

meanings.meaning_en: The nucleus of an atom or cell is the central part of it.
meanings.example: Neutrons and protons are bound together in the nucleus of an atom.
meanings.example_cn: 在一个原子的核内，中子和质子聚合在一起。

meanings.meaning_en: the first form that a new design of a car, machine etc has, or a model of it used to test the design before it is produced
meanings.example: the prototype of the modern bicycle
meanings.example_cn: 现代自行车的雏形

meanings.meaning_en: one of the human speech sounds that you make by letting your breath flow out without closing any part of your mouth or throat
meanings.example: Each language has a different vowel system.
meanings.example_cn: 每种语言都有不同的元音系统。

meanings.meaning_en: an officer of the highest rank in the army or air force of some countries
meanings.example: Marshal Zhukov
meanings.example_cn: 朱可夫元帅

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money you pay, usually once a year, to receive copies of a newspaper or magazine, or receive a service, or the act of paying money for this
meanings.example: You may cancel your subscription at any time.
meanings.example_cn: 你随时可以取消订阅。

meanings.meaning_en: a man who people in the Christian, Jewish, or Muslim religion believe has been sent by God to lead them and teach them their religion
meanings.example: the prophet Elijah
meanings.example_cn: 先知以利亚

meanings.meaning_en: a statement that something will happen in the future, especially one made by someone with religious or magic powers
meanings.example: the prophecy of Isaiah
meanings.example_cn: 以赛亚的预言

meanings.meaning_en: a statement about what you think is going to happen, or the act of making this statement
meanings.example: The data can be used to make useful economic predictions .
meanings.example_cn: 这些数据可用于进行有用的经济预测。

meanings.meaning_en: to set the controls of a piece of electrical equipment so that it will start to work at a particular time
meanings.example: ...a computerized timer that can be preset.
meanings.example_cn: ...一个可以预调的电脑定时器。

meanings.meaning_en: before something else happens or is done
meanings.example: The police need to be briefed beforehand on how to deal with this sort of situation.
meanings.example_cn: 需要事先告诉警察这种情况怎样处理。

meanings.meaning_en: the money that is available to an organization or person, or a plan of how it will be spent
meanings.example: We had a really tight budget.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的预算很紧。

meanings.meaning_en: to think or know that something is going to happen in the future
meanings.example: I’ve put your name on the list and I don’t foresee any problems.
meanings.example_cn: 我把你的名字写在名单上了，估计不会有什么问题。

meanings.meaning_en: when something bad is stopped from happening
meanings.example: a fire prevention officer
meanings.example_cn: 消防官员

meanings.meaning_en: a brightly coloured flower that is shaped like a cup and grows from a  bulb  in spring
meanings.example: In a vase on the table stood a tulip.
meanings.example_cn: 桌上的花瓶里插着一束郁金香。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which the level of your voice changes in order to add meaning to what you are saying, for example by going up at the end of a question
meanings.example: intonation patterns
meanings.example_cn: 语调类型

meanings.meaning_cn: 宇宙的；广大无边的，极大的
meanings.meaning_en: relating to space or the universe
meanings.example: the cosmic laws governing our world
meanings.example_cn: 主宰我们世界的宇宙法则

meanings.meaning_en: the whole universe, especially when you think of it as a system
meanings.example: ...the natural laws of the cosmos.
meanings.example_cn: …宇宙的自然法则。

meanings.meaning_en: if two or more things overlap, part of one thing covers part of another thing
meanings.example: When the bag is folded, the bottom overlaps one side.
meanings.example_cn: 把包折叠起来时，其底部与一边就重合了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make your or sb else's behaviour seem less offensive by finding reasons for it
meanings.example: He excused himself by saying he was 'forced to rob to maintain my wife and cat.'
meanings.example_cn: 他辩解说自己是“为了供养妻子和猫儿被迫去抢劫的”。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or done for no good reason or with no purpose
meanings.example: Her death seemed such a senseless waste of life.
meanings.example_cn: 她的死真是无谓地浪费生命。

meanings.meaning_en: the feeling you have when you think something is funny
meanings.example: Steve couldn’t hide his amusement.
meanings.example_cn: 史蒂夫忍俊不禁。

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow weapon that is fired under the surface of the sea and explodes when it hits something
meanings.example: His ship was blown up by a torpedo.
meanings.example_cn: 他的船被一枚鱼雷炸毁了。

meanings.meaning_cn: 余地；（获胜者在时间或票数上领先的）幅度，差额；利润；赚头
meanings.meaning_en: an additional amount of something such as time, money, or space that you include in order to make sure that you are successful in achieving something
meanings.example: It’ll take about 30 minutes to dry but I’d allow a safety margin of, say, another 10 minutes.
meanings.example_cn: 要30分钟左右才能干，不过保险一点，再多10分钟吧。

meanings.meaning_en: not done or said using the shortest, simplest or most direct way possible
meanings.example: He told us, in a very roundabout way, that he was thinking of leaving.
meanings.example_cn: 他拐弯抹角地对我们说他想走了。

meanings.meaning_en: to take someone somewhere illegally by force, often in order to get money for returning them
meanings.example: Police appealed for witnesses after a woman was kidnapped at gunpoint.
meanings.example_cn: 一名妇女遭到持枪绑架，警方呼吁目击者挺身而出。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of shame and sadness because you know that you have done something wrong
meanings.example: He used to buy them expensive presents, out of guilt.
meanings.example_cn: 出于内疚，他以前总是给他们买昂贵的礼物。

meanings.meaning_en: full of shadows, or difficult to see because of shadows
meanings.example: a shadowy room
meanings.example_cn: 幽暗的房间

meanings.meaning_en: to be helpful or useful to sb
meanings.example: Guests should feel at liberty to avail themselves of your facilities.
meanings.example_cn: 客人们应可以随意使用你们的设施。

meanings.example: His efforts were to no avail.
meanings.example_cn: 他的努力是徒劳的。

meanings.meaning_en: determined to be successful, rich, powerful etc
meanings.example: Alfred was intensely ambitious, obsessed with the idea of becoming rich.
meanings.example_cn: 艾尔弗雷德雄心勃勃，一心想着发财。

meanings.meaning_cn: 重要的，重大的，影响深远的
meanings.meaning_en: having an important effect or influence, especially on what will happen in the future
meanings.example: His most significant political achievement was the abolition of the death penalty.
meanings.example_cn: 他政治上最重大的成就是废除了死刑。

meanings.meaning_cn: （法律上的）有效；符合逻辑，正确
meanings.meaning_en: the state of being legally
meanings.example: The period of validity of the agreement has expired.
meanings.example_cn: 本协议的有效期已过。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being at hand when needed
meanings.example: the availability of cheap flights
meanings.example_cn: 有廉价机票出售

meanings.meaning_en: having an end or a limit
meanings.example: the earth’s finite resources
meanings.example_cn: 地球有限的资源

meanings.meaning_en: something or someone that attracts many people or things
meanings.example: Prospect Park, with its vast lake, is a magnet for all health freaks.
meanings.example_cn: 拥有大片湖区的展望公园是所有健身迷的向往之地。

meanings.meaning_en: producing a profit or a useful result
meanings.example: The advertising campaign proved very profitable.
meanings.example_cn: 事实证明，这次广告宣传活动卓有成效。

meanings.meaning_en: helpful and likely to make you successful
meanings.example: He was now in a more advantageous position.
meanings.example_cn: 他现在的位置更有利。

meanings.meaning_en: polite and showing respect for other people
meanings.example: The staff are always courteous and helpful.
meanings.example_cn: 员工们总是彬彬有礼、乐于帮助。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of glass, wood, etc. with a hole through it, that can be put on a string with others of the same type and worn as jewellery, etc.
meanings.example: She wore a string of green glass beads around her neck.
meanings.example_cn: 她脖子上戴着一串绿色的玻璃珠子。

meanings.example: The judge's ruling was based on the simple commonsense tenet that no man is above the law.
meanings.example_cn: 法官的判决基于一个常识性原则，即谁也不能凌驾于法律之上。

meanings.meaning_en: not liking changes or new ideas
meanings.example: a very conservative attitude to education
meanings.example_cn: 对待教育非常守旧的态度

meanings.meaning_en: legally responsible for something
meanings.example: The airline's insurer is liable for damages to the victims' families.
meanings.example_cn: 航空公司投保的保险公司为遇难者家庭的损失负法律责任。

meanings.meaning_en: a large boat with a sail, used for pleasure or sport, especially one that has a place where you can sleep
meanings.example: His 36 ft yacht sank suddenly last summer.
meanings.example_cn: 他的36英尺游艇去年夏天突然沉没了。

meanings.meaning_en: a heavy white metal that is radioactive and is used to produce nuclear power and nuclear weapons. It is a chemical element: symbol U
meanings.example: The fuel was enriched with uranium 235 for the nuclear reactor.
meanings.example_cn: 核反应堆的燃料被铀235浓缩。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle or ship specially built to carry large quantities of gas or liquid, especially oil
meanings.example: A Greek oil tanker has run aground.
meanings.example_cn: 一艘希腊油轮已经搁浅了。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the official system which takes letters from one place to another
meanings.example: the U.S. postal service
meanings.example_cn: 美国邮政

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being better, more skilful, more powerful etc than other people or things
meanings.example: the intellectual superiority of humans over other animals
meanings.example_cn: 人类相比其他动物所具有的智力优势

meanings.meaning_en: to push someone with your elbows, especially in order to move past them
meanings.example: She pushed through the crowd, elbowing people out of the way.
meanings.example_cn: 她用手肘把人们推开，从人群中挤了出来。

meanings.meaning_en: to decorate the walls of a room by covering them with special paper
meanings.example: The previous owners had obviously papered over any damp patches.
meanings.example_cn: 原先的房主显然是用壁纸把潮斑都盖起来了。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool that is used for cutting something
meanings.example: wire cutters
meanings.example_cn: 钢丝钳，铁丝剪

meanings.meaning_en: to catch sth, especially fish, in a net
meanings.example: We netted three fish in under an hour.
meanings.example_cn: 不到一小时我们就网住了三条鱼。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit the ball with your head, especially in football
meanings.example: He headed the ball across the face of the goal.
meanings.example_cn: 他一个头球，球从球门前横飞而过。

meanings.meaning_en: to pull with one or more short, quick pulls
meanings.example: The woman gently tugged his arm.
meanings.example_cn: 那女人轻轻拽了拽他的胳膊。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong pull
meanings.example: She removed the bandage with a sharp tug.
meanings.example_cn: 她猛地一拉，扯下绷带。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten or hang sth on sth else using a hook; to be fastened or hanging in this way
meanings.example: We hooked the trailer to the back of the car.
meanings.example_cn: 我们把拖车挂在汽车尾部。

meanings.meaning_en: to develop something such as a plan or a set of rules, and decide all the details of how it will be done
meanings.example: He formulated Labour Party education policy in 1922.
meanings.example_cn: 1922年，他制定了工党教育政策。

meanings.meaning_en: to breathe air in through your nose in order to smell something
meanings.example: He opened the milk and sniffed it.
meanings.example_cn: 他打开牛奶闻了闻。

meanings.meaning_en: brave
meanings.example: He was wrong, and courageous enough to admit it.
meanings.example_cn: 他是错了，而且有勇气承认自己错了。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave your own country to go and live permanently in another country
meanings.example: He emigrated to Belgium.
meanings.example_cn: 他移民去了比利时。

meanings.meaning_en: permanent
meanings.example: the perpetual snows of the mountaintops
meanings.example_cn: 山顶的终年积雪

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for ever, even after someone has died
meanings.example: everlasting fame
meanings.example_cn: 永久的名声

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for ever and having no end
meanings.example: the Christian promise of eternal life
meanings.example_cn: 基督教承诺的永生

meanings.example: If you eat soon after your workout, you can minimize muscle stiffness and soreness.
meanings.example_cn: 如果在训练不久之后进食，就可以减缓肌肉僵硬和疼痛。

meanings.meaning_en: to do what you have to do or are asked to do
meanings.example: The commander said that the army would comply with the ceasefire.
meanings.example_cn: 指挥官说过部队会遵从停火协议。

meanings.meaning_en: to be very likely to do or feel a particular thing
meanings.example: Don’t lie to her. She’s bound to find out.
meanings.example_cn: 别骗她，她肯定会发现的。

meanings.meaning_en: to move your right hand to your head, especially in order to show respect to an officer in the army, navy etc
meanings.example: The two soldiers saluted Lieutenant Cecil.
meanings.example_cn: 那两名士兵向塞西尔中尉行了礼。

meanings.meaning_en: to provide a particular group of people with the things they need or want
meanings.example: We cater to an exclusive clientele.
meanings.example_cn: 我们满足一个特殊客户群的需求。

meanings.meaning_en: a business that prints and publishes books
meanings.example: Oxford University Press
meanings.example_cn: 牛津大学出版社

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is employed in the trade of printing

meanings.meaning_cn: 怀着（不好的想法、恐惧或希望）；包含，藏有；窝藏
meanings.meaning_en: to keep bad thoughts, fears, or hopes in your mind for a long time
meanings.example: I think he’s harbouring some sort of grudge against me.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得他对我有点怀恨在心。

meanings.meaning_en: the kind of food that a person or animal eats each day
meanings.example: She doesn’t eat a very healthy diet.
meanings.example_cn: 她的饮食不是很健康。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone want to have or do something, even though they know they really should not
meanings.example: If you leave valuables in your car it will tempt thieves.
meanings.example_cn: 如果把贵重物品留在车上，会招来小偷的。

meanings.meaning_cn: 引证；引用；〔法院〕传召，传讯
meanings.meaning_en: to mention something as an example, especially one that supports, proves, or explains an idea or situation
meanings.example: The judge cited a 1956 Supreme Court ruling in her decision.
meanings.example_cn: 法官在她的判决中引用了1956年最高法院的一项裁决。

meanings.meaning_en: to start burning, or to make something start burning
meanings.example: The bombs ignited a fire which destroyed some 60 houses.
meanings.example_cn: 炸弹引起了一场火灾，烧毁了大约六十间房屋。

meanings.meaning_en: the origin of something, especially a word
meanings.example: The derivation of its name is obscure.
meanings.example_cn: 它名字的根源起源鲜为人知。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who works in a bank in an important position
meanings.example: ...an investment banker.
meanings.example_cn: …一位投资银行家。

meanings.meaning_en: not well known and usually not very important
meanings.example: an obscure poet
meanings.example_cn: 名不见经传的诗人

meanings.example: Forgive them inasmuch as they are young.
meanings.example_cn: 原谅他们吧，因为他们还年轻。

meanings.meaning_en: because of something
meanings.example: How many working days were lost through sickness last year?
meanings.example_cn: 去年因为员工生病损失了多少个工作日？

meanings.meaning_en: your mind and your thoughts
meanings.example: The painful memories eventually faded from her consciousness.
meanings.example_cn: 那些痛苦的回忆最终从她的意识中淡去了。

meanings.meaning_en: a spoken or written remark about something you have noticed
meanings.example: Darwin’s observations on the habits of certain birds
meanings.example_cn: 达尔文对某些鸟类习性的论述

meanings.meaning_en: angry or annoyed
meanings.example: She gets cross when he goes out drinking.
meanings.example_cn: 他出去喝酒她就不高兴。

meanings.meaning_en: to not do something that you want to do
meanings.example: Mrs. Hardie refrained from making any comment.
meanings.example_cn: 哈迪太太忍住了没做任何评论。

meanings.meaning_en: to stop someone from doing something, often by using physical force
meanings.example: I had to restrain her from running out into the street.
meanings.example_cn: 我只得阻止她跑到街上去。

meanings.meaning_en: very unusual or strange
meanings.example: I wondered why she was behaving in so singular a fashion.
meanings.example_cn: 我真奇怪她为什么会有如此异常的行为。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people who make the laws of a country
meanings.example: The president will address both houses of Congress.
meanings.example_cn: 总统将向参众两院发表讲话。

meanings.meaning_en: a moral or legal duty to do something
meanings.example: Employers have an obligation to treat all employees equally.
meanings.example_cn: 雇主有责任对所有员工一视同仁。

meanings.meaning_en: in earlier times
meanings.example: Kiribati, formerly known as the Gilbert Islands
meanings.example_cn: 基里巴斯，旧称吉尔伯特群岛

meanings.meaning_en: to cover something with a veil
meanings.example: A black kerchief modestly veiled her hair.
meanings.example_cn: 一条黑色头巾端庄地裹着她的头发。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone or something and no longer help or support them
meanings.example: Helen was deserted by her husband.
meanings.example_cn: 海伦被丈夫遗弃了。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave someone, especially when you should stay because they need you
meanings.example: children forsaken by their parents
meanings.example_cn: 被父母遗弃的孩子

meanings.meaning_en: the process of sending or passing something from one person, place, or thing to another
meanings.example: the transmission of disease
meanings.example_cn: 疾病的传播

meanings.meaning_en: to take the place or position of something or someone
meanings.example: Coal has been displaced by natural gas as a major source of energy.
meanings.example_cn: 作为一种主要能源，煤的地位已为天然气所取代。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of displacing sb/sth; the process of being displaced
meanings.example: the displacement of traditional agriculture by industrial crops
meanings.example_cn: 经济作物对传统农业的替代

meanings.meaning_en: someone who settles in a new colony
meanings.example: The colonists struggled through their first winter.
meanings.example_cn: 这些殖民地居民艰难地度过了第一个冬天。

meanings.meaning_en: made by or for musical instruments
meanings.example: ...a CD of vocal and instrumental music.
meanings.example_cn: …一张声乐和器乐光盘。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture like a large cupboard that you hang clothes in
meanings.example: Can you hang these in the wardrobe, please?
meanings.example_cn: 请你把这些衣服挂到衣橱里去好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing
meanings.example: She pulled the garment on and zipped it up.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿上衣服并拉好拉链。

meanings.meaning_en: the Muslim religion, which was started by Muhammad and whose holy book is the Quran (Koran)
meanings.example: He converted to Islam at the age of 16.
meanings.example_cn: 他在16岁时皈依了伊斯兰教。

meanings.meaning_en: divided in an equal way
meanings.example: The profits will be split evenly between the three of us.
meanings.example_cn: 利润将由我们三人平分。

meanings.meaning_en: if two pieces of computer equipment are compatible, they can be used together, especially when they are made by different companies
meanings.example: The new software is IBM compatible (= can be used with IBM computers ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这个新软件与IBM的计算机兼容。

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of thread that has been sewn into a piece of cloth, or the action of the thread going into and out of the cloth
meanings.example: Her mother counted the stitches on her knitting needles.
meanings.example_cn: 她的母亲数了数编织针上的针数。

meanings.meaning_en: to sew two pieces of cloth together, or to sew a decoration onto a piece of cloth
meanings.example: Mary is stitching a bedspread.
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽在缝床罩。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people or animals that do something together
meanings.example: a troop of monkeys
meanings.example_cn: 一群猴子

meanings.meaning_en: people who do something in concert do it together after having agreed on it
meanings.example: Britain has to pursue policies in concert with other EU members.
meanings.example_cn: 英国必须和其他欧盟成员国一起贯彻各项政策。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of meat on a bone, usually cut from a sheep or pig
meanings.example: a grilled pork/lamb chop
meanings.example_cn: 烤猪排/羊排

meanings.meaning_en: a younger child in a family, often the youngest
meanings.example: Clare is the baby of the family.
meanings.example_cn: 克莱尔是家里最小的孩子。

meanings.meaning_cn: （人生的）一段经历；（小说的）片段，插曲
meanings.meaning_en: an event, a situation, or a period of time in sb's life, a novel, etc. that is important or interesting in some way
meanings.example: I'd like to try and forget the whole episode.
meanings.example_cn: 我倒想尽量把那段经历全部忘掉。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of things of the same kind that are very close together
meanings.example: a diamond cluster ring
meanings.example_cn: 群镶钻戒

meanings.meaning_en: to come together in a small group or groups
meanings.example: The children clustered together in the corner of the room.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们聚集在房间的角落里。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement about all the members of a group that may be true in some or many situations but is not true in every case
meanings.example: You can’t make generalizations about what men and women are like.
meanings.example_cn: 男人什么样，女人什么样，不能一概而论。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who goes into houses, shops etc to steal things
meanings.example: Burglars broke into their home.
meanings.example_cn: 窃贼闯进了他们家。

meanings.meaning_en: done for enjoyment, not as a job
meanings.example: ...professional athletes and amateur runners.
meanings.example_cn: …专业运动员和业余赛跑运动员。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who does an activity just for pleasure, not as their job
meanings.example: a gifted amateur
meanings.example_cn: 有天赋的业余爱好者

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of metals and their uses
meanings.example: He studied metallurgy as a mature student, having spent ten years working in a foundry.
meanings.example_cn: 在一家铸造厂工作了10年以后,他成为成人学生学习冶金专业。

meanings.meaning_en: the man who Christians believe was the son of God, and on whose life and ideas Christianity is based
meanings.example: As a scientist,he disbelieves in Jesus.
meanings.example_cn: 作为一名科学家，他不信耶稣。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong building or group of buildings used by soldiers or an army for defending an important place
meanings.example: The men in the fort capitulated.
meanings.example_cn: 堡垒中的守军投降了。

meanings.meaning_en: to suggest that something might have happened or be true
meanings.example: He dismissed arguments postulating differing standards for human rights in different cultures and regions.
meanings.example_cn: 他无法接受的是假定人权标准在不同文化和地区有所不同。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of paper on which a doctor writes what medicine a sick person should have, so that they can get it from a pharmacist
meanings.example: The new drug will not require a physician's prescription.
meanings.example_cn: 这种新药不需要医生的处方。

meanings.meaning_en: a small bed for a baby, especially one that moves gently from side to side
meanings.example: She rocked the cradle to quieten the child.
meanings.example_cn: 她摇动摇篮，让宝宝安静下来。

meanings.meaning_en: to not make a decision because you have doubts
meanings.example: Shareholders who were wavering met the directors.
meanings.example_cn: 举棋不定的股东们会见了董事。

meanings.meaning_en: if a dog wags its tail, or if its tail wags, the dog moves its tail many times from one side to the other
meanings.example: The dog was biting, growling and wagging its tail.
meanings.example_cn: 那条狗咬着叫着，还摇着尾巴。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance which is produced when a substance is combined with oxygen
meanings.example: iron oxide
meanings.example_cn: 氧化铁

meanings.meaning_en: to combine with oxygen, or make something combine with oxygen, especially in a way that causes rust
meanings.example: If the organic material decays or is oxidized, it will not form petroleum.
meanings.example_cn: 如果有机物腐烂或氧化，它不会形成石油。

meanings.meaning_en: a domestic animal lives on a farm or in someone’s home
meanings.example: a domestic cat
meanings.example_cn: 一只家猫

meanings.meaning_en: to help a skill, feeling, idea etc develop over a period of time
meanings.example: The bishop helped foster the sense of a community embracing all classes.
meanings.example_cn: 主教鼓励一种包容各个阶层的社区精神。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure that you can stand on, that is attached to the outside wall of a building, above ground level
meanings.example: Has your flat got a balcony?
meanings.example_cn: 你的公寓有阳台吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a  battery  that collects  electrons  , often a wire or piece of metal with the sign (+)
meanings.example: A red wire is often attached to the anode.
meanings.example_cn: 红色电线通常与阳极相联。

meanings.meaning_en: a short well-known statement that gives advice or expresses something that is generally true. ‘A penny saved is a penny earned’ is an example of a proverb.
meanings.example: An old Arab proverb says, "The enemy of my enemy is my friend."
meanings.example_cn: 有一句古老的阿拉伯谚语说：“我敌人的敌人是我的朋友。”

meanings.meaning_en: a formal dinner for many people on an important occasion
meanings.example: a state banquet (=  one attended by heads of government and other important people  )
meanings.example_cn: 国宴

meanings.meaning_cn: （学科、活动、书籍等的）范围；（发挥能力的）机会，施展余地；眼界
meanings.meaning_en: the range of things that a subject, activity, book etc deals with
meanings.example: measures to limit the scope of criminals’ activities
meanings.example_cn: 限制罪犯活动范围的措施

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately hide facts, feelings etc so that people do not see or understand them – used especially in news reports
meanings.example: The talks have been cloaked in secrecy.
meanings.example_cn: 会谈是秘密进行的。

meanings.meaning_en: in a critical, rough or severe way
meanings.example: The report was sharply critical of the police.
meanings.example_cn: 报道猛烈地抨击了警方。

meanings.meaning_en: to deliberately make something such as a feeling or an activity last longer
meanings.example: I was trying to think of some way to prolong the conversation.
meanings.example_cn: 我在想方设法拖长这次谈话。

meanings.meaning_en: to delay the development of something, or to make something happen more slowly than expected
meanings.example: Cold weather retards the growth of many plants.
meanings.example_cn: 寒冷的天气使许多植物生长滞缓。

meanings.meaning_en: a thick cold sauce that is made from pieces of vegetables preserved in vinegar. It is usually eaten with cold meat or cheese
meanings.example: cheese and pickle sandwiches
meanings.example_cn: 干酪腌菜三明治

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to treat people’s teeth
meanings.example: Visit your dentist twice a year for a checkup.
meanings.example_cn: 每年看两次牙医做检查。

meanings.meaning_en: a powerful illegal drug made from poppy seeds. Drugs made from opium are used to reduce severe pain.
meanings.example: an opium addict
meanings.example_cn: 吸鸦片成瘾者

meanings.meaning_en: money that you pay when you rent something such as an apartment or car, which will be given back if you do not damage it
meanings.example: We ask for one month’s rent in advance, plus a deposit of 500.
meanings.example_cn: 我们要求预付一个月的租金，再加500美元的押金。

meanings.meaning_en: to get liquid from something by pressing it
meanings.example: Squeeze the oranges.
meanings.example_cn: 把橙子榨一榨。

meanings.example: the compression of air
meanings.example_cn: 空气的压缩

meanings.meaning_en: to press something into a flatter shape, often breaking or damaging it
meanings.example: The cake got a bit squashed on the way here.
meanings.example_cn: 蛋糕在送来这里的路上有点压坏了。

meanings.meaning_en: a drink made from fruit juice, sugar, and water
meanings.example: a glass of orange squash
meanings.example_cn: 一杯橙汁

meanings.meaning_en: very great or very strong; so powerful that you cannot resist it or decide how to react
meanings.example: You may find it somewhat overwhelming at first.
meanings.example_cn: 起初你可能觉得它有些无法抗拒。

meanings.meaning_cn: 使（某人）感到不能自持，使不知所措；压倒，击败
meanings.meaning_en: to have such a strong emotional effect on sb that it is difficult for them to resist or know how to react
meanings.example: Grief overwhelmed me.
meanings.example_cn: 我悲痛不已。

meanings.meaning_en: a high speed
meanings.example: Martinez had good velocity on his fastball.
meanings.example_cn: 马丁内斯的快球速度极快。

meanings.meaning_cn: 血液循环；（资料、货币等）流通
meanings.meaning_en: the movement of blood around your body
meanings.example: Exercise improves the circulation.
meanings.example_cn: 运动能促进血液循环。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone goes around different parts of an area at regular times to check that there is no trouble or danger
meanings.example: The security forces increased their patrols in the area.
meanings.example_cn: 安全部队加强了对该地区的巡逻。

meanings.meaning_en: If you cruise an ocean, river, or canal, you travel around it or along it on a cruise
meanings.example: She wants to cruise the canals of France in a barge.
meanings.example_cn: 她想坐驳船游览法国的运河。

meanings.meaning_en: to search for sth that is difficult to find
meanings.example: He had been questing for religious belief from an early age.
meanings.example_cn: 他从早年开始就一直在寻求宗教信仰。

meanings.meaning_en: a thick tube-shaped thing that people smoke, and which is made from tobacco leaves that have been rolled up
meanings.example: He was smoking a big cigar.
meanings.example_cn: 他在抽一只大雪茄。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that is given to someone by an educational organization to help pay for their education
meanings.example: She won a scholarship to Iowa State University.
meanings.example_cn: 她获得了艾奥瓦州立大学的奖学金。

meanings.meaning_en: full of happiness and love, in a way that shows in your face and makes you look attractive
meanings.example: She looked radiant in a white silk dress.
meanings.example_cn: 她身穿白色真丝礼服，看上去光彩照人。

meanings.meaning_cn: 极其漂亮的，极其吸引人的；绚丽的，华丽的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely beautiful or attractive
meanings.example: ‘What do you think of my new flatmate?’ ‘He’s absolutely gorgeous !’
meanings.example_cn: “你觉得我的新室友怎么样？”“他帅极了！”

meanings.meaning_en: a choice you can make in a particular situation
meanings.example: There are a number of options available.
meanings.example_cn: 有多种选择。

meanings.meaning_en: an adult male chicken
meanings.example: A cock crowed in the distance.
meanings.example_cn: 远处有只公鸡在打鸣。

meanings.meaning_en: a song or tune
meanings.example: They played some lovely melodies.
meanings.example_cn: 他们演奏了一些动听的曲子。

meanings.meaning_en: to hang over something or stick out above it
meanings.example: Part of the rock wall overhung the path at one point.
meanings.example_cn: 部分岩壁悬在了小径一处的上方。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat board that contains the controls for a machine, piece of electrical equipment, computer etc
meanings.example: Several nurses sat before a console of flickering lights and bleeping monitors.
meanings.example_cn: 几名护士坐在灯光闪烁、监听器嘟嘟作响的控制台前。

meanings.meaning_en: information which is false or which emphasizes just one part of a situation, used by a government or political group to make people agree with them
meanings.example: the spreading of political propaganda
meanings.example_cn: 政治宣传的开展

meanings.meaning_en: an official or formal statement, especially about the plans of a government or an organization; the act of making such a statement
meanings.example: to issue/sign a declaration
meanings.example_cn: 发布 / 签署公告

meanings.meaning_en: the act of telling a story
the order that something happens or exists in, or the order it is supposed to happen or exist in
meanings.example: Be careful to perform the actions in the correct sequence.
meanings.example_cn: 注意要按正确的顺序来完成动作。

meanings.meaning_cn: （法院授权警方采取行动的）令状；许可证
meanings.meaning_en: a legal document that is signed by a judge, allowing the police to take a particular action
meanings.example: The magistrate issued a warrant for his arrest.
meanings.example_cn: 地方法官发出了对他的逮捕令。

meanings.meaning_en: needed for a particular purpose
meanings.example: He lacks the requisite qualifications.
meanings.example_cn: 他缺少必要的资历。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you need for a particular purpose
meanings.example: A university degree has become a requisite for entry into most professions.
meanings.example_cn: 大学学位已经成为在大多数行业谋职的必要条件。

meanings.meaning_en: a pattern sewn onto cloth, or cloth with patterns sewn onto it
meanings.example: The shorts had blue embroidery over the pockets.
meanings.example_cn: 这条短裤口袋上有蓝色的刺绣。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is a member of a group of religious women that live together in a convent
meanings.example: Mr. Thomas was taught by the Catholic nuns whose school he attended to work and study hard.
meanings.example_cn: 托马斯先生受教于天主教修女。在修女开办的学校里他专心工作，刻苦学习。

meanings.example: a speech of passionate eloquence
meanings.example_cn: 激情洋溢的演讲

meanings.meaning_en: moving air, especially when it moves strongly or quickly in a current
meanings.example: The wind blew from the northeast.
meanings.example_cn: 风从东北方向吹来。

meanings.meaning_en: a book or list of names, facts etc, usually arranged in alphabetical order
meanings.example: I couldn’t find your number in the telephone directory.
meanings.example_cn: 我在电话簿上找不到你的电话号码。

meanings.meaning_en: peaceful and loving or wanting peace
meanings.example: Gorbachev was less pacific than people thought.
meanings.example_cn: 戈尔巴乔夫不像人们想得那样温和。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of continuing to live or exist
meanings.example: The doctors gave him a one in ten chance of survival .
meanings.example_cn: 医生说他有十分之一的生存希望。

meanings.meaning_cn: 脸红；一阵强烈情感；（流露出的）一阵激情
meanings.meaning_en: a red colour that appears on your face when you are angry or embarrassed
meanings.example: His words brought a warm flush to her face.
meanings.example_cn: 他那番话讲得她脸红发烫。

meanings.meaning_en: very correct and suitable for official or important occasions
meanings.example: He kept the tone of the letter formal and businesslike.
meanings.example_cn: 他使这封信保持正式公文的语气。

meanings.meaning_en: being one of the parts of something
meanings.example: the EU and its constituent members
meanings.example_cn: 欧盟及其成员国

meanings.meaning_en: someone who votes in a particular area
meanings.example: He told his constituents that he would continue to represent them to the best of his ability.
meanings.example_cn: 他告诉他的选民们他会继续竭尽所能代表他们。

meanings.meaning_en: bright red
meanings.example: scarlet berries
meanings.example_cn: 鲜红的浆果

meanings.meaning_en: bright red in colour
a particular system of this belief and all the ceremonies and duties that are related to it
meanings.example: people of different religions
meanings.example_cn: 宗教信仰不同的人

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being new, unusual, and interesting
meanings.example: Many toys have no attraction beyond their novelty value.
meanings.example_cn: 许多玩具除了有些新奇感之外，别无吸引力。

meanings.meaning_en: Regenerative powers or processes cause something to heal or become active again after it has been damaged or inactive
meanings.example: ...the regenerative power of nature.
meanings.example_cn: ...大自然的再生力。

meanings.meaning_en: a man at the time he gets married, or just after he is married
meanings.example: The bridegroom asked the guests to stand and then toasted the bridesmaids.
meanings.example_cn: 新郎请客人起立为女傧相干杯.

meanings.meaning_en: not like anything known before, and unusual or interesting
meanings.example: What a novel idea!
meanings.example_cn: 多么新奇的想法呀！

meanings.meaning_en: a blue-white metal that is used to make brass and to cover and protect objects made of iron. It is a chemical element: symbol Zn
meanings.example: Brass is an alloy of copper and zinc.
meanings.example_cn: 黄铜是铜锌合金。

meanings.meaning_en: pleasure you feel when you realize something is good, useful, or well done
meanings.example: It helps children to develop an appreciation of poetry and literature.
meanings.example_cn: 这有助于培养小孩子对诗歌和文学作品的欣赏力。

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the mind and how it influences people’s behaviour
meanings.example: experts in the field of developmental psychology
meanings.example_cn: 发展心理学领域的专家

meanings.meaning_en: a sea animal with a hard shell, five legs on each side, and two large claws
meanings.example: crab meat
meanings.example_cn: 蟹肉

meanings.meaning_en: to hunt or catch crabs
(of a character) written or printed below the line
meanings.example: The subscript operator must be defined as a class member function.
meanings.example_cn: 下标操作符必须定义为类成员函数。

meanings.meaning_en: a subscript character (Also called subindex)
meanings.example: Octal numbers are identified by a trailing 8 subscript.
meanings.example_cn: 八进制数由一个附加的下标8来识别。

meanings.meaning_en: to or towards one side
meanings.example: A strong gust of wind blew the car sideways into the ditch.
meanings.example_cn: 一阵狂风把汽车横着掀进了沟里。

meanings.meaning_en: a tough twill-weave cotton fabric used for hard-wearing trousers, overalls, etc
meanings.example: a young man in jeans and a worn T-shirt
meanings.example_cn: 一个穿着牛仔裤和破旧T恤衫的年轻人

meanings.meaning_en: a slope or a degree of slope, especially in a road or railway
meanings.example: a steep gradient
meanings.example_cn: 陡坡

meanings.meaning_en: very unkind in a way that is intended to hurt someone’s feelings or make their character seem bad
meanings.example: Sarah can be quite vicious at times.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉有时相当狠毒。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is very bad or harmful
meanings.example: She wanted to protect her children from the evils of the outside world.
meanings.example_cn: 她想保护她的孩子不受外界的不良影响。

meanings.meaning_en: to work together with a person or group in order to achieve something, especially in science or art
meanings.example: The two nations are collaborating on several satellite projects.
meanings.example_cn: 两国在几个人造衞星项目上展开合作。

meanings.meaning_en: to put two things or people together, because they will look good or work well together
meanings.example: black trousers teamed with a bright shirt
meanings.example_cn: 配亮色衬衫的黑裤子

meanings.meaning_en: the number by which an unknown quantity is multiplied
meanings.example: In 8pq, the coefficient of pq is 8.
meanings.example_cn: 在8pq中pq的系数为8。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of wood, metal etc that has one thick edge and one pointed edge and is used especially for keeping a door open or for splitting wood
meanings.example: He hammered the wedge into the crack in the stone.
meanings.example_cn: 他用锤子把楔子砸入石缝里。

meanings.meaning_en: to force something firmly into a narrow space
meanings.example: The phone was wedged under his chin.
meanings.example_cn: 电话夹在他下巴下面。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of checking or slightly changing an instrument or tool so that it does something correctly
meanings.example: a calibration error
meanings.example_cn: 校准误差

meanings.meaning_en: part of a piece of writing which starts on a new line and contains at least one sentence
meanings.example: the opening paragraphs of the novel
meanings.example_cn: 小说开篇的几个段落

meanings.meaning_en: careful to avoid danger or risks
meanings.example: a cautious driver
meanings.example_cn: 一位谨慎的司机

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being very careful to avoid danger or risks
meanings.example: The physician must exercise caution when prescribing antidepressants.
meanings.example_cn: 医师在开抗抑郁药处方时必须谨慎。

meanings.meaning_en: to warn someone that something might be dangerous, difficult etc
meanings.example: Business leaders are cautioning against hasty action that would hamper flexibility.
meanings.example_cn: 企业领导人被告诫不要贸然采取行动，以免把事情搞僵。

meanings.meaning_en: a large case with a handle, used for carrying clothes and possessions when you travel
meanings.example: It did not take Andrew long to pack a suitcase.
meanings.example_cn: 安德鲁没有用多长时间就整理好了手提箱。

meanings.meaning_en: a decimal system is based on the number 10
meanings.example: changing to a decimal system
meanings.example_cn: 改为十进制

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow path for people to walk along, especially in the country
meanings.example: He said he had just picked up the druken man from the footpath and did not know him from Adam.
meanings.example_cn: 他说他只是把这个倒在人行道上的醉汉扶了起来，他根本不认识他。

meanings.meaning_en: a young dog
meanings.example: a six-month-old puppy
meanings.example_cn: 一只六个月大的小狗

meanings.meaning_en: a cupboard built into the wall of a room from the floor to the ceiling
meanings.example: a closet full of beautiful clothes
meanings.example_cn: 满是漂亮衣服的壁橱

meanings.meaning_en: a very thin book with paper covers, that gives information about something
meanings.example: a political pamphlet
meanings.example_cn: 政治宣传册

meanings.meaning_en: with less business activity than usual
meanings.example: Business remained slack throughout the day.
meanings.example_cn: 一整天生意都很冷清。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone or something becomes impossible to see or find
meanings.example: Police are investigating the woman’s disappearance.
meanings.example_cn: 警方正在调查这名女子的失踪。

meanings.meaning_en: an activity that you do for pleasure or amusement
meanings.example: His only recreations are drinking beer and watching football.
meanings.example_cn: 他唯一的消遣就是喝啤酒和看足球比赛。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys and uses products and services
meanings.example: Consumers will soon be paying higher airfares.
meanings.example_cn: 不久消费者就要支付更高的机票价了。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of using energy, food or materials; the amount used
meanings.example: Vigorous exercise increases oxygen consumption.
meanings.example_cn: 剧烈运动增加氧的消耗。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of sadness that makes you think there is no hope for the future
meanings.example: Lucy’s mood was one of deep depression.
meanings.example_cn: 露西的情绪极度消沉。

meanings.meaning_en: a round piece of metal that you use instead of money in some machines
meanings.example: slot-machine tokens
meanings.example_cn: 自动贩卖机使用的代用币

meanings.meaning_en: the hard smooth yellowish-white substance from the tusks of an  elephant
meanings.example: an ivory chess set
meanings.example_cn: 一副象牙国际象棋

meanings.meaning_en: towards a place or position that is in front of you
meanings.example: He leaned forward , his elbows resting on the table.
meanings.example_cn: 他身体前倾，胳膊肘撑在桌子上。

meanings.meaning_en: to send letters, goods etc to someone when they have moved to a different address
meanings.example: I felt that at last I could begin to look forward .
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得自己终于可以开始向前看了。

meanings.meaning_en: towards the south
meanings.example: We followed the coast southwards.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿海岸向南走。

meanings.meaning_en: the type of activity or subject that a person or organization seems most interested in and gives most attention to
meanings.example: The company needs to develop a stronger orientation towards marketing its products.
meanings.example_cn: 公司需要针对其产品的营销设定一个更为明确的目标。

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to obey a law or rule, or refuse to do what someone in authority tells you to do
meanings.example: people who openly defy the law
meanings.example_cn: 公然抗拒法律的人

meanings.meaning_en: to call to someone in order to greet them or try to attract their attention
meanings.example: She leaned out of the window and hailed a passerby.
meanings.example_cn: 她探出窗户向一个路人大喊。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a strong desire for something, especially something that is difficult or impossible to get
meanings.example: Hannah yearned for a child.
meanings.example_cn: 汉娜渴望有个孩子。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of powder or seed, taken from plants, that you put into food you are cooking to give it a special taste
meanings.example: herbs and spices
meanings.example_cn: 香草和香料

meanings.meaning_en: a religious person who travels a long way to a holy place
meanings.example: pilgrims visiting a holy shrine
meanings.example_cn: 祭拜圣庙的朝圣者

meanings.meaning_en: having a pleasant smell
meanings.example: fragrant flowers
meanings.example_cn: 芳香的花朵

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that has a pleasant smell when you burn it
meanings.example: a church filled with the smell of incense
meanings.example_cn: 充满焚香气味的教堂

meanings.meaning_en: not varying; the same in all parts and at all times
meanings.example: The principles were applied uniformly across all the departments.
meanings.example_cn: 这些原则统一适用于所有部门。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of being or looking similar to sb/sth
meanings.example: The resemblance between Susan and her sister was remarkable.
meanings.example_cn: 苏珊和她的姐姐十分相像。

meanings.meaning_en: something that seems similar between two situations, processes etc
meanings.example: analogies between human and animal behaviour
meanings.example_cn: 人类行为与动物行为的类同

meanings.meaning_en: if one thing interacts with another, or if they interact, they affect each other
meanings.example: The immune system interacts with both the nervous system and the hormones.
meanings.example_cn: 免疫系统与神经系统及激素相互影响。

meanings.meaning_en: a connection between two ideas, facts etc, especially when one may be the cause of the other
meanings.example: a strong correlation between urban deprivation and poor health
meanings.example_cn: 都市贫困和健康状况差之间的密切关系

meanings.meaning_en: involving two people or groups who agree to help each other or behave in the same way to each other
meanings.example: He spoke of the necessity for a reciprocal relationship that would be useful for all sides.
meanings.example_cn: 他谈及需要建立对各方都有益的互惠关系。

meanings.meaning_en: to happen at the same time as something else, especially by chance
meanings.example: When our vacations coincided, we often holidayed together.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的假期要是凑巧赶在一起，我们常常会一同去度假。

meanings.meaning_en: opposite in amount or position to sth else
