meanings.example: We regard health as inversely related to social class.
meanings.example_cn: 我们认为健康状况与社会地位成相反关系。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of spending a lot of time or energy on sth
meanings.example: her devotion to duty
meanings.example_cn: 她对职责的忠诚

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of lines, or in the form of a straight line
meanings.example: a linear diagram
meanings.example_cn: 线形图

meanings.meaning_en: to describe another word in a particular way
meanings.example: In ‘the open door ’, ‘open ’ is an adjective qualifying ‘door ’.
meanings.example_cn: 在the open door中，open是修饰door的形容词。

meanings.meaning_en: judging and dealing with situations in a practical way according to what is actually possible rather than what you would like to happen
meanings.example: It’s just not realistic to expect a promotion so soon.
meanings.example_cn: 这么快就想升职根本不现实。

meanings.meaning_en: unusual or interesting enough to be easily noticed
meanings.example: a striking contrast between wealth and poverty
meanings.example_cn: 显著的贫富差异

meanings.meaning_cn: 显微镜的；微观的，极小的
meanings.meaning_en: using a microscope
meanings.example: The cells were identified through microscopic analysis.
meanings.example_cn: 那些细胞通过显微镜分析被识别出来。

meanings.meaning_en: easy to notice
meanings.example: The difference in quality was immediately apparent .
meanings.example_cn: 质量的差异显而易见。

meanings.meaning_en: clearly
meanings.example: Speak clearly and distinctly.
meanings.example_cn: 说话要清楚明白。

meanings.meaning_en: salted or smoked meat from the back or sides of a pig, often served in narrow thin pieces
meanings.example: bacon and eggs
meanings.example_cn: 咸猪肉煎蛋

meanings.meaning_en: information that is passed from one person to another about other people’s behaviour and private lives, often including unkind or untrue remarks
meanings.example: What’s the latest gossip ?
meanings.example_cn: 最近有些什么传闻？

meanings.meaning_en: to go on a walk in the countryside for pleasure
meanings.example: There’s plenty to discover as you ramble around this little island.
meanings.example_cn: 漫步这个小岛，你会有很多新发现。

meanings.meaning_en: to happen or exist before something or someone, or to come before something else in a series
meanings.example: a type of cloud that precedes rain
meanings.example_cn: 下雨前出现的一种云

meanings.meaning_en: the thing that you think is most important and that needs attention before anything else
meanings.example: The club’s priority is to win the League.
meanings.example_cn: 该俱乐部首先考虑的是要赢得联赛。

meanings.meaning_en: a decrease in the quality, quantity, or importance of something
meanings.example: the economic decline faced by many cities
meanings.example_cn: 许多城市面临的经济衰退

meanings.meaning_en: the process of going down
meanings.example: Passengers must fasten their seat belts prior to descent.
meanings.example_cn: 乘客在飞机降落之前必须系好安全带。

meanings.meaning_en: in a less important position than someone else
meanings.example: a subordinate officer
meanings.example_cn: 下级官员

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has a lower position or rank than you in an organization
meanings.example: It was a gentleman's duty always to be civil, even to his inferiors.
meanings.example_cn: 一个绅士的责任是一直保持彬彬有礼，即使是对比自己地位低的人。

meanings.meaning_en: thin, in a way that is attractive
meanings.example: a slim young woman
meanings.example_cn: 身材苗条的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: a very thin  candle
meanings.example: small boys holding lighted tapers
meanings.example_cn: 拿着点燃的细蜡烛的小男孩

meanings.meaning_en: small and unimportant
meanings.example: petty squabbles
meanings.example_cn: 小口角

meanings.meaning_en: involving a very small difference or detail
meanings.example: a nice point of law
meanings.example_cn: 法律上的微妙难断之处

meanings.meaning_en: a very thin thread or wire
meanings.example: an electric filament
meanings.example_cn: 灯丝

meanings.meaning_en: the singular of bacteria
meanings.example: The bacterium Streptococcus pneumoniae causes about a third of some 3,000 annual meningitis cases.
meanings.example_cn: 在每年约3000起脑膜炎病例中，1/3左右是由一种叫“肺炎链球菌”的细菌引起的。

meanings.meaning_en: a very small living thing that can make you ill
meanings.example: Put disinfectant down the toilet to kill any germs.
meanings.example_cn: 在抽水马桶里投放消毒剂杀菌。

meanings.meaning_en: done according to a system or plan, in a thorough, efficient or determined way
meanings.example: The search was carried out systematically.
meanings.example_cn: 搜查已按照部署执行。

meanings.meaning_en: a complete range of opinions, people, situations etc, going from one extreme to its opposite
meanings.example: The two articles here represent opposite ends of the spectrum.
meanings.example_cn: 这里的两篇文章代表了两个极端的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something by tying a lace
meanings.example: Lace up your shoes or you’ll trip over.
meanings.example_cn: 把鞋带系好，否则你会绊倒的。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten a package, box etc with sticky tape
an exciting event or set of events, or the quality of being exciting
meanings.example: Maggie’s life is always full of drama.
meanings.example_cn: 玛吉的生活总是充满了戏剧性。

meanings.meaning_en: a building or place with a stage where plays and shows are performed
meanings.example: an open-air theatre (= a theatre that is outside )
meanings.example_cn: 露天剧场

meanings.meaning_en: entertainment that is intended to make people laugh
meanings.example: a career in stand-up comedy
meanings.example_cn: 单口喜剧表演职业

meanings.meaning_en: to attack someone in a violent way
meanings.example: Two men assaulted him after he left the bar.
meanings.example_cn: 他离开酒吧之后遭到两名男子的袭击。

meanings.meaning_en: a military attack to take control of a place controlled by the enemy
meanings.example: The refugee camp came under assault again last night.
meanings.example_cn: 昨晚难民营再次遭袭。

meanings.meaning_en: the way that words are used in a language
meanings.example: a book on modern English usage
meanings.example_cn: 关于现代英语用法的书

meanings.meaning_en: to stop a fire from burning
meanings.example: a desperate bid to quench the raging flames
meanings.example_cn: 为扑灭熊熊大火而不顾一切的努力

meanings.meaning_en: to make a fire or light stop burning or shining
meanings.example: Please extinguish all cigarettes.
meanings.example_cn: 请把香烟都熄灭了。

meanings.meaning_en: a process in which something takes in liquid, gas, or heat
meanings.example: the body’s absorption of iron
meanings.example_cn: 身体对铁质的吸收

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of food, drink etc that you take into your body
meanings.example: Try to reduce your intake of fat.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量减少脂肪的摄入量。

meanings.meaning_en: in relation to your body rather than your mind or emotions
meanings.example: She is young and physically fit.
meanings.example_cn: 她年轻而且身体健康。

meanings.meaning_en: large and strongly made
meanings.example: a substantial piece of furniture
meanings.example_cn: 一件又大又结实的家具

meanings.meaning_en: 英文释义 an object that is separate from other objects
meanings.example: Keep the caps on the bottles to prevent foreign bodies entering them (= objects that should not be there )
meanings.example_cn: 瓶子要盖好，以免异物进入。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal lunch or a formal word for lunch
meanings.example: Earlier this month, a luncheon for former U.N. staff was held in Vienna.
meanings.example_cn: 本月早些时候在维也纳为前联合国工作人员举行了午宴。

meanings.meaning_en: lack of knowledge or information about something
meanings.example: Excuse my ignorance, but how does it actually work?
meanings.example_cn: 请原谅我的无知，它究竟是如何运作的？

meanings.meaning_en: too small or unimportant to consider or worry about
meanings.example: You realize that your problems are insignificant in comparison.
meanings.example_cn: 要知道，你的问题相对来说微不足道。

meanings.meaning_en: used when saying that something is almost certain to happen or be true
meanings.example: Doubtless there would be lots of rumours.
meanings.example_cn: 无疑会谣言四起。

meanings.meaning_en: an indefinite action or period of time has no definite end arranged for it
meanings.example: The next day the union voted to begin an indefinite strike.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天工会投票表决决定开始无限期罢工。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely; with no limit
meanings.example: Human beings are infinitely adaptable.
meanings.example_cn: 人类的适应力是无限的。

meanings.meaning_en: without any limit
meanings.example: The system can support an unlimited number of users.
meanings.example_cn: 该系统可以支持无限多的用户。

meanings.meaning_en: something that has no end
not afraid of anything
meanings.example: These dogs are absolutely fearless.
meanings.example_cn: 这些狗什么都不怕。

meanings.meaning_en: very many, or too many to be counted
meanings.example: She’s served on innumerable committees.
meanings.example_cn: 她在多个委员会担任委员。

meanings.meaning_en: not consisting of anything that is living
meanings.example: inorganic matter
meanings.example_cn: 无机物

meanings.meaning_en: so determined to get what you want that you do not care if you have to hurt other people in order to do it
meanings.example: a ruthless dictator
meanings.example_cn: 无情的独裁者

meanings.meaning_en: not able to do something
meanings.example: He seemed incapable of understanding how she felt.
meanings.example_cn: 他似乎不能理解她的感受。

meanings.meaning_en: unusually good and special
meanings.example: a unique opportunity to study these rare creatures
meanings.example_cn: 研究这些珍稀动物的难得机会

meanings.meaning_en: having no mistakes
meanings.example: a faultless performance
meanings.example_cn: 完美的表现

meanings.meaning_en: from or relating to a country that is not your own
meanings.example: foreign students
meanings.example_cn: 外国学生

meanings.meaning_en: the number 0
meanings.example: A billion is 1 with 9 noughts after it.
meanings.example_cn: 十亿是1后面加9个零。

meanings.meaning_en: dirt, especially a lot of it
meanings.example: a mound of filth and rubbish
meanings.example_cn: 一堆脏东西和垃圾

meanings.meaning_en: a small soft creature that moves very slowly and has a hard shell on its back
meanings.example: Traffic was moving at a snail’s pace.
meanings.example_cn: 车辆移动的速度慢得像蜗牛。

meanings.meaning_en: a low continuous sound
meanings.example: the distant hum of traffic
meanings.example_cn: 远处嘈杂的车流声

meanings.meaning_en: to sing a tune by making a continuous sound with your lips closed
meanings.example: He began to hum a tune.
meanings.example_cn: 他开始哼唱一支曲子。

meanings.meaning_en: polite words or good wishes, especially when used to express praise and admiration
meanings.example: Compliments of the season! (= for Christmas or the New Year)
meanings.example_cn: 谨致节日的祝贺！（圣诞节或新年时的贺词）

meanings.meaning_en: to say something nice to someone in order to praise them
meanings.example: She complimented him on his excellent German.
meanings.example_cn: 她夸奖他德语棒极了。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone questions in order to get information about something such as a crime
meanings.example: Two men have been arrested and questioned.
meanings.example_cn: 已有两名男子被捕并受到盘问。

meanings.meaning_en: the literal meaning of a word or expression is its basic or original meaning
meanings.example: A trade war is not a war in the literal sense.
meanings.example_cn: 贸易战不是字面意义上的战争。

meanings.meaning_en: not knowing how to read or write
meanings.example: A large percentage of the population is illiterate.
meanings.example_cn: 文盲人口占有相当高的比例。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has not learned to read or write
meanings.example: a subclass of illiterates
meanings.example_cn: 文盲阶层

meanings.meaning_en: paper for writing letters, usually with matching envelopes
meanings.example: a letter on hotel stationery
meanings.example_cn: 用酒店信纸写的信

meanings.meaning_en: a disease that causes death and spreads quickly to a large number of people
meanings.example: drops in population levels due to plagues and famines
meanings.example_cn: 瘟疫和饥荒造成的人口水平下降

meanings.example: deceitful softness
meanings.example_cn: 虚伪的温柔

meanings.meaning_en: if an animal grazes, or if you graze it, it eats grass that is growing
meanings.example: fields where they used to graze their sheep
meanings.example_cn: 他们过去放羊的田野

meanings.meaning_en: a small area of a country, city etc
meanings.example: weather reports from several different localities
meanings.example_cn: 来自几个不同地区的天气报告

meanings.meaning_en: to be in a particular place or position
meanings.example: The house is situated near the college.
meanings.example_cn: 这幢房子位于学院附近。

meanings.meaning_en: a man who has never been married
meanings.example: Gerald was 38, and a confirmed bachelor (=  a man who has decided that he will never marry  ) .
meanings.example_cn: 杰拉德38岁，抱定主意独身。

meanings.meaning_en: not yet paid
meanings.example: unpaid bills
meanings.example_cn: 未付的账单

meanings.meaning_en: the back of a ship
a request for an artist, designer, or musician to make a piece of art or music, for which they are paid
meanings.example: a commission from the Academy for a new sculpture
meanings.example_cn: 学院要求制作一尊新雕塑的委托

meanings.meaning_en: The latitude of a place is its distance from the equator.
meanings.example: The birds breed in northern latitudes.
meanings.example_cn: 这些鸟在北纬地区繁殖。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance in food that is necessary for good health
meanings.example: Try to eat foods that are rich in vitamins and minerals.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量吃富含维生素和矿物质的食物。

meanings.meaning_en: the Roman goddess of love
the belief that you should live your life according to high standards and principles, even when they are very difficult to achieve
meanings.example: the idealism of the younger generation
meanings.example_cn: 年轻一代的理想主义

meanings.meaning_en: a tall pole on which the sails or flags on a ship are hung
an area surrounded by a wall or fence, and used for a particular purpose
meanings.example: the bear enclosure at the zoo
meanings.example_cn: 动物园中的熊园

meanings.meaning_en: an action that breaks a law, agreement, principle etc
meanings.example: human rights violations
meanings.example_cn: 违反人权

meanings.meaning_en: to disobey or do something against an official agreement, law, principle etc
meanings.example: 34 protesters were arrested for violating criminal law.
meanings.example_cn: 34名抗议者因违反刑法而被逮捕。

meanings.meaning_en: money put, saved, or given towards something is used to pay for it
meanings.example: The money collected will be put towards repairing the church roof.
meanings.example_cn: 募集到的钱款将用于修缮教堂屋顶。

meanings.meaning_en: to argue in support of sb/sth
meanings.example: He appeared before the committee to plead his case.
meanings.example_cn: 他出现在委员会上为他的案子辩护。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a complete list of all the things in a group
meanings.example: The manuscripts have never been systematically catalogued.
meanings.example_cn: 一直没有系统地为这些手稿编过目录。

meanings.meaning_en: the central  chip  in a computer, which controls most of its operations
meanings.example: I've got a typerwriter with a microprocessor.
meanings.example_cn: 我有一台装有微处理机的打字机。

meanings.meaning_en: not easy to notice or understand unless you pay careful attention
meanings.example: The pictures are similar, but there are subtle differences between them.
meanings.example_cn: 这些图片很相似，但它们之间有细微的差别。

meanings.meaning_en: the smallest part of an element that can exist alone or can combine with other substances to form a molecule
meanings.example: carbon atoms
meanings.example_cn: 碳原子

meanings.meaning_en: the part of mathematics that deals with changing quantities, such as the speed of a falling stone or the slope of a curved line
meanings.example: We have to factor that into the calculus.
meanings.example_cn: 我们要在微积分学中考虑这些因素。

meanings.meaning_en: a small pale light, especially one that shines for a short time
meanings.example: They saw a sudden gleam of light.
meanings.example_cn: 他们看到一道微光一闪而过。

meanings.meaning_en: to shine softly
meanings.example: The wooden panelling was gleaming with wax polish.
meanings.example_cn: 木嵌板上过蜡显得很光亮。

meanings.meaning_en: too slight or unimportant to have any effect
meanings.example: The damage done to his property was negligible.
meanings.example_cn: 对他财产造成的损失微不足道。

meanings.meaning_en: a very short electric wave that is used in cooking food and sending messages by radio, and in radar
meanings.example: Its molecules can be agitated by microwave energy.
meanings.example_cn: 微波能量可以使其分子随之运动。

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel great respect or fear
the impressive and attractive quality that sth has
meanings.example: the sheer majesty of St Peter's in Rome
meanings.example_cn: 罗马圣彼得大教堂的雄伟庄严

meanings.meaning_en: the respect and admiration that someone or something gets because of their success or important position in society
meanings.example: The king wanted to enhance his prestige through war.
meanings.example_cn: 国王想通过战争来提高自己的威信。

meanings.meaning_en: to put someone or something in danger of being hurt, damaged, or destroyed
meanings.example: Smoking during pregnancy endangers your baby’s life.
meanings.example_cn: 孕期吸烟会危及胎儿生命。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which there are a lot of problems that must be dealt with quickly so that the situation does not get worse or more dangerous
meanings.example: The country now faces an economic crisis .
meanings.example_cn: 该国目前正面临一场经济危机。

meanings.meaning_en: great danger, especially of being harmed or killed
meanings.example: a voyage that was fraught with peril
meanings.example_cn: 历尽艰险的旅程

meanings.meaning_en: to remove someone from their job
meanings.example: Bryant was unfairly dismissed from his post.
meanings.example_cn: 布赖恩特被无理免职了。

meanings.example: She rocked the baby to and fro.
meanings.example_cn: 她来回摇动着婴儿。

meanings.meaning_en: material made from threads or wires that have been woven together like a net, or a piece of this material
meanings.example: The windows were covered in wire mesh to keep out flies.
meanings.example_cn: 窗户上装了铁丝纱网，防止苍蝇飞入。

meanings.meaning_en: a system of lines, tubes, wires, roads etc that cross each other and are connected to each other
meanings.example: a high-speed European rail network
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲的高速铁路网

meanings.meaning_en: a complicated pattern of things that are closely connected to each other
meanings.example: a web of streets
meanings.example_cn: 纵横交错的街道

meanings.meaning_en: determined not to change your mind, even when people think you are being unreasonable
meanings.example: Why are you so stubborn?
meanings.example_cn: 你怎么这么固执？

meanings.meaning_en: to treat someone or something without respect or not in a serious way
meanings.example: He’s not a man to be trifled with.
meanings.example_cn: 他这个人怠慢不得。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being finished
meanings.example: The house is nearing completion (= almost finished ) .
meanings.example_cn: 房子即将完工。

meanings.meaning_en: bent, twisted, or not in a straight line
meanings.example: Your tie’s crooked.
meanings.example_cn: 你的领带歪了。

meanings.meaning_en: the outer covering of seeds, rice, grain etc
relating to or involving the work of diplomats
meanings.example: Diplomatic efforts to end the fighting began on October 25.
meanings.example_cn: 停战的外交努力于10月25日开始。

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to another country or race
meanings.example: alien cultures
meanings.example_cn: 异域文化

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not a legal citizen of the country they are living or working in
meanings.example: illegal aliens entering the country
meanings.example_cn: 非法入境的外国人

meanings.meaning_en: not familiar because you have not been there before or met the person before
meanings.example: As a child, she’d been taught never to speak to strange men.
meanings.example_cn: 她从小就受到教育绝对不要和陌生男人说话。

meanings.meaning_en: to report something in a way that is not completely true or correct
meanings.example: His account was badly distorted by the press.
meanings.example_cn: 他的话被报界严重歪曲。

meanings.meaning_en: to change the true or intended meaning of a statement, especially in order to get some advantage for yourself
meanings.example: He’s always trying to twist my words and make me look bad.
meanings.example_cn: 他总是要曲解我的话，丑化我的形象。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat square piece of baked clay or other material, used for covering walls, floors etc
meanings.example: bathroom tiles
meanings.example_cn: 浴室瓷砖

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring electrical power
meanings.example: a 100-watt bulb
meanings.example_cn: 100瓦的灯泡

meanings.meaning_en: having the shape of an ellipse
meanings.example: Kepler published his discovery of the elliptical orbits of planets in 1609. 1609
meanings.example_cn: 年开普勒公布他的发现，认为行星轨道为椭圆形。

meanings.meaning_en: to pull something heavy with a continuous steady movement
meanings.example: the steam locomotive which hauled the train
meanings.example_cn: 拖动火车的蒸汽机车

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two parts on each side of your body between the top of your leg and your waist
meanings.example: She stood there with her hands on her hips glaring at him.
meanings.example_cn: 她站在那里，双手叉腰瞪着他。

meanings.meaning_en: to eat something quickly because you are very hungry
meanings.example: The boys devoured their pancakes.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩子们狼吞虎咽地把薄煎饼吃了。

meanings.meaning_en: when you stop working, usually because of your age
meanings.example: She took early retirement (= retired at an earlier age than usual ) last year.
meanings.example_cn: 她去年提前退休了。

meanings.meaning_en: a disadvantage of a situation, plan, product etc
meanings.example: It’s a great city – the only drawback is the weather.
meanings.example_cn: 这是座很不错的城市，唯一的不足就是天气。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you think is true, based on information that you have
meanings.example: There were two inferences to be drawn from her letter.
meanings.example_cn: 从她的来信可以得到两种推论。

meanings.meaning_en: rational thoughts, decisions etc are based on reasons rather than emotions
meanings.example: Parents need to be fully informed so they can make a rational decision.
meanings.example_cn: 父母需要充分了解情况，这样才可以作出合理的决定。

meanings.meaning_en: the force that drives a vehicle forward
meanings.example: research into liquid hydrogen as a means of propulsion
meanings.example_cn: 对液态氢作为一种动力方式进行的研究

meanings.meaning_en: to move, drive, or push something forward
meanings.example: a boat propelled by a small motor
meanings.example_cn: 由小马达驱动的小船

meanings.meaning_en: a suggestion to someone that they should choose a particular thing or person that you think is very good
meanings.example: We chose the hotel on their recommendation (= because they recommended it).
meanings.example_cn: 我们根据他们的推荐选了这家酒店。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove a leader or government from power, especially by force
meanings.example: Rebels were already making plans to overthrow the government.
meanings.example_cn: 反叛者已在密谋颠覆政府。

meanings.meaning_en: the defeat and removal from power of a leader or government, especially by force
meanings.example: The organization was dedicated to the overthrow of capitalism.
meanings.example_cn: 该组织致力于推翻资本主义。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong desire to do something without thinking about whether it is a sensible thing to do
meanings.example: a sudden impulse to laugh
meanings.example_cn: 突然想笑的冲动

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that you think something is probably true
meanings.example: It’s raining, which presumably means that your football match will be cancelled.
meanings.example_cn: 下雨了，这可能意味着你们的足球比赛要取消。

meanings.meaning_en: to believe that something is true because of what you have seen or heard
meanings.example: You two know each other, I gather.
meanings.example_cn: 我想你们俩认识。

meanings.meaning_en: to push someone or something in a rough or careless way, using your hands or shoulders
meanings.example: He shoved her towards the car.
meanings.example_cn: 他推着她走向汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: loyalty and general agreement between all the people in a group, or between different groups, because they all have a shared aim
meanings.example: a gesture of solidarity
meanings.example_cn: 团结的表示

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of soldiers, usually consisting of several  battalions
meanings.example: They deserted from their regiment.
meanings.example_cn: 他们从团里开了小差。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who robs people, especially one of a group of people who attack travellers
meanings.example: They travelled 30 miles through bandit country.
meanings.example_cn: 他们走了30英里，穿过强盗横行的乡间。

meanings.meaning_en: something you use to influence a situation to get the result that you want
meanings.example: Rich countries use foreign aid as a lever to achieve political aims.
meanings.example_cn: 富国利用对外援助作为达到政治目的的手段。

meanings.meaning_en: If an event overtakes you, it happens unexpectedly or suddenly.
meanings.example: Tragedy was shortly to overtake him, however.
meanings.example_cn: 然而，不幸将很快降临到他的头上。

meanings.meaning_en: the front part of a plane, boat , etc
meanings.example: They went over to the aeroplane and stood near its nose.
meanings.example_cn: 他们朝飞机走了过去并站在靠近机头的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: having little or no hair on your head
meanings.example: a bald man
meanings.example_cn: 一名秃顶男子

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that makes a film or picture appear on a screen or flat surface
meanings.example: ...a slide projector.
meanings.example_cn: …幻灯机。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of voting in an election, or the number of votes recorded
meanings.example: Ten million voters went to the polls.
meanings.example_cn: 1,000 万选民参加了投票。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask a lot of people the same questions in order to find out what they think about a subject
meanings.example: 18% of the women we polled said their husbands had a drinking problem.
meanings.example_cn: 我们调查的妇女当中有18%的人说丈夫有酗酒问题。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling unable to stand steadily, for example because you are looking down from a high place or because you are ill
meanings.example: The heat and the champagne made him feel dizzy .
meanings.example_cn: 高温和香槟酒使他感到眩晕。

meanings.meaning_en: to take something that belongs to someone else
meanings.example: Boys broke into a shop and stole £45 in cash.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩们闯进一家商店，盗走了45英镑现金。

meanings.meaning_en: great suffering that is caused for example by being very poor or very sick
meanings.example: What we are witnessing here is human misery on a vast scale.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在这里所目睹的情景是许许多多的人都生活困苦。

meanings.meaning_en: severe mental or physical suffering
meanings.example: She lay awake all night in torment.
meanings.example_cn: 她一晚上都醒着，在痛苦中煎熬。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone suffer a lot, especially mentally
meanings.example: Seth was tormented by feelings of guilt.
meanings.example_cn: 塞思被负罪感折磨着。

meanings.meaning_en: to beat someone violently, especially in order to punish them
meanings.example: My poor brother used to get thrashed for all kinds of minor offences.
meanings.example_cn: 我那可怜的哥哥过去常常因为各种各样的小错而挨打。

meanings.meaning_en: more powerful, important, or noticeable than other people or things
meanings.example: The firm has achieved a dominant position in the world market.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司在国际市场上占有举足轻重的地位。

meanings.meaning_en: to control someone or something or to have more importance than other people or things
meanings.example: The industry is dominated by five multinational companies.
meanings.example_cn: 这个行业受五家跨国公司控制。

meanings.meaning_en: a collection of information shown in numbers
meanings.example: crime/unemployment, etc. statistics
meanings.example_cn: 犯罪、失业等统计资料

meanings.meaning_en: not changing very much in amount, speed, etc.
meanings.example: The room is kept at an even temperature.
meanings.example_cn: 这个房间保持恒温状态。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly the same, or very similar
meanings.example: four identical houses
meanings.example_cn: 四幢一模一样的房子

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being similar in appearance to someone or something
meanings.example: I can see the family likeness.
meanings.example_cn: 我看出这一家人都长得很像。

meanings.meaning_en: things that are simultaneous happen at exactly the same time
meanings.example: They grabbed each other’s hands in simultaneous panic.
meanings.example_cn: 他们俩同时惊慌起来，相互抓住对方的手。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who helps a criminal, especially by helping them hide from the police
meanings.example: an accessory to murder
meanings.example_cn: 谋杀案的帮凶

meanings.meaning_en: not the most important when compared to others
meanings.example: the accessory muscles of respiration
meanings.example_cn: 副呼吸肌

meanings.meaning_en: consisting of people or things that are all of the same type
meanings.example: a homogeneous society
meanings.example_cn: 同种族人组成的社会

meanings.meaning_en: equal in importance or rank in a sentence
meanings.example: coordinate clauses joined by ‘and’
meanings.example_cn: 用 and 连接的并列分句

meanings.meaning_en: while
to formally or officially tell someone about something
meanings.example: You will be notified of any changes in the system.
meanings.example_cn: 系统中有任何变化都会通知你。

meanings.meaning_en: to tell the public about a product or service in order to persuade them to buy it
meanings.example: They no longer advertise alcohol or cigarettes at sporting events.
meanings.example_cn: 他们不再在体育赛事上做烟酒广告了。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of sending and receiving letters
meanings.example: The magazine is unable to enter into any correspondence on medical matters.
meanings.example_cn: 本杂志无法答复有关医学方面的来信。

meanings.meaning_en: when something or someone is liked or supported by a lot of people
meanings.example: The president’s popularity has declined considerably.
meanings.example_cn: 总统的支持率大大下降了。

meanings.meaning_en: a continuing increase in prices, or the rate at which prices increase
meanings.example: Inflation is now at over 16%.
meanings.example_cn: 通货膨胀率现已超过16%。

meanings.meaning_en: the system or type of money that a country uses
meanings.example: The bank can supply you with foreign currency .
meanings.example_cn: 这家银行能为你提供外币。

meanings.meaning_en: a door, gate, or passage that you go through to enter a place
meanings.example: You can leave your umbrella in the entry.
meanings.example_cn: 你可以把伞放在入口处。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is customary is normal because it is the way something is usually done
meanings.example: In some cultures it is customary for the bride to wear white.
meanings.example_cn: 在一些文化中，新娘按风俗要穿白色。

meanings.meaning_en: usually
meanings.example: Ordinarily, he didn’t like to go to the movies.
meanings.example_cn: 一般来说他不喜欢去看电影。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical compound that consists of  hydrogen and carbon, such as coal or gas
meanings.example: hydrocarbon emissions
meanings.example_cn: 碳氢化合物的排放

meanings.meaning_en: when someone calmly accepts a situation that cannot be changed, even though it is bad
meanings.example: She gave a sigh of resignation.
meanings.example_cn: 她无奈地叹了一口气。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who makes and repairs things made of iron, especially  horseshoes
meanings.example: In my youth my father bound me to a blacksmith.
meanings.example_cn: 在我年轻时我父亲立契让我给一名铁匠当学徒。

meanings.meaning_en: containing or relating to iron
meanings.example: ferrous metals
meanings.example_cn: 含铁[黑色]金属

meanings.meaning_en: to be next to or joined to sth
meanings.example: A vacant plot of land adjoins his house.
meanings.example_cn: 有一块空地紧挨着他家。

meanings.meaning_en: to move by jumping on one foot
meanings.example: a little girl hopping and skipping
meanings.example_cn: 一个蹦蹦跳跳的小女孩

meanings.meaning_en: to move forward with quick steps and jumps
meanings.example: He turned and skipped away, singing happily to himself.
meanings.example_cn: 他转身蹦蹦跳跳地跑了，嘴里高兴地哼着歌。

meanings.meaning_en: if a house, room etc overlooks something, it has a view of it, usually from above
meanings.example: Our room overlooks the ocean.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的房间可以俯视大海。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a machine or your body work at a particular speed, temperature etc
meanings.example: People sweat to regulate their body heat.
meanings.example_cn: 人出汗以调节体温。

meanings.meaning_en: to change the sound of your voice
meanings.example: He carefully modulated his voice.
meanings.example_cn: 他仔细地调节了自己的声音。

meanings.meaning_cn: 调停；（尤指拓荒者居住的）定居点，村落
meanings.meaning_en: an official agreement or decision that ends an argument, a court case, or a fight, or the action of making an agreement
meanings.example: the search for a peaceful settlement of the Northern Ireland conflict
meanings.example_cn: 寻找和平解决北爱尔兰冲突的办法

meanings.meaning_en: bad behaviour, especially by children, that causes trouble or damage, but no serious harm
meanings.example: Now run along, and don’t get into mischief .
meanings.example_cn: 好了，走开，不要捣乱。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which two people, ideas, or statements agree with each other
meanings.example: These results are in accord with earlier research.
meanings.example_cn: 这些结果和先前的研究一致。

meanings.meaning_en: a written set of questions which you give to a large number of people in order to collect information
meanings.example: Teachers will be asked to fill in a questionnaire.
meanings.example_cn: 教师们将被要求填写一份调查问卷。

meanings.meaning_en: how sweet something tastes or smells
meanings.example: the sweetness of the wild rose
meanings.example_cn: 野玫瑰的芬芳

meanings.meaning_en: sweet food served after the main part of a meal
meanings.example: She had homemade ice cream for dessert.
meanings.example_cn: 她吃了些自制冰淇淋当餐后甜点。

meanings.meaning_en: connected with the Roman Catholic Church
meanings.example: ...the Catholic Church.
meanings.example_cn: …天主教会。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of the Catholic Church
the scientific study of the stars and  planet s
meanings.example: Do you know anything about astronomy?
meanings.example_cn: 你懂天文学吗?

meanings.meaning_en: to be a very good example of an idea or quality
meanings.example: She embodies everything I admire in a teacher.
meanings.example_cn: 她具备了我所钦佩的教师该具备的一切素质。

meanings.meaning_cn: 题目；主题；主旋律；（句子的）主位；词干
meanings.meaning_en: the main subject or idea in a piece of writing, speech, film etc
meanings.example: The book’s theme is the conflict between love and duty.
meanings.example_cn: 本书的主题是爱与责任之间的冲突。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially suggest someone or something for an important position, duty, or prize
meanings.example: Ferraro was the first woman to be nominated for the job of vice president.
meanings.example_cn: 费拉罗是第一位获得副总统职位提名的女性。

meanings.meaning_en: to provide money, especially a lot of money, to pay for something
meanings.example: The concerts are financed by the Arts Council.
meanings.example_cn: 音乐会由艺术协会出资举办。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a person or other living thing the food and other substances they need in order to live, grow, and stay healthy
meanings.example: The cream contains vitamin A to nourish the skin.
meanings.example_cn: 这种护肤霜含有滋养肌肤的维生素A。

meanings.meaning_en: to improve something
meanings.example: Good lighting will enhance any room.
meanings.example_cn: 良好的照明能给房间增色不少。

meanings.meaning_en: to move someone or something to a more important level or rank, or make them better than before
meanings.example: Language has elevated humans above the other animals.
meanings.example_cn: 语言使人类高于其他动物。

meanings.meaning_en: to take a pure form of a substance out of another substance that contains it
to begin to talk or write about a subject that you want to be considered or a question that you think should be answered
meanings.example: He did not raise the subject again.
meanings.example_cn: 他再也没有提起这个话题。

meanings.meaning_en: to formally present a possible new law to be discussed
meanings.example: Several senators introduced legislation aimed at sexual harassment.
meanings.example_cn: 几位参议员提交了针对性骚扰的立法议案。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is a feature of only one particular place, person, situation etc
meanings.example: The lack of a written constitution is a peculiarity of the British political system.
meanings.example_cn: 没有一部成文宪法是英国政治制度的一大特点。

meanings.meaning_en: an individual style, way of doing things etc is different from anyone else’s – usually used to show approval
meanings.example: a tennis player with a highly individual style
meanings.example_cn: 风格非常独特的网球选手

meanings.meaning_cn: 极其重要的；必不可少的
meanings.meaning_en: extremely important and necessary
meanings.example: Window locks are fairly cheap and absolutely essential.
meanings.example_cn: 窗锁相当便宜，绝对有必要安装。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is boring, especially because they talk too much about themselves or about things that do not interest you
meanings.example: He turned out to be a crashing bore (= used to emphasize that someone is very boring ).
meanings.example_cn: 他这人原来无聊透顶。

meanings.meaning_en: Earthenware objects are referred to as earthenware
meanings.example: ...colourful Italian china and earthenware.
meanings.example_cn: ...五颜六色的意大利瓷器和陶器。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave somewhere very quickly, in order to escape from danger
meanings.example: His attackers turned and fled.
meanings.example_cn: 袭击他的人转身逃走了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has done something illegal, and who is hiding in order to avoid punishment – used especially about criminals in the past
meanings.example: Jesse was an outlaw, a bandit, a criminal.
meanings.example_cn: 杰西曾是个逃犯、土匪、罪犯。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk through water that is not deep
meanings.example: He waded into the water to push the boat out.
meanings.example_cn: 他蹚进水里把船推出来。

meanings.meaning_en: a long thin metal instrument that doctors and scientists use to examine parts of the body
meanings.example: a fibre-optic probe
meanings.example_cn: 一根光纤探针

meanings.meaning_en: to look for something or examine something, using a long thin object
meanings.example: The surgeon would pick up his instruments, probe, repair, and stitch up again.
meanings.example_cn: 外科医生会拿起器械进行探查、修复，然后再缝合。

meanings.meaning_en: a long and carefully organized journey, especially to a dangerous or unfamiliar place, or the people that make this journey
meanings.example: an expedition to the North Pole
meanings.example_cn: 北极探险

meanings.meaning_en: a black substance made of burned wood that can be used as fuel
meanings.example: cooking over a charcoal fire
meanings.example_cn: 在炭火上做饭

meanings.meaning_en: showing clearly and honestly what is true or what you think about something
meanings.example: Let’s have some plain, truthful answers.
meanings.example_cn: 让我们听听坦率而真实的回答吧。

meanings.meaning_en: to discuss something in order to reach an agreement, especially in business or politics
meanings.example: His first aim is to get the warring parties back to the negotiating table (= discussing something ).
meanings.example_cn: 他的首要目标就是把交战各方拉回到谈判桌上。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong desire for more food, money, power, possessions etc than you need
meanings.example: people motivated by jealousy and greed
meanings.example_cn: 受妒忌和贪婪驱使的人们

meanings.meaning_en: a very small green plant that grows in a thick soft furry mass on wet soil, trees, or rocks
meanings.example: ...ground covered over with moss.
meanings.example_cn: …长满青苔的地面。

meanings.meaning_cn: （自行车的）踏脚，踏板，脚蹬；（汽车或机器的）踏板
meanings.meaning_en: one of the two parts of a bicycle that you push round with your feet to make the bicycle go forward
meanings.example: I couldn't reach the pedals on her bike.
meanings.example_cn: 我骑她的车够不到脚蹬子。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to something that has just been mentioned
meanings.example: States differ in standards for products and the labelling thereof.
meanings.example_cn: 各州的产品标准不同，标签的标注也不同。

meanings.meaning_en: not important or serious; not worth considering
meanings.example: a trivial detail
meanings.example_cn: 细枝末节

meanings.meaning_en: a single feature, fact, or piece of information about something
meanings.example: She told me every detail of her trip.
meanings.example_cn: 她把旅行的所有细节都告诉了我。

meanings.meaning_en: something that worries you
meanings.example: One of the concerns that people have is the side effects of treatment.
meanings.example_cn: 人们担心的问题之一是治疗的副作用。

meanings.meaning_en: the thing which
meanings.example: Show me what you bought.
meanings.example_cn: 给我看看你买的东西。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly like something or someone but much smaller
meanings.example: She’s her mother in miniature.
meanings.example_cn: 她是她母亲的缩影。

meanings.meaning_en: much smaller than normal
meanings.example: a miniature railway
meanings.example_cn: 微型铁路

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of great unhappiness because someone, especially someone you trust, has treated you badly or unfairly
meanings.example: She saw the hurt in his eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 她看到了他眼中的伤痛。

meanings.meaning_en: to change or spoil the usual or natural shape of sth
meanings.example: Wearing badly-fitting shoes can deform your feet.
meanings.example_cn: 穿不合脚的鞋会使脚变形。

meanings.meaning_en: a change in the usual shape of something, especially one that makes it worse, or the process of changing something’s shape
meanings.example: a deformation of the spine
meanings.example_cn: 脊柱的畸变

meanings.meaning_en: a decorative edge of hanging threads on a curtain, piece of clothing etc
meanings.example: The jacket had leather fringes.
meanings.example_cn: 这件夹克有皮穗。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of paper, cloth etc
meanings.example: a rug made out of old scraps of material
meanings.example_cn: 用旧零碎材料拼做的一块小地毯

meanings.meaning_en: to cancel or get rid of sth that is no longer practical or useful
meanings.example: The equipment was sold for scrap.
meanings.example_cn: 这件设备被当成废品卖了。

meanings.meaning_en: without any definite plan, aim, or pattern
meanings.example: The gang picked their victims at random.
meanings.example_cn: 这帮犯罪分子随意选择对象下手。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or chosen without any definite plan, aim, or pattern
meanings.example: The company has introduced random drug testing of its employees.
meanings.example_cn: 公司已实行对雇员的随机毒品测试。

meanings.meaning_en: a plant like a small onion, used in cooking to give a strong taste
meanings.example: Add a crushed clove of garlic (= single section of it ).
meanings.example_cn: 加一瓣压碎的大蒜。

meanings.meaning_en: made of plastic
meanings.example: a plastic spoon
meanings.example_cn: 塑料汤匙

meanings.meaning_en: a fast method of writing using special signs or shorter forms to represent letters, words, and phrases
meanings.example: a secretary who takes shorthand (= writes in shorthand )
meanings.example_cn: 会速记的秘书

meanings.meaning_en: to search an area or various areas in order to find or discover sth
meanings.example: They scouted the area for somewhere to stay the night.
meanings.example_cn: 他们四处查看，想找个过夜的地方。

meanings.meaning_en: clothes, sheets etc that need to be washed or have just been washed
meanings.example: She did the laundry (= washed the clothes etc ) and hung it out to dry.
meanings.example_cn: 她洗了衣服，然后挂出去晾干。

meanings.meaning_en: to put something back where it was before
meanings.example: He replaced the book on the shelf.
meanings.example_cn: 他把书放回架子上。

meanings.meaning_en: in a way that is not firm or tight
meanings.example: She fastened the belt loosely around her waist.
meanings.example_cn: 她把皮带松松地系在腰上。

meanings.meaning_en: to look after a person or animal until they are fully grown
meanings.example: It’s a good place to rear young children.
meanings.example_cn: 这地方非常适合抚养小孩子成长。

meanings.meaning_en: to die, especially in a terrible or sudden way
meanings.example: Hundreds perished when the ship went down.
meanings.example_cn: 轮船沉没，数百人罹难。

meanings.meaning_en: a sound like a long ‘s ’; this sound used to show disapproval of sb
meanings.example: the snake's hiss
meanings.example_cn: 蛇发出的嘶嘶声

meanings.meaning_en: to make a noise which sounds like ‘ssss’
meanings.example: The performance was met with boos and hisses.
meanings.example_cn: 演出换来一片倒彩声和嘘声。

meanings.meaning_en: to tear something or be torn quickly and violently
meanings.example: Her clothes had all been ripped.
meanings.example_cn: 她的衣服都被撕破了。

meanings.meaning_en: to guess about the possible causes or effects of something, without knowing all the facts or details
meanings.example: Jones refused to speculate about what might happen.
meanings.example_cn: 琼斯拒绝猜测可能会发生什么事情。

meanings.meaning_en: to take something or someone illegally from one country to another
meanings.example: The guns were smuggled across the border.
meanings.example_cn: 这些枪被偷运过境。

meanings.meaning_en: a secret or a piece of information that is private or personal
meanings.example: I have never betrayed a confidence.
meanings.example_cn: 我从未泄露过别人的秘密。

meanings.meaning_en: made of velvet
meanings.example: velvet curtains/cushions
meanings.example_cn: 天鹅绒窗帘/坐垫

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is officially responsible for the money for an organization, club, political party etc

meanings.meaning_cn: 说明，解释；展览会，博览会
meanings.meaning_en: a clear and detailed explanation
meanings.example: a lucid exposition of educational theories
meanings.example_cn: 对教育理论的清晰阐述

meanings.meaning_en: to talk about a religious subject in a public place, especially in a church during a service
meanings.example: Christ began preaching to large crowds.
meanings.example_cn: 基督开始向众人布道。

meanings.meaning_en: to say or write what you have noticed about a situation
meanings.example: ‘Sid looks ill,’ Doherty observed.
meanings.example_cn: “锡德看上去病了。”多尔蒂说道。

meanings.meaning_en: continuing for a very short time
meanings.example: There was a momentary pause.
meanings.example_cn: 停顿了片刻。

meanings.meaning_en: happening immediately
meanings.example: modern methods of instantaneous communication
meanings.example_cn: 现代的即时通信方法

meanings.meaning_en: a comfortable piece of furniture big enough for two or three people to sit on
meanings.example: Tom offered to sleep on the couch.
meanings.example_cn: 汤姆说他来睡沙发。

meanings.meaning_en: sleep
meanings.example: He passed into a deep slumber.
meanings.example_cn: 他酣然入梦。

meanings.meaning_en: an African animal similar to a large cow with long curved horns
moved or operated by the pressure of water or other liquid
meanings.example: a hydraulic pump
meanings.example_cn: 水压泵，液压泵

meanings.meaning_cn: 充满水的；与水有关的；湿的；（食物、饮料等）味淡的
meanings.meaning_en: full of water or relating to water
meanings.example: Her eyes were red and watery from crying.
meanings.example_cn: 她的眼睛哭得红红的，眼里含满泪水。

meanings.meaning_en: to wash clothes, dishes, vegetables etc quickly with water, especially running water, and without soap
meanings.example: Let me just rinse my hands.
meanings.example_cn: 让我冲个手。

meanings.meaning_en: the act or about of wrestling
expressed or considered in numbers
meanings.example: a numerical code
meanings.example_cn: 数字密码

meanings.meaning_en: to calculate an amount
meanings.example: The expression ‘full moon’ means the fourteenth day of the moon reckoned from its first appearance.
meanings.example_cn: 所谓“满月”是指从新月初现算起的第14天。

meanings.meaning_en: a large musical instrument with strings that are stretched across a vertical frame with three corners, and that you play with your fingers
meanings.example: She swept her fingers over the strings of the harp.
meanings.example_cn: 她用手指划过竖琴的琴弦。

meanings.meaning_en: in a straight upright position
meanings.example: Martin stood erect on the platform.
meanings.example_cn: 马丁在讲台上笔直地站着。

meanings.meaning_en: the technical words or expressions that are used in a particular subject
meanings.example: computer terminology
meanings.example_cn: 计算机术语

meanings.meaning_en: able to do something well or skilfully
meanings.example: a proficient typist
meanings.example_cn: 熟练的打字员

meanings.meaning_en: a good standard of ability and skill
meanings.example: a high level of proficiency in English
meanings.example_cn: 精通英语

meanings.meaning_en: to put information into a computer
meanings.example: to input text/data/figures
meanings.example_cn: 把文本 / 数据 / 数字输入计算机

meanings.meaning_en: the act of putting information into a computer; the information that you put in
meanings.example: data input
meanings.example_cn: 数据输入

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money given to someone, especially by the government, for a particular purpose
meanings.example: The university gets a government grant.
meanings.example_cn: 这所大学获得政府拨款。

meanings.meaning_en: someone, especially a child, who depends on you for food, clothes, money etc
meanings.example: Companies with 200 or more workers must offer health benefits to employees and their dependants.
meanings.example_cn: 员工数为200或更多的公司必须为其员工和员工的受扶养人提供健康福利。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is not generous and does not like spending money
meanings.example: I'm married to a miser.
meanings.example_cn: 我嫁了个守财奴。

meanings.meaning_en: a large basket on wheels that you use for carrying bags, shopping etc
meanings.example: a supermarket trolley
meanings.example_cn: 超市购物手推车

meanings.meaning_en: a book or piece of writing before it is printed
meanings.example: Unfortunately, parts of the original manuscript have been lost.
meanings.example_cn: 遗憾的是，部分原始手稿丢失了。

meanings.meaning_en: a short book that gives information or instructions about something
meanings.example: the Fiction Writer’s Handbook
meanings.example_cn: 《小说写作手册》

meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of adopting a child
meanings.example: She decided to put the baby up for adoption.
meanings.example_cn: 她决定让人收养那个婴儿。

meanings.meaning_en: money that a business or organization receives over a period of time, especially from selling goods or services
meanings.example: advertising revenue
meanings.example_cn: 广告收入

meanings.meaning_en: a formal and very serious promise
meanings.example: The president took the oath of office (= made the official public promises that every president makes when starting their job ) .
meanings.example_cn: 总统宣誓就职。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious promise
meanings.example: Jim made a vow that he would find his wife’s killer.
meanings.example_cn: 吉姆发誓要找到杀害他妻子的凶手。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious promise or agreement, especially one made publicly or officially
meanings.example: a pledge of support for the plan
meanings.example_cn: 支持该计划的誓约

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone formally promise something
meanings.example: Employees were pledged to secrecy.
meanings.example_cn: 员工被要求保证严守秘密。

meanings.meaning_en: used or happening inside a building
meanings.example: an indoor swimming pool
meanings.example_cn: 室内游泳池

meanings.meaning_en: likely to make you healthy
meanings.example: well-balanced wholesome meals
meanings.example_cn: 营养均衡的健康餐

meanings.meaning_en: in a way which is not extreme or stays within reasonable limits
meanings.example: He drinks moderately.
meanings.example_cn: 他喝酒有节制。

meanings.meaning_en: right for a particular situation or occasion
meanings.example: I thought the memorial was a fitting tribute to the President.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为这座纪念碑恰如其分地表达了对总统的敬意。

meanings.meaning_en: an outside part of a piece of equipment that makes it possible to use or handle it
meanings.example: new light fittings
meanings.example_cn: 新款灯具配件

meanings.meaning_en: the degree to which someone or something is suitable or good enough for a particular situation or purpose
meanings.example: He questioned McNeil’s fitness for high office.
meanings.example_cn: 他质疑麦克尼尔是否适合身居高位。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to see
meanings.example: She suffered temporary loss of vision after being struck on the head.
meanings.example_cn: 她头部受撞击以后出现暂时性失明。

meanings.meaning_cn: 侍者；（要人的）侍从；（病人的）护理人员
meanings.meaning_en: a person whose job is to serve or help people in a public place
meanings.example: a cloakroom/parking/museum attendant
meanings.example_cn: 衣帽间 / 停车服务员；博物馆接待员

meanings.meaning_en: something that happens
meanings.example: Laughter was a rare occurrence in his classroom.
meanings.example_cn: 他的课堂上难得有笑声。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who thinks they are better than people from a lower social class – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Stop being such a snob.
meanings.example_cn: 别这么势利眼。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a way that shows you think you are better than other people because you are from a higher social class or know more than they do
meanings.example: Her family seems snobbish.
meanings.example_cn: 她家里人好像挺势利的。

meanings.meaning_en: the power to make other people agree with your opinions or do what you want
meanings.example: He used his influence to get his son into medical school.
meanings.example_cn: 他利用权势把儿子弄进了医学院。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or belonging to the government of a town or city
meanings.example: the municipal waste dump
meanings.example_cn: 城市垃圾场

meanings.meaning_en: to obey a law, rule etc
meanings.example: The building does not conform with safety regulations.
meanings.example_cn: 例句：这座建筑物不符合安全条例。

meanings.meaning_en: to start using computers and machines to do a job, rather than people
meanings.example: Cash machines automate two basic functions of a bank – deposits and withdrawals.
meanings.example_cn: 柜员机使银行的两个基本功能——存款和取款自动化了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make sb/sth change direction
meanings.example: Northbound traffic will have to be diverted onto minor roads.
meanings.example_cn: 北行车辆将不得不绕次要道路行驶。

meanings.meaning_en: to limit all or most of your study, business etc to a particular subject or activity
meanings.example: Simmons specialized in contract law.
meanings.example_cn: 西蒙斯专攻合同法。

meanings.meaning_en: to risk sth or put it in danger
meanings.example: Careless drivers hazard other people's lives as well as their own.
meanings.example_cn: 粗心大意的驾驶者拿他人和自己的生命冒险。

meanings.meaning_en: something that may be dangerous, or cause accidents or problems
meanings.example: Polluted water sources are a hazard to wildlife.
meanings.example_cn: 受污染的水源会对野生生物构成危险。

meanings.meaning_en: to make all the things of one particular type the same as each other
meanings.example: Attempts to standardize English spelling have never been successful.
meanings.example_cn: 统一英语拼写的尝试从未成功过。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something longer or to become longer
meanings.example: Can you lengthen this skirt for me?
meanings.example_cn: 你能不能帮我把这条裙子改长？

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel ashamed
meanings.example: It shames me to say it, but I lied.
meanings.example_cn: 说出来真难为情，我撒谎了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something look or feel clean, new, attractive, cool etc
meanings.example: Using a mouthwash freshens the breath.
meanings.example_cn: 使用漱口液可以使口气清新。

meanings.meaning_en: to be the thing that makes someone or something different or special
meanings.example: The factor that distinguishes this company from the competition is customer service.
meanings.example_cn: 使这家公司在竞争中脱颖而出的是其客户服务。

meanings.meaning_en: if a liquid evaporates, or if heat evaporates it, it changes into a gas
meanings.example: Most of the water had evaporated.
meanings.example_cn: 大部分的水都蒸发了。

meanings.meaning_en: to let fresh air into a room, building etc
meanings.example: Ventilate the room properly when stripping paint.
meanings.example_cn: 在刮漆的时候要适当地使房间通风。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten a ship or boat to the land or to the bottom of the sea using ropes or an anchor
meanings.example: Two or three fishing boats were moored alongside the pier.
meanings.example_cn: 有两三艘渔船停泊在码头边。

meanings.meaning_en: to make yourself accept something that is bad but cannot be changed
meanings.example: Josh resigned himself to the long walk home.
meanings.example_cn: 乔希只好走很长的路回家。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something as good as you are able to
meanings.example: Mock trials help students perfect their legal skills.
meanings.example_cn: 模拟庭审有助于学生们完善自己的法律技能。

meanings.meaning_en: to make sb share a particular feeling
meanings.example: Lucy’s enthusiasm soon infected the rest of the class.
meanings.example_cn: 露西的热情很快就感染了班里的其他人。

meanings.meaning_en: to put a lubricant on something in order to make it move more smoothly
meanings.example: Lubricate all moving parts with grease.
meanings.example_cn: 给所有活动部件加润滑油。

meanings.meaning_en: to become or to make sb/sth more sympathetic and less severe or critical
meanings.example: The government has softened its stance on public spending.
meanings.example_cn: 政府对公共开支问题的态度软化了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make an action or a process possible or easier
meanings.example: The new trade agreement should facilitate more rapid economic growth.
meanings.example_cn: 新贸易协定应当会加快经济发展。

meanings.meaning_en: to make sb/yourself familiar with or aware of sth
meanings.example: Have steps been taken to acquaint breeders with their right to apply for licenses?
meanings.example_cn: 已经采取措施让饲养动物者了解他们申请执照的权利了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel annoyed or impatient
meanings.example: the whole tiresome business of filling out the forms
meanings.example_cn: 填写表格这套烦人事

meanings.meaning_en: very sad
meanings.example: a sorrowful expression
meanings.example_cn: 悲伤的表情

meanings.meaning_en: to burn very brightly and strongly
meanings.example: The room was warm, with a fire blazing in the hearth.
meanings.example_cn: 房间里暖融融的，壁炉里的火熊熊燃烧。

meanings.meaning_en: to bring sb/sth under control, especially by using force
meanings.example: Senior government officials admit they have not been able to subdue the rebels.
meanings.example_cn: 高级政府官员们承认他们还没能制服反叛者们。

meanings.meaning_en: to render submissive
to be acceptable, suitable, or convenient for a particular person or in a particular situation
meanings.example: Whatever your reason for borrowing, we have the loan that suits your needs.
meanings.example_cn: 不管您因何贷款，我们都会有满足您需要的贷款。

meanings.meaning_en: (of problems or a difficult situation) to appear and need to be dealt with by sb
meanings.example: The problems confronting the new government were enormous.
meanings.example_cn: 新政府面临的难题是巨大的。

meanings.meaning_en: if something paralyses you, it makes you lose the ability to move part or all of your body, or to feel it
meanings.example: Her legs were partly paralysed in the crash.
meanings.example_cn: 在撞车事故中她的双腿部分瘫痪。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone go deaf
meanings.example: He was deafened by the noise from the gun.
meanings.example_cn: 枪声把他震聋了。

meanings.meaning_en: to force a country or group of people to be ruled by you, and control them very strictly
meanings.example: The Roman Empire subjected most of Europe to its rule.
meanings.example_cn: 罗马帝国把欧洲多数地区置于自己的统治之下。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone extremely afraid
meanings.example: Her husband’s violence terrified her.
meanings.example_cn: 丈夫的暴力行为让她感到害怕。

meanings.meaning_en: to cover or protect something with a material that stops electricity, sound, heat etc from getting in or out
meanings.example: an insulated attic
meanings.example_cn: 隔热[隔音]的阁楼

meanings.meaning_en: to combine two or more things so that they work together; to combine with sth else in this way
meanings.example: These programs can be integrated with your existing software.
meanings.example_cn: 这些程序能和你的已有的软件整合成一体。

meanings.meaning_en: to make things or people follow one after the other in a repeated pattern
meanings.example: Alternate cubes of meat and slices of red pepper.
meanings.example_cn: 交替放置肉丁和红辣椒片。

meanings.meaning_en: (of two things) happening or following one after the other regularly
meanings.example: alternate layers of fruit and cream
meanings.example_cn: 水果层和奶油层相间

meanings.meaning_en: to treat someone without respect and make them lose respect for themselves
meanings.example: a movie that degrades women
meanings.example_cn: 贬损女性的影片

meanings.meaning_en: to reduce something that is difficult, dangerous, or unpleasant to the smallest possible amount or degree
meanings.example: Every effort is being made to minimize civilian casualties.
meanings.example_cn: 正在尽最大努力减少平民伤亡。

meanings.meaning_en: to combine or make one thing combine with another
meanings.example: The sounds of laughter and singing mingled in the evening air.
meanings.example_cn: 笑声和歌声交织在夜空中。

meanings.meaning_en: to connect similar things; to be connected to or with similar things
meanings.example: a series of interconnected lakes
meanings.example_cn: 一连串相互连接的湖泊

meanings.meaning_en: to make people become friends again after an argument or a disagreement
meanings.example: The pair were reconciled after Jackson made a public apology.
meanings.example_cn: 杰克逊公开道歉之后，这两个人又言归于好了。

meanings.meaning_en: To oblige someone means to be helpful to them by doing what they have asked you to do.
meanings.example: If you ever need help with the babysitting, I'd be glad to oblige...
meanings.example_cn: 如果你什么时候需要找人照看孩子，我很乐意帮忙。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone richer
meanings.example: a nation enriched by oil revenues
meanings.example_cn: 靠石油收入富裕起来的国家

meanings.meaning_en: to cause problems or difficulties for sb
meanings.example: The speech was deliberately designed to embarrass the prime minister.
meanings.example_cn: 这个发言是故意为难首相。

meanings.meaning_en: to be slowly destroyed by a natural chemical process, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Her body was already starting to decay.
meanings.example_cn: 她的尸体已经开始腐烂。

meanings.meaning_en: to compare two things, ideas, people etc to show how different they are from each other
meanings.example: an essay comparing and contrasting (= showing how two things are similar and different ) Verdi and Wagner and their operas
meanings.example_cn: 把威尔第和瓦格纳以及他们的歌剧进行比较和对照的一篇文章

meanings.meaning_en: to confuse sb completely; to be too difficult or strange for sb to understand or explain
meanings.example: The question baffled me completely.
meanings.example_cn: 这个问题把我彻底难倒了。

meanings.meaning_en: to become fully grown or developed
meanings.example: As the fish matures, its colours and patternings change.
meanings.example_cn: 随着发育成熟，这种鱼的颜色和斑纹都会改变。

meanings.meaning_en: to put too many things or people on or into something
meanings.example: Be careful not to overload the washing machine.
meanings.example_cn: 注意别让洗衣机负荷过重。

meanings.meaning_en: to become twisted together, or make something become twisted together, in an untidy mass
meanings.example: My hair tangles easily.
meanings.example_cn: 我的头发很容易打结。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something sweeter, or become sweeter
meanings.example: Sweeten the mixture with a little honey.
meanings.example_cn: 往混合料里加点蜂蜜。

meanings.meaning_en: to become thick, or make something thick
meanings.example: The fog was beginning to thicken.
meanings.example_cn: 雾气渐浓。

meanings.meaning_en: to make people accept that you can do something, or that you have a particular quality
meanings.example: He’d already begun to establish quite a reputation as a journalist.
meanings.example_cn: 身为记者，他已经声名鹊起。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a photograph out of a photographic film, using chemicals
meanings.example: Did you ever get the pictures developed ?
meanings.example_cn: 你到底有没有把照片冲洗出来？

meanings.meaning_en: to run slowly and steadily, especially as a way of exercising
meanings.example: I go jogging every morning.
meanings.example_cn: 我每天早晨都去慢跑。

meanings.meaning_en: if you engage part of a machine, or if it engages, it moves so that it fits into another part of the machine
meanings.example: She engaged the clutch and the car moved.
meanings.example_cn: 她踩下离合器，汽车便开动了。

meanings.meaning_en: a quantity such as force that has a direction as well as size
meanings.example: Acceleration and velocity are both vectors.
meanings.example_cn: 加速度和速度都是矢量。

meanings.meaning_en: the food and other substances that people and other living things need to live, grow, and stay healthy
meanings.example: lack of proper nourishment
meanings.example_cn: 缺乏适当的营养

meanings.meaning_en: a very small room in a house where food is kept
relating to experiments
meanings.example: data obtained experimentally
meanings.example_cn: 实验获得的数据

meanings.meaning_en: the process of performing scientific tests to find out if a particular idea is true or to obtain more information
meanings.example: The issue of animal experimentation is an emotive subject.
meanings.example_cn: 动物实验问题是个敏感的话题。

meanings.meaning_en: almost or very nearly the thing described, so that any slight difference is not important
meanings.example: The country was sliding into a state of virtual civil war.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家实际上正逐渐进入内战状态。

meanings.meaning_en: a process in which you do something that has been carefully planned
meanings.example: the formulation and execution of urban policy
meanings.example_cn: 城市政策的制定与实施

meanings.meaning_en: a hard mineral substance that is used in making electronic watches and clocks
meanings.example: quartz crystals
meanings.example_cn: 石英晶体

meanings.meaning_en: a soft black substance that is a kind of carbon , used in pencils, paints, and electrical equipment
a white liquid mixture used especially for painting walls
meanings.example: Investigators are accused of whitewashing the governor’s record.
meanings.example_cn: 调查者被指责粉饰州长的政绩。

meanings.meaning_en: to hide the true facts about a serious accident or illegal action
a type of rock that contains calcium
meanings.example: ...high limestone cliffs.
meanings.example_cn: …高耸的石灰岩峭壁。

meanings.meaning_en: the amount of water contained in the air
meanings.example: The room is kept at 72 degrees and 50% relative humidity.
meanings.example_cn: 房间的温度保持在72度，相对湿度50%。

meanings.meaning_en: money or goods that are given to someone, for example because they are poor
meanings.example: people who have to live on handouts from the state
meanings.example_cn: 必须依赖国家发放的救济金生活的人们

meanings.meaning_en: words arranged in the form of poetry
meanings.example: a book of comic verse
meanings.example_cn: 一本滑稽诗集

meanings.meaning_en: when someone does not have a job
meanings.example: Closure of the plant means 80 workers are facing unemployment.
meanings.example_cn: 这家工厂的关闭意味着 80 个工人面临失业。

meanings.meaning_en: the loss of other people’s respect because you have done something they strongly disapprove of
meanings.example: Smith faced total public disgrace after the incident.
meanings.example_cn: 事情发生之后，史密斯声名狼藉。

meanings.meaning_en: remaining after a process, event etc is finished
meanings.example: the residual effects of drug treatment
meanings.example_cn: 药物治疗的残留作用

meanings.meaning_en: the part of something that is left after everything else has gone or been dealt with
meanings.example: The remainder must be paid by the end of June.
meanings.example_cn: 剩余款项必须在6月底之前支付。

meanings.meaning_en: to do something very well, or much better than most people
meanings.example: Rick has always excelled at foreign languages.
meanings.example_cn: 里克一向擅长外语。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a person or their behaviour) not friendly or relaxed
meanings.example: Their goodbyes were stiff and formal.
meanings.example_cn: 他们的道别生硬刻板。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which plants, animals, and people are related to each other and to their environment, or the scientific study of this
meanings.example: the natural ecology of the Earth
meanings.example_cn: 地球的自然生态

meanings.meaning_en: an animal’s skin, especially when it has been removed to be used for leather
meanings.example: ox hide gloves
meanings.example_cn: 牛皮手套

meanings.meaning_en: full of energy in a way that is exciting and attractive
meanings.example: Rodgers and Hart’s music sounds as fresh and vital as the day it was written.
meanings.example_cn: 罗杰斯与哈特的音乐现在听来还有刚写成时的那份清新和活力。

meanings.meaning_en: a person, company, or country that makes or grows goods, foods, or materials
meanings.example: ...Saudi Arabia, the world's leading oil producer.
meanings.example_cn: …沙特阿拉伯，世界上最重要的石油生产国。

meanings.meaning_en: the rate at which goods are produced, and the amount produced, especially in relation to the work, time, and money needed to produce them
meanings.example: high productivity levels in manufacturing
meanings.example_cn: 制造业中的高生产率

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the production of goods, crops, or wealth
meanings.example: the economy’s productive capacity
meanings.example_cn: 该经济体的生产能力

meanings.meaning_en: to raise, lift, or pull something up, especially using ropes
meanings.example: The crew hurried to hoist the flag.
meanings.example_cn: 船员们急忙把旗子升起来。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two organs in your lower back that separate waste products from your blood and make urine
meanings.example: a kidney transplant
meanings.example_cn: 肾脏移植

meanings.meaning_en: done in a way that is intended or planned
meanings.example: He deliberately upset her.
meanings.example_cn: 他故意惹她不开心。

meanings.meaning_en: to examine books, films, letters etc to remove anything that is considered offensive, morally harmful, or politically dangerous etc
meanings.example: The information given to the press was carefully censored by the Ministry of Defence.
meanings.example_cn: 发布给报界的信息经过了国防部的仔细审查。

meanings.meaning_en: a story, film, or play about a murder, in which you are not told who the murderer is until the end
meanings.example: an Agatha Christie mystery
meanings.example_cn: 一部阿加莎•克里斯蒂的悬疑小说

meanings.meaning_en: a place that is connected with a holy event or holy person, and that people visit to pray
meanings.example: his pilgrimage to the shrine of St John
meanings.example_cn: 他去敬奉圣约翰的圣地朝圣

meanings.meaning_en: coming from or relating to God or a god
meanings.example: divine power
meanings.example_cn: 神的力量

meanings.meaning_en: deliberate speech, thought, or movement is slow and careful
meanings.example: He approached her with slow, deliberate steps.
meanings.example_cn: 他迈着缓慢、从容的步子向她走去。

meanings.meaning_en: showing great knowledge and understanding
meanings.example: a profound question
meanings.example_cn: 深刻的问题

meanings.meaning_en: a long narrow hole dug into the surface of the ground
meanings.example: Workers dug a trench for gas lines.
meanings.example_cn: 工人们挖了一条沟来铺设煤气管道。

meanings.meaning_en: the art, profession, or method of producing photographs or the scenes in films
meanings.example: He did fashion photography for ‘Vogue’ magazine.
meanings.example_cn: 他为《时尚》杂志拍过时装照片。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of writing in a newspaper that gives the editor’s opinion about something, rather than reporting facts
meanings.example: In an editorial, The New York Times suggests the victory could turn nasty.
meanings.example_cn: 在一篇社论中，《纽约时报》认为该胜利会转成恶梦。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of societies and the behaviour of people in groups
meanings.example: She has a degree in sociology and politics.
meanings.example_cn: 她拥有社会学和政治学学位。

meanings.meaning_en: to form an idea, a plan, etc. in your mind; to imagine sth
meanings.example: He conceived the idea of transforming the old power station into an arts centre.
meanings.example_cn: 他想出了一个把旧发电站改造为艺术中心的主意。

meanings.meaning_en: to throw away something that has just been made, because its quality is not good enough
meanings.example: If inspectors find a defective can, the batch is rejected.
meanings.example_cn: 如果质检员发现一个罐头有瑕疵，那么这一批货就会被废弃。

meanings.meaning_en: a snake, especially a large one
meanings.example: ...the serpent in the Garden of Eden.
meanings.example_cn: …伊甸园里的那条蛇。

meanings.meaning_en: spending or costing a lot of money, especially more than is necessary or more than you can afford
meanings.example: Would it be too extravagant to buy both?
meanings.example_cn: 把两个都买下会不会太奢侈了？

meanings.meaning_en: a woman or girl who is not married
a young girl, or a woman who is not married
meanings.example: ...stories of noble princes and their brave deeds on behalf of beautiful maidens.
meanings.example_cn: …高贵的王子以及他们英雄救美的故事。

meanings.meaning_en: to burn and slightly damage a surface by making it too hot; to be slightly burned by heat
meanings.example: I scorched my dress when I was ironing it.
meanings.example_cn: 我把自己的连衣裙熨焦了。

meanings.meaning_en: the words that come just before and after a word or sentence and that help you understand its meaning
meanings.example: The meaning of ‘mad’ depends on its context.
meanings.example_cn: mad一词的意义要视上下文而定。

meanings.meaning_en: advice
meanings.example: Listen to the counsel of your elders.
meanings.example_cn: 要听从长辈的忠告。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys and sells goods or services, especially in a shop
meanings.example: Local tradesmen are objecting to plans for a big new out-of-town shopping centre.
meanings.example_cn: 当地的店主们反对在城郊新建大型购物中心的计划。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys and sells goods or stocks
meanings.example: a small trader who sells hats in Oxford
meanings.example_cn: 在牛津卖帽子的小贩

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys and sells a particular product, especially an expensive one
meanings.example: ...an antique dealer.
meanings.example_cn: …一位古董商。

meanings.meaning_en: objects made of the material or in the way or place mentioned
meanings.example: ceramic ware
meanings.example_cn: 陶瓷制品

meanings.meaning_en: goods that are being sold
meanings.example: A range of official Disney merchandise was on sale.
meanings.example_cn: 一系列正版的迪士尼商品在出售。

meanings.meaning_en: sad and without hope
meanings.example: I’ve been feeling kind of blue.
meanings.example_cn: 我心情不大好。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being good
meanings.example: the desire to see goodness and justice in the world
meanings.example_cn: 对善良和正义的向往

meanings.meaning_en: clothes that you wear next to your body under your other clothes
meanings.example: You just need to take a change of underwear.
meanings.example_cn: 你只需带一套换洗的内衣。

meanings.meaning_en: to decide that something that was officially planned will not happen
meanings.example: Our flight was cancelled.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的航班取消了。

meanings.meaning_en: a big difference between two situations, amounts, groups of people etc
meanings.example: the widening gap between the rich and the poor
meanings.example_cn: 越来越大的贫富差距

meanings.meaning_en: to put flour, sugar etc through a sieve or similar container in order to remove large pieces
meanings.example: Sift the flour and baking powder into a medium-sized mixing bowl.
meanings.example_cn: 把面粉和发酵粉筛到一个中号搅拌碗中。

meanings.meaning_en: a large sea fish with several rows of very sharp teeth that is considered to be dangerous to humans
meanings.example: Sharks were circling around our boat.
meanings.example_cn: 鲨鱼在我们的小船周围游弋。

meanings.meaning_en: small stones, used to make a surface for paths, roads etc
meanings.example: a gravel path
meanings.example_cn: 石子小道

meanings.meaning_en: a small young fish that is often packed in flat metal boxes when it is sold as food
meanings.example: commuters packed like sardines on the evening train
meanings.example_cn: 晚班火车上挤得像沙丁鱼一样的通勤乘客

meanings.meaning_en: one of the many types of a particular colour, each slightly darker, lighter, brighter etc than the next
meanings.example: Perhaps a darker tone would be better.
meanings.example_cn: 可能再深一点的色调更好。

meanings.meaning_en: a medical test in which a special machine produces a picture of something inside your body
meanings.example: The scan showed that she was expecting twins.
meanings.example_cn: 扫描显示她怀了双胞胎。

meanings.meaning_en: a lot of noise or angry protest about something
meanings.example: The announcement caused uproar in the crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 公告在人群中引起了一阵骚动。

meanings.meaning_en: language in its usual form, as opposed to poetry
meanings.example: Shute's prose is stark and chillingly unsentimental.
meanings.example_cn: 舒特的散文刻板而冷峻。

meanings.meaning_en: the production or sending out of light, heat, gas, etc.
meanings.example: the emission of carbon dioxide into the atmosphere
meanings.example_cn: 向大气排放二氧化碳

meanings.meaning_en: a slow relaxed walk
meanings.example: After dinner, I took a stroll round the city.
meanings.example_cn: 晚饭后，我绕着城溜达了一圈。

meanings.meaning_en: shaped like a triangle
meanings.example: a triangular roof
meanings.example_cn: 一个三角形的屋顶

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of metal, rubber etc that you place over or into a musical instrument to make it sound softer
meanings.example: He was playing his trumpet with a mute.
meanings.example_cn: 他正在吹装了弱音器的小号。

meanings.meaning_en: the person or thing that someone chooses
meanings.example: I think London was a good choice as a venue.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得伦敦是个很好的选址。

meanings.meaning_en: (especially of food) of very good quality
meanings.example: choice steak
meanings.example_cn: 上等牛排

meanings.meaning_en: allowing people to do, say, or believe what they want without criticizing or punishing them
meanings.example: a tolerant society
meanings.example_cn: 宽容的社会

meanings.meaning_en: a product that is bought and sold
meanings.example: agricultural commodities
meanings.example_cn: 农业商品

meanings.meaning_en: happening as a normal part of a job or process
meanings.example: You mustn’t worry. These are just routine enquiries.
meanings.example_cn: 你不必担心，这只是例行的询问。

meanings.meaning_en: the usual order in which you do things, or the things you regularly do
meanings.example: John’s departure had upset their daily routine.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰的离去打乱了他们的日常生活。

meanings.meaning_en: an important job, piece of work, or activity that you are responsible for
meanings.example: Starting a new business can be a risky undertaking.
meanings.example_cn: 创办新企业有时是一件有风险的事情。

meanings.meaning_en: to think of something in a particular way or as having a particular quality
meanings.example: French and German were deemed essential.
meanings.example_cn: 法语和德语被认为是必需的。

meanings.meaning_en: to begin to realize the possible effects of a situation
meanings.example: Artists finally awoke to the aesthetic possibilities of photography.
meanings.example_cn: 艺术家终于意识到了摄影的美学潜质。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of knowing someone or something because you have known or learned about them in the past
meanings.example: He stared at her, but there was no sign of recognition .
meanings.example_cn: 他盯着她看，但似乎没认出她来。

meanings.meaning_en: official papers or cards, such as your passport, that prove who you are
meanings.example: Do you have any identification?
meanings.example_cn: 你有什么身份证明文件吗？

meanings.meaning_en: being kind to people and forgiving them rather than punishing them or being cruel
meanings.example: Merciful God, save us.
meanings.example_cn: 仁慈的上帝，救救我们吧。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is kept as a prisoner by an enemy so that the other side will do what the enemy demands
meanings.example: The group are holding two tourists hostage (= keeping them as hostages ) .
meanings.example_cn: 这伙人挟持了两名游客作为人质。

meanings.meaning_en: a black, sticky substance that is used on roofs, the bottoms of ships etc to stop water coming through
meanings.example: The timbers of similar houses were painted with pitch.
meanings.example_cn: 类似房屋所用的栋木刷了沥青。

meanings.meaning_en: the department in a company that chooses people for jobs and deals with their complaints, problems etc
meanings.example: A copy should then be sent to Personnel for our files.
meanings.example_cn: 然后必须送一份到人事部供我们存档。

meanings.meaning_en: people in general
meanings.example: We want a clean healthy environment for all humanity .
meanings.example_cn: 我们希望全人类拥有一个干净健康的生存环境。

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s character, especially the way they behave towards other people
meanings.example: Despite their different personalities, they became the best of friends.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管个性不同，他们还是成了最好的朋友。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or caused by heat
meanings.example: thermal energy
meanings.example_cn: 热能

meanings.meaning_en: one of the two imaginary lines around the world, either the Tropic of Cancer which is 23.5˚ north of the  equator  , or the Tropic of Capricorn which is 23.5˚ south of the equator
meanings.example: the Tropic of Capricorn/the Tropic of Cancer
meanings.example_cn: 南/北回归线

meanings.meaning_en: coming from or existing in the hottest parts of the world
meanings.example: the tropical rain forests
meanings.example_cn: 热带雨林

meanings.meaning_en: something that you allow someone to have in order to end an argument or a disagreement
meanings.example: The British were not prepared to make any concessions .
meanings.example_cn: 英国人没有打算作出让步。

meanings.meaning_en: the process of burning
meanings.example: The energy is released by combustion on the application of a match.
meanings.example_cn: 能量通过点火柴燃烧释放出来。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the hairs that grow on a man’s face
meanings.example: ...wild, savage-looking fellows, with large whiskers and dirty faces.
meanings.example_cn: …一些狂野、面相凶恶的家伙，留着满脸的络腮胡子，蓬头垢面。

meanings.meaning_en: to go or gather together somewhere in large numbers
meanings.example: People have been flocking to the exhibition.
meanings.example_cn: 看展览的人络绎不绝。
