meanings.meaning_en: the feeling of being sure about something and having no doubts
meanings.example: It was a reasonable explanation, but his voice lacked conviction .
meanings.example_cn: 这解释合情合理，只是他的语气不坚定。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact that something is certain to happen
meanings.example: the certainty of being caught
meanings.example_cn: 被抓的必然

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that something is true, especially when this seems surprising
meanings.example: Some holiday destinations are positively dangerous .
meanings.example_cn: 有些度假地真的很危险。

meanings.meaning_en: to calculate the value of something and express it as a number or an amount
meanings.example: an attempt to quantify the region’s social and economic decline
meanings.example_cn: 对该地区社会和经济衰退进行量化的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: not containing or having enough of something
meanings.example: Women who are dieting can become iron deficient.
meanings.example_cn: 节食的女性有可能缺铁。

meanings.meaning_en: a lack of something that is necessary
meanings.example: a deficiency of safe play areas for children
meanings.example_cn: 儿童安全游戏场地的缺乏

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which there is not enough of something
meanings.example: the scarcity of employment opportunities
meanings.example_cn: 就业机会的短缺

meanings.meaning_en: a mistake, mark, or weakness that makes something imperfect
meanings.example: A design flaw (= a mistake or weakness in the way something was made ) caused the engine to explode.
meanings.example_cn: 一个设计缺陷导致了引擎爆炸。

meanings.meaning_en: to persuade someone to do something, especially something that does not seem wise
meanings.example: Nothing would induce me to vote for him again.
meanings.example_cn: 没有什么能诱使我再投他的票了。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of persuading someone to do something
meanings.example: After a little gentle persuasion , Debbie agreed to let us in.
meanings.example_cn: 好言劝说了几句后，黛比就同意让我们进去了。

meanings.meaning_en: a right to do something or to have something, especially because it belongs to you or because you deserve it
meanings.example: The Maldives pressed its claim to hold the summit.
meanings.example_cn: 马尔代夫一再要求主办这场峰会。

meanings.meaning_en: used about someone who has died fairly recently
meanings.example: Billy Hicks, late of this parish
meanings.example_cn: 不久前故去的本教区的比利·希克斯

meanings.meaning_en: to remove an object from somewhere, especially with difficulty
meanings.example: You’ll have to have that tooth extracted.
meanings.example_cn: 你得把那颗牙拔掉。

meanings.meaning_en: a short piece of writing, music etc taken from a particular book, piece of music etc
meanings.example: Oils are extracted from the plants.
meanings.example_cn: 从这些植物中提炼出油。

meanings.meaning_en: a handle on a piece of equipment, that you can turn in order to move something
meanings.example: He was idly turning a crank on a strange mechanism strapped to his chest.
meanings.example_cn: 他漫不经心地转着绑在他胸前的一个古怪装置上面的曲柄。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something move by turning a crank
meanings.example: Try cranking the engine.
meanings.example_cn: 试试用曲轴发动引擎。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially force someone to leave a school or organization
meanings.example: Two girls were expelled from school for taking drugs.
meanings.example_cn: 两名女生因吸毒而被学校开除。

meanings.meaning_en: to gradually become less or weaker before disappearing completely, or to make something do this
meanings.example: As he thought it over, his anger gradually dissipated.
meanings.example_cn: 他想明白后，怒气就渐渐消了。

meanings.meaning_en: having the shape of a sphere
meanings.example: ...purple and gold spherical earrings.
meanings.example_cn: ...紫色和金色的球形耳环。

meanings.meaning_en: affecting or including the whole world
meanings.example: global climate change
meanings.example_cn: 全球气候变化

meanings.meaning_en: the planet that is fifth in order from the sun and is the largest in the solar system
meanings.example: a space probe on its way to Jupiter
meanings.example_cn: 飞向木星的一个太空探测器

meanings.meaning_en: a request that is urgent or full of emotion
meanings.example: Caldwell made a plea for donations.
meanings.example_cn: 考德威尔恳求捐款。

meanings.meaning_en: a written request signed by a lot of people, asking someone in authority to do something or change something
meanings.example: Local residents have drawn up a petition to protest the hospital closure.
meanings.example_cn: 当地居民已草拟了一份请愿书，抗议关闭医院。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask the government or an organization to do something by sending them a petition
meanings.example: Villagers petitioned the local authority to provide better bus services.
meanings.example_cn: 村民请愿要求地方当局提供更好的公共汽车服务。

meanings.meaning_en: something you can see
meanings.example: the sights and sounds of the forest
meanings.example_cn: 森林的景致与声音

meanings.meaning_en: a woman that a man has a sexual relationship with, even though he is married to someone else
meanings.example: The Prince had shocked society by living openly with his mistress.
meanings.example_cn: 王子和他的情妇公开同居，让社会大为震惊。

meanings.meaning_en: a building in which Muslims worship
meanings.example: Would you go to church or the synagogue or the mosque?
meanings.example_cn: 你会去教堂，犹太教会，或者清真寺吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the practice of keeping yourself or the things around you clean
meanings.example: a high standard of cleanliness
meanings.example_cn: 很高的卫生标准

meanings.meaning_en: a movement made down towards the ground
meanings.example: She greeted Maggie with an inclination of the head.
meanings.example_cn: 她向玛吉点头打招呼。

meanings.meaning_en: a series of quick sharp hits or knocks
meanings.example: She was woken by a sharp rap on the door.
meanings.example_cn: 她被一阵急促的敲门声惊醒。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit or knock something quickly several times
meanings.example: She rapped the table with her pen.
meanings.example_cn: 她用笔笃笃地敲桌子。

meanings.meaning_en: (of people or their actions) doing sth that may not be sensible without first thinking about the possible results; done in this way
meanings.example: Please Jessie, don’t do anything rash.
meanings.example_cn: 求你了，杰西，不要草率行事。

meanings.meaning_en: the dark reddish brown colour of bronze
meanings.example: Her hair shone bronze and gold.
meanings.example_cn: 她的头发闪耀着青铜色和金黄色的光彩。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is industrious works hard
meanings.example: She was an industrious and willing worker.
meanings.example_cn: 她是个勤劳肯干的工人。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of great respect and liking for something or someone
meanings.example: Daniel gazed at her in admiration .
meanings.example_cn: 丹尼尔用爱慕的眼神注视着她。

meanings.meaning_en: pleasant
meanings.example: We spent a most agreeable couple of hours.
meanings.example_cn: 我们非常愉快地度过了几个小时。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the parts that something such as an object or place is divided into
meanings.example: The plane’s tail section was found in a cornfield.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机的尾部在玉米田里找到了。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of something that is different from or affected differently from the whole in some way
meanings.example: segments of the population
meanings.example_cn: 人口中的若干组成部分

meanings.meaning_en: to make a straight narrow cut in cloth, paper, skin etc
meanings.example: They say somebody slit her throat.
meanings.example_cn: 他们说有人割断了她的喉咙。

meanings.meaning_en: a long straight narrow cut or hole
meanings.example: light shining through a slit in the door
meanings.example_cn: 透过门缝照进来的光线

meanings.meaning_en: strong and healthy and able to bear difficult living conditions
meanings.example: hardy mountain goats
meanings.example_cn: 能适应恶劣环境的石山羊

meanings.meaning_en: that must be done because of a law or a rule
meanings.example: the threat of compulsory redundancies
meanings.example_cn: 强制性裁员的威胁

meanings.meaning_en: something that limits your freedom to do what you want
meanings.example: the constraints of family life
meanings.example_cn: 家庭生活的约束

meanings.meaning_en: very strong and powerful, or very big and impressive
meanings.example: the mighty Mississippi river
meanings.example_cn: 浩荡的密西西比河

meanings.meaning_en: not thinking about the needs and feelings of other people, especially because you are thinking about what you want
meanings.example: a selfish and thoughtless man
meanings.example_cn: 自私而不顾他人的人

meanings.meaning_en: to express strong disapproval of someone or something, especially in public
meanings.example: The group denounced the failure by the authorities to take action.
meanings.example_cn: 该团体谴责当局没有采取行动。

meanings.meaning_en: having strong religious beliefs, and showing this in the way you behave
meanings.example: He was a quiet, pious man.
meanings.example_cn: 他是个文静、虔诚的人。

meanings.meaning_en: a wide passage or large hall just inside the entrance to a public building
meanings.example: a hotel lobby
meanings.example_cn: 宾馆大堂

meanings.meaning_en: (of an argument or a set of ideas) having different parts that all agree with each other
meanings.example: a well-thought-out and consistent argument
meanings.example_cn: 经过深思熟虑的、相互连贯的论点

meanings.meaning_en: someone who had your job before you started doing it
meanings.example: Kennedy’s predecessor as President was the war hero Dwight Eisenhower.
meanings.example_cn: 肯尼迪总统的前任是战争英雄德怀特·艾森豪威尔。

meanings.meaning_en: an official mark put on your passport that gives you permission to temporarily enter or leave a foreign country
meanings.example: I was still in New York, trying to get a visa to visit Russia.
meanings.example_cn: 我仍在纽约，正在办理去俄罗斯的签证。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact of not talking much about your abilities or possessions
meanings.example: ‘Anyone else would have done the same thing,’ he said with typical modesty.
meanings.example_cn: 换了谁都会这么做的。”他带着一贯的谦虚说道。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a polite, kind, and generous way, especially to people of a lower rank
meanings.example: Sibyl was the most gracious, helpful, and generous person to work with.
meanings.example_cn: 西比尔非常和蔼，乐于助人，而且为人慷慨，和她共事最愉快。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a lot of people) to move from one town, country, etc. to go and live and/or work in another
meanings.example: People migrate to cities like Jakarta in search of work.
meanings.example_cn: 人们移居到雅加达这样的城市找工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring electrical power, equal to 1,000 watts
meanings.example: a prototype system which produces 25 kilowatts of power
meanings.example_cn: 一个生产25千瓦电量的样机

meanings.meaning_en: appropriate to a particular situation
meanings.example: He asked me a lot of very pertinent questions.
meanings.example_cn: 他问了我许多直接相关的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: exactly right for a particular situation or purpose
meanings.example: ‘Love at first sight’ is a very apt description of how he felt when he saw her.
meanings.example_cn: 用“一见钟情”来形容他见到她时的感觉再恰当不过。

meanings.meaning_en: a thing such as a knife, spoon etc that you use when you are cooking
meanings.example: kitchen utensils
meanings.example_cn: 厨房用具

meanings.meaning_en: a tree which grows mainly in northern countries such as Canada. Its leaves have five points and turn red or gold in autumn.
meanings.example: a maple leaf
meanings.example_cn: 枫叶

meanings.meaning_en: someone who believes in a particular system of ideas, or who supports a leader who teaches these ideas
meanings.example: Marx and his followers were convinced that capitalism would destroy itself.
meanings.example_cn: 马克思及其支持者确信资本主义将自我毁灭。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that makes very loud warning sounds, used on police cars, fire engines etc
meanings.example: the wail of the ambulance sirens
meanings.example_cn: 救护车汽笛的尖啸

meanings.meaning_en: a hotel for people who are travelling by car, where you can park your car outside your room
meanings.example: The gas station just neighbours to the motel.
meanings.example_cn: 加油站就在汽车旅馆的附近。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where motor vehicles are repaired
meanings.example: My car’s at the garage.
meanings.example_cn: 我的车正放在汽修厂修理。

meanings.meaning_en: a very wide road for travelling fast over long distances, especially between cities
meanings.example: busy/congested motorways
meanings.example_cn: 繁忙的 / 拥挤的高速公路

meanings.meaning_en: up to this time
meanings.example: a species of fish hitherto unknown in the West
meanings.example_cn: 迄今在西方还不为人知的一种鱼

meanings.meaning_en: an instrument that measures changes in the air pressure and the weather, or that calculates height above sea level
meanings.example: The barometer is falling (= showing that it will probably rain).
meanings.example_cn: 气压在下降（表示可能要下雨）。

meanings.meaning_en: to breathe quickly with short noisy breaths, for example because you have been running or because it is very hot
meanings.example: He came in panting after running up the steps.
meanings.example_cn: 他跑上台阶，气喘吁吁地走了进来。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment used to lift a heavy weight off the ground, such as a car, and support it while it is in the air
meanings.example: a hydraulic jack
meanings.example_cn: 液压千斤顶

meanings.meaning_en: a small cut on someone’s skin
meanings.example: There were deep scratches all over her face.
meanings.example_cn: 她脸上全是深深的伤痕。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the crimes that someone is charged with
meanings.example: Davis was found not guilty on all counts .
meanings.example_cn: 戴维斯受到指控的各项罪名均不成立。

meanings.meaning_en: the main or most important idea that someone is trying to tell people about in a film, book, speech etc
meanings.example: The message of the film is that good always triumphs over evil.
meanings.example_cn: 这部电影的主题思想是善良终必战胜邪恶。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone more knowledge and greater understanding about something
meanings.example: Baldwin enlightened her as to the nature of the experiment.
meanings.example_cn: 鲍德温给她讲解了这个实验的性质。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask for something in an emotional way
meanings.example: ‘Don’t go,’ I implored her.
meanings.example_cn: “不要走。”我哀求她。

meanings.meaning_en: a man with a high rank in the past who was trained to fight while riding a horse
meanings.example: knights in armour
meanings.example_cn: 身披盔甲的骑士

meanings.meaning_en: a wonderful and surprising person or thing
meanings.example: the marvels of nature/technology
meanings.example_cn: 大自然的 / 技术的奇迹

meanings.meaning_en: to be very surprised or impressed by sth
meanings.example: Everyone marvelled at his courage.
meanings.example_cn: 人人对他的勇气都惊叹不已。

meanings.meaning_en: after an event in the past
meanings.example: The book was subsequently translated into 15 languages.
meanings.example_cn: 该书后来被译成 15 种语言。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is dishonest or unfair
meanings.example: It's really a cheat, but you can use ready-made pastry if you want.
meanings.example_cn: 这东西真是骗人，但如果你愿意的话，可以用现成的油酥面团。

meanings.meaning_en: a magazine, especially one about a serious or technical subject
meanings.example: The walls would be lined with books and periodicals.
meanings.example_cn: 沿这几面墙将排放书籍和期刊。

meanings.meaning_en: at the present time
meanings.example: the products that are currently available
meanings.example_cn: 目前供应的产品

meanings.meaning_en: by everyone
meanings.example: ...a universally accepted point of view.
meanings.example_cn: …一个被普遍接受的观点。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring grain and fruit (equal in volume to 8 gallons)
meanings.example: Grains are sold by the bushel.
meanings.example_cn: 谷物论蒲式耳出售。

meanings.meaning_en: a dried  grape
meanings.example: ...homemade oatmeal with brown sugar and raisins.
meanings.example_cn: …自家煮的放有红糖和葡萄干的麦片粥。

meanings.meaning_en: a break in a bone or other hard material
meanings.example: a fracture of the leg/skull
meanings.example_cn: 腿骨 / 颅骨骨折

meanings.meaning_en: to break or crack; to make sth break or crack
meanings.example: His leg fractured in two places.
meanings.example_cn: 他的一条腿有两处骨折。

meanings.meaning_en: causing damage to people or things
meanings.example: the destructive power of modern weapons
meanings.example_cn: 现代武器的破坏力

meanings.meaning_en: without enough money to pay what you owe
meanings.example: The firm went bankrupt before the building work was completed.
meanings.example_cn: 建筑工程尚未竣工，公司就破产了。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a person, business, or country bankrupt or very poor
meanings.example: Johns had been nearly bankrupted through a failed business venture.
meanings.example_cn: 约翰斯因为商业投资失败几近破产。

meanings.meaning_en: to treat someone cruelly or unfairly over a period of time, especially because of their religious or political beliefs
meanings.example: The Puritans left England to escape being persecuted.
meanings.example_cn: 清教徒离开了英国以躲避迫害。

meanings.meaning_en: a slope
meanings.example: a steep incline
meanings.example_cn: 陡坡

meanings.meaning_en: a special type of bottle that you use to keep liquids either hot or cold, for example when travelling
meanings.example: He took out a metal flask from a canvas bag.
meanings.example_cn: 他从帆布袋里拿出了一个金属水瓶。

meanings.meaning_en: a small nail with a sharp point and a flat top
meanings.example: ...a box of carpet tacks.
meanings.example_cn: …一盒地毯钉。

meanings.meaning_en: to attach something to a wall, board etc, using a tack
meanings.example: A handwritten note was tacked to the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 一张手写便条钉在墙上。

meanings.meaning_en: a flat outdoor area next to a building or on a roof, where you can sit outside to eat, relax etc
meanings.example: Some guests recline in deck chairs on the sea-facing terrace.
meanings.example_cn: 有些客人斜躺在朝海露台的躺椅上。

meanings.meaning_en: anyone who is not a member of the military forces or the police
meanings.example: Many innocent civilians were killed during the war.
meanings.example_cn: 许多无辜的平民在战争中丧生。

meanings.meaning_en: used to describe people or things that are not military
meanings.example: It was difficult to return to civilian life after ten years in the military.
meanings.example_cn: 从军十年后重新过平民生活不容易。

meanings.meaning_en: pleasantly calm, quiet, and peaceful
meanings.example: a small tranquil village
meanings.example_cn: 宁静的小村庄

meanings.meaning_en: a problem or situation in which several things must be considered and dealt with
meanings.example: When children enter the equation , further tensions may arise within a marriage.
meanings.example_cn: 有了孩子以后，婚姻中可能出现新的矛盾。

meanings.meaning_en: a balance between different people, groups, or forces that compete with each other, so that none is stronger than the others and a situation is not likely to change suddenly
meanings.example: The government is anxious not to upset the economic equilibrium.
meanings.example_cn: 政府急切希望不要打乱经济平衡。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or existing in many places, and therefore not special or unusual
meanings.example: Car thefts are commonplace in this part of town.
meanings.example_cn: 镇上的这个地段盗车案屡见不鲜。

meanings.meaning_en: something that has been said so often that it is no longer interesting or original
meanings.example: It is a commonplace to say that Northern Ireland is a backwater in the modern Europe.
meanings.example_cn: 说北爱尔兰是现代欧洲死气沉沉的落后地区已是陈词滥调了。

meanings.meaning_en: the fact that something happens a lot
meanings.example: Businesses come and go with alarming frequency.
meanings.example_cn: 商家开张停业惊人地频繁。

meanings.meaning_en: (of land or soil) not good enough for plants to grow on it
meanings.example: Thousands of years ago the surface was barren desert.
meanings.example_cn: 很久很久以前，地面还是一片荒漠。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of wood or other light material that stays on the surface of water
meanings.example: Fishing nets are often held in position by floats.
meanings.example_cn: 渔网常常用浮子固定。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something pale or white, especially by using chemicals or the sun
meanings.example: She bleached her hair blonde.
meanings.example_cn: 她把头发漂成了金黄色。

meanings.meaning_en: a small thin piece that breaks away easily from something else
meanings.example: chocolate flakes
meanings.example_cn: 巧克力薄片

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden change in the direction that sth is moving in, usually after it has hit sth; the act of causing sth to change direction
meanings.example: the deflection of the missile away from its target
meanings.example_cn: 使导弹偏离目标

meanings.meaning_en: an unreasonable dislike and distrust of people who are different from you in some way, especially because of their race, sex, religion etc – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: Women still face prejudice in the workplace.
meanings.example_cn: 女性在职场中仍然面临歧视。

meanings.meaning_en: (of an area, a building, a room, etc.) next to or near sth
meanings.example: We stayed in adjacent rooms.
meanings.example_cn: 我们住在毗连的房间里。

meanings.meaning_en: a long loose piece of clothing without sleeves that fastens around your neck and hangs from your shoulders
meanings.example: ...a woollen cape.
meanings.example_cn: …一件羊毛披肩。

meanings.meaning_en: an argument between two people or groups because they have very different beliefs or opinions – used in news reports
meanings.example: personality/culture clash (=a situation in which two people or groups do not like each other)
meanings.example_cn: 个性/文化冲突

meanings.meaning_en: to hit something or someone that is moving in a different direction from you
meanings.example: A car and a van collided on the motorway.
meanings.example_cn: 一辆汽车和一辆小型货车在高速公路上相撞了。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the foods that you use to make a particular food or dish
meanings.example: Combine all the ingredients in a large bowl.
meanings.example_cn: 把所有食材都放在一个大碗里。

meanings.meaning_en: a metal container, like a large bullet, which is full of an explosive substance and is fired from a large gun
meanings.example: We ran for cover as shells dropped all around us.
meanings.example_cn: 周围炮弹四处飞落，我们奔跑着寻找地方躲避。

meanings.meaning_en: several large guns used together
meanings.example: an anti-aircraft battery
meanings.example_cn: 防空炮

meanings.meaning_en: a type of soft rubber with a lot of air in it, used in furniture
meanings.example: a foam mattress
meanings.example_cn: 海绵橡胶床垫

meanings.meaning_en: a tube that allows gas or liquid to flow around something rather than through it
meanings.example: a triple bypass operation
meanings.example_cn: 接三通管的手术

meanings.meaning_en: to go around a town or other busy place rather than through it
meanings.example: Interstate 8 bypasses the town to the north.
meanings.example_cn: 八号州际公路绕城向北而行。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk slowly and with difficulty because one leg is hurt or injured
meanings.example: Moreno limped off the field with a foot injury.
meanings.example_cn: 莫雷诺脚上受了伤，一瘸一拐地走出球场。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of walking in which one leg is used less than normal because it is injured or stiff
meanings.example: Young walked with a slight limp.
meanings.example_cn: 扬走路有一点跛。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk or move unsteadily, almost falling over
meanings.example: He managed to stagger home.
meanings.example_cn: 他好不容易才蹒跚着走回家。

meanings.meaning_en: to climb something or move to a higher position
meanings.example: Without a word, he began to ascend the stairs.
meanings.example_cn: 他没说一句话就上楼梯了。

meanings.meaning_en: to send someone or something somewhere for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Goods are normally dispatched within 24 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 货物一般在24小时内派送。

meanings.meaning_en: a message or report sent quickly from one military officer to another or between government officials
meanings.example: I was carrying dispatches from the ambassador.
meanings.example_cn: 我正拿着大使的急件。

meanings.meaning_en: a small group of people within a larger group, who have different ideas from the other members, and who try to get their own ideas accepted
meanings.example: struggles between the different factions within the party
meanings.example_cn: 党内的派系斗争

meanings.meaning_en: to stay nervously in the same place, especially because you are waiting for something or are not certain what to do
meanings.example: Her younger brother hovered in the background watching us.
meanings.example_cn: 她的弟弟在后面走来走去，观察着我们。

meanings.meaning_en: the process or system by which water or waste liquid flows away
meanings.example: A handful of pebbles in the bottom of a flowerpot will help drainage.
meanings.example_cn: 在花盆底下放一把鹅卵石能够帮助排水。

meanings.meaning_en: to put things in a particular order or position
meanings.example: In the dining room, team photographs were ranged along the wall.
meanings.example_cn: 餐厅里，球队的照片排列在墙上。

meanings.meaning_en: the loud sound that you make when you hit your hands together many times to show that you enjoyed something
meanings.example: Come on everyone, let’s give Tommy a clap.
meanings.example_cn: 来吧各位，我们为汤米鼓鼓掌吧。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of animal, such as a snake or lizard , whose body temperature changes according to the temperature around it, and that usually lays eggs to have babies
meanings.example: This small reptile, which measures just 10 centimeters long, can swim through the sand dunes at up to 15 centimeters per second.
meanings.example_cn: 这种身长只有10厘米小型爬行动物，可以在沙子中以最快每秒15厘米的速度游动。

meanings.meaning_en: to accidentally hear what other people are saying, when they do not know that you have heard
meanings.example: I overheard part of their conversation.
meanings.example_cn: 我碰巧听到了他们谈话的部分内容。

meanings.meaning_en: a unit for measuring electrical resistance
a woman who invites guests to a meal, a party, etc.; a woman who has people staying at her home
meanings.example: Mary was always the perfect hostess.
meanings.example_cn: 玛丽总是最殷勤的女主人。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to being female
meanings.example: traditional feminine roles
meanings.example_cn: 传统的女性角色

meanings.meaning_en: a woman who serves food and drink at the tables in a restaurant
a female being who is believed to control the world or part of it, or represents a particular quality
meanings.example: Aphrodite, goddess of love
meanings.example_cn: 爱神阿佛洛狄忒

meanings.meaning_en: a shirt for women
meanings.example: a silk blouse
meanings.example_cn: 丝质女衬衫

meanings.meaning_en: a thin metal container that is fastened to a wall and through which hot water passes to provide heat for a room
meanings.example: a central heating system with a radiator in each room
meanings.example_cn: 每个房间都配有一个散热器的中央供暖系统

meanings.meaning_en: to make a great effort to achieve something
meanings.example: I was still striving to be successful.
meanings.example_cn: 我仍在努力争取成功。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something look untidy or dirty
meanings.example: He scratched his head and messed his hair even more.
meanings.example_cn: 他挠挠头，把头发弄得更乱了。

meanings.meaning_en: the changing of something into something that is not true or not acceptable
meanings.example: a distortion of the facts
meanings.example_cn: 对事实的歪曲

meanings.meaning_en: to become shorter or make something shorter
meanings.example: The days are shortening.
meanings.example_cn: 白天变得越来越短了。

meanings.meaning_en: the planet that is sixth in order from the sun and is surrounded by large rings
meanings.example: Saturn is the second biggest planet in the solar system.
meanings.example_cn: 土星是太阳系中的第二大行星。

meanings.meaning_en: containing a lot of milk
meanings.example: a cup of milky coffee
meanings.example_cn: 一杯牛奶咖啡

meanings.meaning_en: to twist and pull something roughly from the place where it is being held
meanings.example: I wrenched the packet from his grasp.
meanings.example_cn: 我用力夺过他攥在手里的纸袋。

meanings.meaning_en: a twisting movement that pulls something violently
meanings.example: He grabbed the rope and gave it a wrench.
meanings.example_cn: 他抓住绳子猛地一拉。

meanings.meaning_en: to tightly twist a wet cloth or wet clothes in order to remove water
meanings.example: This jacket’s wringing wet!
meanings.example_cn: 这件上衣湿得都能拧出水来！

meanings.meaning_en: to look very carefully at something, especially because you are having difficulty seeing it
meanings.example: He was peering through the wet windscreen at the cars ahead.
meanings.example_cn: 他正费力地透过淋湿的风挡盯视着前方的汽车。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard silver-white metal that is often combined with other metals, for example to make steel. It is a chemical element: symbol Ni
meanings.example: a nickel alloy
meanings.example_cn: 镍合金

meanings.meaning_en: If you are someone's junior, you are younger than they are
meanings.example: She now lives with actor Denis Lawson, 10 years her junior.
meanings.example_cn: 她现在和比她小10岁的演员丹尼斯·劳森同居。

meanings.meaning_en: once a year
meanings.example: The exhibition is held annually.
meanings.example_cn: 这个展览每年举行一次。

meanings.meaning_en: able to be done; likely to be successful
meanings.example: The only practicable course of action is to sell the company.
meanings.example_cn: 唯一可行的做法是把公司卖掉。

meanings.meaning_en: the natural ability, skill, or power that makes a machine, person, or organization able to do something, especially something difficult
meanings.example: the country’s manufacturing capability
meanings.example_cn: 该国的生产能力

meanings.meaning_en: a sheltered area of water providing a safe harbour for boats
meanings.example: a yacht basin
meanings.example_cn: 停放游艇的内港

meanings.meaning_en: the inner part or inside of something
meanings.example: The interior of the church was dark.
meanings.example_cn: 教堂里很暗。

meanings.meaning_en: inside or indoors
meanings.example: The interior walls are all painted white.
meanings.example_cn: 室内墙壁都粉刷成了白色。

meanings.meaning_en: to move your fingers on a sensitive part of sb's body in a way that makes them laugh
meanings.example: Stop tickling me!
meanings.example_cn: 别挠我痒痒！

meanings.meaning_en: too strange to be believed, or very difficult to believe
meanings.example: It’s incredible that he survived the fall.
meanings.example_cn: 他跌下去竟然能够生还，真不可思议。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is difficult never seems pleased or satisfied
meanings.example: Don’t be so difficult!
meanings.example_cn: 别这么挑剔！

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been forced to leave their country, especially during a war, or for political or religious reasons
meanings.example: Refugees were streaming across the border.
meanings.example_cn: 难民正涌过边境。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large orange fruit that grows on the ground, or the inside of this fruit
meanings.example: pumpkin pie
meanings.example_cn: 南瓜饼

meanings.meaning_en: close to or relating to the North Pole or the South Pole
meanings.example: As our climate warms up, the polar ice caps will begin to melt.
meanings.example_cn: 随着地球气候逐渐变暖，极地的冰冠将开始融化。

meanings.meaning_en: having qualities considered to be typical of men or of what men do
meanings.example: They’re nice curtains, but I’d prefer something a little more masculine.
meanings.example_cn: 这些窗帘很好，但我更喜欢男性化一点的。

meanings.meaning_en: a man who is a member of a low rank of the British nobility or of a rank of European nobility
meanings.example: ...their stepfather, Baron Michael Distemple.
meanings.example_cn: …他们的继父迈克尔• 迪斯坦普尔男爵

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to continue doing something difficult or painful over a long period of time
meanings.example: She was pushed beyond her powers of endurance.
meanings.example_cn: 她被逼得忍无可忍。

meanings.meaning_en: a common silver-white metal that usually exists in combination with other substances, for example in salt. It is a chemical element: symbol Na
meanings.example: ...one level teaspoon of sodium bicarbonate powder.
meanings.example_cn: 一平茶匙碳酸氢钠粉末

meanings.meaning_en: land or a field that is covered with grass and is used for cattle, sheep etc to feed on
meanings.example: large areas of rough upland pasture
meanings.example_cn: 大片起伏的山地牧场

meanings.meaning_en: showing strong interest and attention
meanings.example: an intent gaze/look
meanings.example_cn: 专注的目光 / 神情

meanings.meaning_en: an aim or purpose, or the result you hope to achieve
meanings.example: She’ll do anything to achieve her own ends.
meanings.example_cn: 她为了实现自己的目标，什么都会去做。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of shellfish that can be eaten cooked or uncooked, and that produces a jewel called a pearl
meanings.example: He had two dozen oysters and enjoyed every one of them.
meanings.example_cn: 他吃了两打牡蛎，每一个都吃得津津有味。

meanings.meaning_en: an entertainer who performs magic tricks
meanings.example: There'll be a magician at the kids' Christmas party.
meanings.example_cn: 孩子们的圣诞聚会上会有一位魔术师。

meanings.meaning_en: a very tall modern city building
meanings.example: The skyscraper towers into the clouds.
meanings.example_cn: 那幢摩天大楼高耸入云。

meanings.meaning_en: one of several parts of a piece of computer software that does a particular job
that can be understood in more than one way; having different meanings
meanings.example: The language in the Minister’s statement is highly ambiguous.
meanings.example_cn: 部长的声明措辞很含糊。

meanings.meaning_en: to have a particular physical quality which you become aware of by touching
meanings.example: It’s nice fabric - it feels like velvet.
meanings.example_cn: 面料不错——摸上去像丝绒。

meanings.meaning_en: the things that will happen to someone in the future, especially those that cannot be changed or controlled
meanings.example: Nancy wondered whether it was her destiny to live in England and marry Melvyn.
meanings.example_cn: 南希想知道她生活在英格兰又嫁给梅尔文是不是命运的安排。

meanings.meaning_en: something very bad that is going to happen, or the fact that it is going to happen
meanings.example: A sense of impending doom (= coming very soon ) gripped her.
meanings.example_cn: 她心头被一种大难临头的感觉所笼罩。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone or something certain to fail, die, be destroyed etc
meanings.example: The plan was doomed from the start.
meanings.example_cn: 这个计划一开始就注定要失败。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement that consists of a carefully considered opinion or judgment
meanings.example: They were debating the proposition that "All people are created equal".
meanings.example_cn: 他们正就“人人生而平等”这一命题展开辩论。

meanings.meaning_en: to offer to pay a particular price for goods, especially in an auction
meanings.example: She bid £100 for a Victorian chair.
meanings.example_cn: 她出价100英镑买一把维多利亚时代的椅子。

meanings.meaning_en: noticeable
meanings.example: a sensible increase in temperature
meanings.example_cn: 温度的明显上升

meanings.meaning_en: expressed in a way that is very clear and direct
meanings.example: The contrast could not have been made more explicit.
meanings.example_cn: 这个对比再清楚不过了。

meanings.meaning_en: in a way that shows that you are very sure about a decision
meanings.example: ‘I’m not going to do it,’ said Margaret decidedly.
meanings.example_cn: “这件事我不做。” 玛格丽特坚决地说。

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which you express your thoughts and ideas
meanings.example: This is a far weaker formulation than is in the draft resolution which is being proposed.
meanings.example_cn: 这是相对于正在被提议的草拟决议要弱得多的一种表述方式。

meanings.meaning_en: a book, play, or film that is important and has been admired for a long time
meanings.example: ‘La Grande Illusion’ is one of the classics of French cinema.
meanings.example_cn: 《大幻影》是法国电影中的经典作品之一。

meanings.meaning_en: admired by many people, and having a value that has continued for a long time
meanings.example: The Coca-Cola bottle is one of the classic designs of the last century.
meanings.example_cn: 可口可乐瓶是上个世纪的经典设计之一。

meanings.meaning_en: without delay
meanings.example: A reply came very promptly.
meanings.example_cn: 马上就有了答复。

meanings.meaning_en: when a situation or subject needs to be dealt with carefully because it is secret or may offend people
meanings.example: It’s a matter of great political sensitivity.
meanings.example_cn: 这件事在政治上非常敏感。

meanings.meaning_en: a painting, sign, description etc that shows something
meanings.example: The clock in the painting is a symbolic representation of the passage of time.
meanings.example_cn: 画上的时钟象征着光阴的流逝。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where plants and trees are grown and sold
meanings.example: The garden, developed over the past 35 years, includes a nursery.
meanings.example_cn: 这个有35年历史的园子里有一个苗圃。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of removing someone from a position of power
meanings.example: the deposition of the King
meanings.example_cn: 废黜国王

meanings.meaning_en: spoken or written in secret and intended to be kept secret
meanings.example: a confidential government report
meanings.example_cn: 一份机密的政府报告

meanings.meaning_en: to attract sb strongly and make them feel very interested, excited, etc.
meanings.example: I was enchanted by the way she smiled.
meanings.example_cn: 她微笑时的样子让我着迷。

meanings.meaning_en: to attract or interest sb very much
meanings.example: The idea of travelling through time fascinates me.
meanings.example_cn: 穿越时光的想法深深吸引着我。

meanings.meaning_en: a belief that some objects or actions are lucky or unlucky, or that they cause events to happen, based on old ideas of magic
meanings.example: the old superstition that walking under a ladder is unlucky
meanings.example_cn: 认为从梯子下面穿过不吉利的古老迷信

meanings.meaning_en: to move away from the place you should be
meanings.example: Three of the soldiers strayed into enemy territory.
meanings.example_cn: 三名士兵误入敌军阵地。

meanings.meaning_en: a stray animal, such as a dog or cat, is lost or has no home
meanings.example: A stray dog came up to him.
meanings.example_cn: 一只走失的狗来到他跟前。

meanings.meaning_en: if something perplexes you, it makes you feel confused and worried because it is difficult to understand
meanings.example: Shea’s symptoms perplexed the doctors.
meanings.example_cn: 谢伊的症状令医生们困惑。

meanings.meaning_en: to confuse someone
meanings.example: He was bewildered by his daughter’s reaction.
meanings.example_cn: 他被女儿的反应弄糊涂了。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to bite sb/sth
meanings.example: The dog started snapping at my heels.
meanings.example_cn: 这条狗开始咬我的鞋跟。

meanings.meaning_en: to throw something with a lot of force, especially because you are angry
meanings.example: Demonstrators were hurling bricks through the windows.
meanings.example_cn: 示威者在向窗里掷砖块。

meanings.meaning_en: to pull something suddenly and roughly
meanings.example: She jerked open the car door and got out.
meanings.example_cn: 她猛地打开车门下了车。

meanings.meaning_en: a country that agrees to help or support another country in a war
meanings.example: a meeting of the European allies
meanings.example_cn: 欧洲盟国会议

meanings.meaning_en: the entrance to a room or building, or the area of floor or ground at the entrance
meanings.example: She opened the door and stepped across the threshold.
meanings.example_cn: 她打开门，跨过门槛。

meanings.meaning_en: a special quality someone or something has that makes people like them, feel attracted to them, or be easily influenced by them – used to show approval
meanings.example: She turned on the charm (= used her charm ) to all the men.
meanings.example_cn: 她对所有那些男人都施展魅力。

meanings.meaning_en: to attract someone and make them like you, sometimes in order to make them do something for you
meanings.example: We were charmed by the friendliness of the local people.
meanings.example_cn: 我们被当地人的友好吸引住了。

meanings.meaning_en: pleasant and attractive
meanings.example: a fair maiden
meanings.example_cn: 美丽的少女

meanings.meaning_en: very rude or insulting and likely to upset people
meanings.example: I found her remarks deeply offensive.
meanings.example_cn: 我觉得她的话令人非常恼火。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the small holes in your skin that liquid, especially sweat, can pass through, or a similar hole in the surface of a plant
meanings.example: The size of your pores is determined by the amount of oil they produce.
meanings.example_cn: 毛孔的大小取决于毛孔分泌油脂的多少。

meanings.meaning_en: anxious behaviour or activity that is usually about unimportant things
meanings.example: James said he’d better be getting back or there’d be a fuss.
meanings.example_cn: 詹姆斯说他最好回来，否则就会有人小题大做了。

meanings.meaning_en: to do things, or pay too much attention to things, that are not important or necessary
meanings.example: Stop fussing around and find something useful to do!
meanings.example_cn: 别瞎忙活了，找点有用的事干！

meanings.meaning_en: a short film that is made by photographing a series of drawings
meanings.example: a Walt Disney cartoon
meanings.example_cn: 迪斯尼动画片

meanings.meaning_en: a plant with long thin stems that attach themselves to other plants, trees, buildings etc
meanings.example: Ivy is a type of vine.
meanings.example_cn: 常青藤是一种藤本植物。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a document, an agreement, etc.) to be no longer valid because the period of time for which it could be used has ended
meanings.example: My passport expires next week.
meanings.example_cn: 我的护照下周就到期了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who buys shares because they expect prices to rise
meanings.example: The bulls argue stock prices are low and there are bargains to be had.
meanings.example_cn: 那些买空者认为股价很低，有些便宜股可以买进。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure that is built out into the water so that boats can stop next to it
meanings.example: The ship lies alongside the wharf.
meanings.example_cn: 那艘船停靠在码头边。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people and animals who travel to different places performing skilful tricks as entertainment
meanings.example: circus act (=a trick performed in a circus)
meanings.example_cn: 马戏表演

meanings.meaning_en: to remove unwanted substances from water, air etc by passing it through a special substance or piece of equipment
meanings.example: The water in the tank is constantly filtered.
meanings.example_cn: 鱼缸里的水在不停地被过滤。

meanings.meaning_en: a stupid annoying person
meanings.example: He’s a pompous ass.
meanings.example_cn: 他是头自负的蠢驴。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment consisting of two or more blades that spin around, which makes an aircraft or ship move
meanings.example: ...a fixed three-bladed propeller.
meanings.example_cn: …一个固定的三叶螺旋桨。

meanings.meaning_en: moving in a continuous curve that winds around a central point
meanings.example: A snail's shell is spiral in form.
meanings.example_cn: 蜗牛壳呈螺旋形。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of metal with a hole through the middle which is screwed onto a bolt to fasten things together
meanings.example: Use a wrench to loosen the nut.
meanings.example_cn: 用活动扳手将螺帽拧松。

meanings.meaning_en: a citizen of ancient Rome or its empire
meanings.example: When they conquered Britain, the Romans brought this custom with them.
meanings.example_cn: 当古罗马人征服不列颠时，他们把这一习俗也带了过去。

meanings.meaning_en: a long piece of writing about a particular subject that you do as part of an advanced university degree such as an MA or a PhD
meanings.example: Cynthia’s still working on her thesis.
meanings.example_cn: 辛西娅还在写论文。

meanings.meaning_en: an organization, meeting, TV programme etc where people have a chance to publicly discuss an important subject
meanings.example: the new national forum on the environment
meanings.example_cn: 新的全国性环境论坛

meanings.meaning_en: shaped like an egg
meanings.example: an oval face
meanings.example_cn: 鹅蛋脸

meanings.meaning_en: a shape like a circle, but wider in one direction than the other
meanings.example: Using 2 spoons, form the cheese into small balls or ovals.
meanings.example_cn: 用两把勺把干酪挤成小圆球状或椭圆球状。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or used in the process of recording and showing pictures on television
meanings.example: video production
meanings.example_cn: 录像制作

meanings.meaning_en: when gas, water etc leaks in or out, or the amount of it that has leaked
meanings.example: a leakage of toxic waste into the sea
meanings.example_cn: 有毒废物的泄漏入海

meanings.meaning_en: to put your arms around someone and hold them tightly to show love or friendship
meanings.example: We stood there crying and hugging each other.
meanings.example_cn: 我们站在那里哭着互相拥抱。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of putting your arms around someone and holding them tightly to show love or friendship
meanings.example: Paul gave me a big hug.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗热情地拥抱了我。

meanings.meaning_en: a staircase, especially a large or impressive one
meanings.example: ...the stairway leading to the top floor.
meanings.example_cn: …通往顶层的楼梯。

meanings.meaning_en: the complete control of trade in particular goods or the supply of a particular service; a type of goods or a service that is controlled in this way
meanings.example: In the past central government had a monopoly on television broadcasting.
meanings.example_cn: 过去，中央政府对电视节目播放实行垄断。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of leather bands put around a horse’s head and used to control its movements
a type of tree that has long thin branches and grows near water, or the wood from this tree
meanings.example: The baskets are woven from strips of willow.
meanings.example_cn: 这些篮子是用柳条编的。

meanings.example: Start with a good streamline, toes turned in and ankles slightly separated.
meanings.example_cn: 开始时保持好身体的流线, 脚尖向内,脚踝向外轻微分开。

meanings.meaning_en: a dishonest man
meanings.example: What's that old rascal been telling you?
meanings.example_cn: 那个老家伙对你都一直说些什么？

meanings.meaning_en: common at a particular time, in a particular place, or among a particular group of people
meanings.example: the prevalent belief in astrology
meanings.example_cn: 对占星术的普遍相信

meanings.meaning_en: to force someone to leave their country, especially for political reasons
meanings.example: the exiled former president
meanings.example_cn: 流亡国外的前总统

meanings.meaning_en: a person who is forced to live away from his or her own country
meanings.example: political exiles
meanings.example_cn: 政治流亡者

meanings.meaning_en: to leave dirty marks behind you as you walk
meanings.example: Which of you boys tracked mud all over the kitchen floor?
meanings.example_cn: 你们这些男孩，是谁把厨房地上踩得到处都是泥巴？

meanings.meaning_en: a record player
meanings.example: ...a wind-up gramophone with a big horn.
meanings.example_cn: ...一台带大喇叭的发条式留声机。

meanings.meaning_en: except for what has just been mentioned
meanings.example: He was tired but otherwise in good health.
meanings.example_cn: 他除了累身体很好。

meanings.meaning_en: a subject that someone knows a lot about or something that only they are responsible for
meanings.example: Computers were once the exclusive province of scientists and mathematicians.
meanings.example_cn: 计算机一度为科学家和数学家专用。

meanings.meaning_en: a government official sent to live in a foreign city to help people from his or her own country who are living or staying there
meanings.example: the British Consul in Paris
meanings.example_cn: 英国驻巴黎领事

meanings.meaning_en: the sale of goods in shops to customers, for their own use and not for selling to anyone else
meanings.example: a retail price of £8.99
meanings.example_cn: 8.99英镑的零售价

meanings.meaning_en: able to change to suit new conditions or situations
meanings.example: We can be flexible about your starting date.
meanings.example_cn: 你具体从哪天开始，我们可以灵活一点。

meanings.meaning_en: the process that takes place when sb sees or hears sth that causes them to have exciting new ideas or makes them want to create sth, especially in art, music or literature
meanings.example: Dreams can be a rich source of inspiration for an artist.
meanings.example_cn: 梦境可以成为艺术家灵感的丰富源泉。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of land with trees growing on it
meanings.example: ...an olive grove.
meanings.example_cn: …一片橄榄树丛。

meanings.meaning_en: near the place where you are or the place you are talking about
meanings.example: The fair attracted hundreds of people from the neighbouring towns and villages.
meanings.example_cn: 集市吸引了邻近城镇及村庄的好几百人前来。

meanings.meaning_en: in the area around a particular place
meanings.example: The stolen car was found in the vicinity of the station.
meanings.example_cn: 被盗汽车在车站附近被发现。

meanings.meaning_en: the division of cells into new cells as a method of reproducing cells
meanings.example: The fission of the cell could be inhibited with certain chemicals.
meanings.example_cn: 细胞裂殖可以靠某些化学制品加以抑制。

meanings.meaning_en: an animal, bird etc that is hunted and eaten by another animal
meanings.example: a tiger stalking its prey
meanings.example_cn: 潜行跟踪猎物的老虎

meanings.meaning_en: (of an animal or a bird) to hunt and kill another animal for food
meanings.example: Cats prey on birds and mice.
meanings.example_cn: 猫捕食鸟和老鼠。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who dies for their religious or political beliefs and is admired by people for this
meanings.example: St. Stephen, the first Christian martyr
meanings.example_cn: 圣司提反，第一个基督教殉道者

meanings.meaning_en: to smile widely
meanings.example: She grinned at me, her eyes sparkling.
meanings.example_cn: 她咧嘴对我笑着，两眼放光。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that you will find that someone or something has a particular quality or does a particular thing
meanings.example: I expected her to be taller than me, not shorter.
meanings.example_cn: 我曾以为她个子比我高，不会比我矮。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to amounts rather than to the quality or standard of something
meanings.example: We need to do a proper quantitative analysis of this problem.
meanings.example_cn: 我们需要对这个问题作一个正确的定量分析。

meanings.meaning_en: to become red in the face, usually because you are embarrassed
meanings.example: Wilson saw she was watching him and blushed.
meanings.example_cn: 威尔逊看到她在注视着自己，不由得脸红了。

meanings.meaning_en: the red colour on your face that appears when you are embarrassed
meanings.example: Donald felt a blush warm his cheeks.
meanings.example_cn: 唐纳德感到双颊热辣辣的。

meanings.meaning_en: a small low wave on the surface of a liquid
meanings.example: ripples on the surface of the pond
meanings.example_cn: 池面上的涟漪

meanings.meaning_en: a type of glove that does not have separate parts for each finger
meanings.example: sheepskin mittens
meanings.example_cn: 羊皮连指手套

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that you like or love someone or something and that you would be unhappy without them
meanings.example: a child’s attachment to its mother
meanings.example_cn: 孩子对母亲的依恋

meanings.meaning_en: a place where one road, track etc joins another
meanings.example: the junction of Abbot Road and Mill Street
meanings.example_cn: 阿伯特路与米尔街的交叉口

meanings.meaning_en: a smooth red-brown nut that you can eat
meanings.example: roast chestnuts
meanings.example_cn: 炒栗子

meanings.meaning_en: unusually good
meanings.example: an exceptional student
meanings.example_cn: 出类拔萃的学生

meanings.meaning_en: using the power of the sun’s light and heat
meanings.example: solar energy
meanings.example_cn: 太阳能

meanings.meaning_cn: 将（想法、信仰等）强加于（某人）
meanings.meaning_en: to force someone to have the same ideas, beliefs etc as you
meanings.example: parents who impose their own moral values on their children
meanings.example_cn: 把自己的道德观强加给孩子的父母

meanings.meaning_en: the use of something
meanings.example: Computer has found an increasingly wide utilization in all fields.
meanings.example_cn: 电子计算机已越来越广泛地在各个领域得到应用。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of recording or playing sound so that it is separated into two signals and produces more natural sound
meanings.example: The concert will be broadcast in stereo.
meanings.example_cn: 音乐会将用立体声播放。

meanings.meaning_en: using a recording or broadcasting system in which the sound is directed through two speakers
meanings.example: stereo equipment
meanings.example_cn: 立体声音响设备

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a measurement of space which is calculated by multiplying the length of something by its width and height
meanings.example: the cubic capacity of an engine
meanings.example_cn: 引擎汽缸的容积

meanings.meaning_en: a law or set of laws
meanings.example: This is a very important piece of legislation (= law ).
meanings.example_cn: 这是一条非常重要的法规。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who studies or writes about history; an expert in history
meanings.example: I am a historian, and I teach in an American university.
meanings.example_cn: 我是一位历史学家，在美国一所大学任教。

meanings.meaning_en: a historic event or act is very important and will be recorded as part of history
meanings.example: a historic meeting of world leaders
meanings.example_cn: 具有历史意义的世界领导人会议

meanings.meaning_en: the part of physics that deals with the natural forces that act on moving or stationary objects
meanings.example: He has not studied mechanics or engineering.
meanings.example_cn: 他没有学习过力学或者工程学。

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to understand things and to think intelligently
meanings.example: He combined a formidable intellect with a talent for speaking.
meanings.example_cn: 他不但智力超群，而且口才出众。

meanings.meaning_en: used to describe the way you would like things to be, even though this may not be possible
meanings.example: Ideally, your car should have high-security locks.
meanings.example_cn: 最理想的情况是，你的车应该配有高度安全的车锁。

meanings.meaning_en: based on general ideas or principles rather than specific examples or real events
meanings.example: abstract knowledge/principles
meanings.example_cn: 理论知识；抽象原理

meanings.meaning_en: a painting, design etc which contains shapes or images that do not look like real things or people
meanings.example: His abstracts are held in numerous collections.
meanings.example_cn: 他的抽象画被纳入到很多收藏中。

meanings.meaning_en: very informal, sometimes offensive language that is used especially by people who belong to a particular group, such as young people or criminals
meanings.example: schoolboy slang
meanings.example_cn: 学生俚语

meanings.meaning_en: polite behaviour and respect for other people
meanings.example: It’s a matter of common courtesy to acknowledge letters.
meanings.example_cn: 确认收到来信是起码的礼貌。

meanings.meaning_en: the time when day is just starting to become night
meanings.example: romantic walks along the beach at twilight
meanings.example_cn: 黄昏时分浪漫的海边漫步

meanings.meaning_en: an atom which has been given a positive or negative force by adding or taking away an electron
a short journey arranged so that a group of people can visit a place, especially while they are on holiday
meanings.example: Included in the tour is an excursion to the Grand Canyon.
meanings.example_cn: 这次旅游包括大峡谷观光。

meanings.meaning_en: looking or sounding very serious
meanings.example: ‘I’ll survive,’ he said with a grim smile.
meanings.example_cn: “我死不了。”他阴笑着说。

meanings.meaning_en: a transparent block of glass that breaks up white light into different colours
meanings.example: Light is refracted when passed through a prism.
meanings.example_cn: 光通过棱镜时产生折射。

meanings.meaning_en: A troublesome situation or issue is full of complicated problems or difficulties.
meanings.example: The economy has become a troublesome issue for the Conservative Party.
meanings.example_cn: 经济状况已成为保守党的一大难题。

meanings.meaning_en: a thing that is similar to another thing
meanings.example: Scientists are attempting to compare features of extinct animals with living analogues.
meanings.example_cn: 科学家正试图把已灭绝动物的特征与现存类似动物相比较。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being like sb/sth but not exactly the same
meanings.example: She bears a striking similarity to her mother.
meanings.example_cn: 她跟她母亲十分相像。

meanings.meaning_en: the side of an animal’s or person’s body, between the ribs and the hip
meanings.example: He put his hand on the dog's flank.
meanings.example_cn: 他把手放在狗的胁腹上。

meanings.meaning_en: to understand something that is complicated or difficult
meanings.example: She cannot comprehend the extent of the disaster.
meanings.example_cn: 她无法理解这场灾难的严重程度。

meanings.meaning_en: a tendency to believe that good things will always happen
meanings.example: There are grounds for cautious optimism.
meanings.example_cn: 有理由保持谨慎乐观。

meanings.meaning_en: Someone who is sophisticated is comfortable in social situations and knows about culture, fashion, and other matters that are considered socially important.
meanings.example: Mark is a smart and sophisticated young man.
meanings.example_cn: 马克是一个聪明老成的年轻人。

meanings.meaning_en: honest about your feelings or opinions and not hiding anything
meanings.example: Jack is tough, but always straightforward and fair.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然杰克很严厉，但一向坦诚公正。

meanings.meaning_en: using more of something than you should, especially money, time, or effort
meanings.example: a wasteful use of resources
meanings.example_cn: 滥用资源

meanings.example: After a period of enforced idleness, she found a new job.
meanings.example_cn: 她在被迫闲散了一段时间之后，找到了份新工作。

meanings.meaning_en: shabby clothes, places, or objects are untidy and in bad condition because they have been used for a long time
meanings.example: Hugh’s jacket was old and shabby.
meanings.example_cn: 休的夹克衫又旧又破。

meanings.meaning_en: dry powder consisting of extremely small bits of dirt that is in buildings on furniture, floors etc if they are not kept clean
meanings.example: All the furniture was covered in dust.
meanings.example_cn: 所有的家具都蒙上了灰尘。

meanings.meaning_en: when you leave a place in order to try and escape from a person or a dangerous situation
meanings.example: Donald Wood’s hasty flight from South Africa early in 1978
meanings.example_cn: 1978年初唐纳德•伍德匆忙逃离南非

meanings.meaning_en: great excitement and happiness
meanings.example: The boys gazed up at him in rapture.
meanings.example_cn: 男孩们欣喜若狂地抬头注视着他。

meanings.meaning_en: extreme, often uncontrolled anger
meanings.example: I was shaking with fury .
meanings.example_cn: 我气得发抖。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is violent is likely to attack, hurt, or kill other people
meanings.example: My father was a violent and dangerous man.
meanings.example_cn: 我父亲脾气暴躁，是个危险人物。

meanings.meaning_en: very angry
meanings.example: She was absolutely furious.
meanings.example_cn: 她怒不可遏。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of happiness or pleasure because you have achieved something or got what you wanted
meanings.example: She got great satisfaction from helping people to learn.
meanings.example_cn: 她在帮助人们学习的过程中得到很大的满足。

meanings.meaning_en: a small amount of food that is eaten between main meals or instead of a meal
meanings.example: I grabbed a quick snack.
meanings.example_cn: 我赶紧吃了点零食。

meanings.example: the rapidity of economic growth
meanings.example_cn: 经济增长的高速度

meanings.meaning_en: if you parade your skills, knowledge, possessions etc, you show them publicly in order to make people admire you
meanings.example: He is not one to parade his achievements.
meanings.example_cn: 他不是一个爱炫耀自己成就的人。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of clothing that covers you from your waist to your feet and has a separate part for each leg
meanings.example: She was wearing dark blue pants and a white sweater.
meanings.example_cn: 她穿着深蓝色长裤和白色毛衣。

meanings.example: The flowers of the hop plant add bitterness to the beer.
meanings.example_cn: 忽布花可增加啤酒的苦味。

meanings.meaning_en: if plants wither, they become drier and smaller and start to die
meanings.example: The flowers in Isabel's room had withered.
meanings.example_cn: 伊莎贝尔房间里的花朵已经枯萎了。

meanings.meaning_en: to fasten something with a clasp
meanings.example: She clasped the bracelet around her wrist.
meanings.example_cn: 她把手镯戴上手腕扣牢。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you use to join something together, such as a button on a piece of clothing
meanings.example: shoes with velcro fasteners
meanings.example_cn: 带维可牢搭链的鞋

meanings.meaning_en: to speak with a lot of pauses and repeated sounds, either because you have a speech problem, or because you are nervous, excited etc
meanings.example: Whenever he was angry, he would begin to stammer slightly.
meanings.example_cn: 他一生气说话就开始有点结巴。

meanings.meaning_en: a speech problem which makes someone speak with a lot of pauses and repeated sounds
meanings.example: Jeff spoke with a slight stammer.
meanings.example_cn: 杰夫说话有点结巴。

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden strong feeling of fear or nervousness that makes you unable to think clearly or behave sensibly
meanings.example: a feeling of sheer panic
meanings.example_cn: 惊恐万分的感觉

meanings.meaning_en: someone who uses violence such as bombing, shooting etc to obtain political demands
meanings.example: We refuse to talk to terrorists.
meanings.example_cn: 我们拒绝和恐怖分子对话。

meanings.meaning_en: a large bird, the male of which has long blue and green tail feathers that it can lift up and spread out
meanings.example: ...peacocks strutting slowly across the garden.
meanings.example_cn: ...孔雀在花园中趾高气扬地走来走去。

meanings.meaning_en: impossible to put into practice
meanings.example: a fantastic scheme
meanings.example_cn: 异想天开的计划

meanings.meaning_en: filled with air
meanings.example: pneumatic tyres
meanings.example_cn: 充气轮胎

meanings.meaning_en: in or moving through the air
meanings.example: The banyan tree has aerial roots.
meanings.example_cn: 榕树有气根。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the position, size, shape etc of things
meanings.example: ...the spatial distribution of black employment and population in South Africa.
meanings.example_cn: …南非黑人就业和人口的空间分布。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a contract, an agreement etc.) not valid or legal
meanings.example: The agreement was declared void.
meanings.example_cn: 该协议已宣布无效。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep biting something hard
meanings.example: Dexter gnawed his pen thoughtfully.
meanings.example_cn: 德克斯特若有所思地咬着钢笔。

meanings.meaning_en: a strong feeling of wanting something or someone
meanings.example: She looked back with longing on the good old days.
meanings.example_cn: 她回首往事，怀念着过去的美好时光。

meanings.meaning_en: feeling or showing that you want sth very much
meanings.example: He gave a longing look at the ice cream.
meanings.example_cn: 他看了看那冰激凌，显出很想吃的样子。

meanings.meaning_en: making you think that something bad or illegal is happening
meanings.example: They found a suspicious package under the seat.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在座位下发现了一个可疑包裹。

meanings.meaning_en: probably dishonest or illegal
meanings.example: a shady character
meanings.example_cn: 一个鬼鬼祟祟的人

meanings.meaning_en: not likely to be true or correct
meanings.example: The statistics are highly questionable.
meanings.example_cn: 这个统计数据大有问题。

meanings.meaning_en: able to be carried or moved easily
meanings.example: a portable radio
meanings.example_cn: 便携式收音机

meanings.meaning_en: feeling that you want to thank someone because of something kind that they have done, or showing this feeling
meanings.example: Our grateful thanks go to all who participated.
meanings.example_cn: 我们衷心感谢所有参与者。

meanings.meaning_en: that can be moved to different positions or changed in shape or size
meanings.example: an adjustable spanner
meanings.example_cn: 一把活动扳手

meanings.meaning_en: unpleasant or bad
meanings.example: There’s been a frightful accident.
meanings.example_cn: 发生了一起可怕的意外。

meanings.meaning_en: very powerful or impressive, and often frightening
meanings.example: The building is grey, formidable, not at all picturesque.
meanings.example_cn: 那幢建筑呈灰色，气势凛然，与漂亮沾不上边。

meanings.meaning_en: causing fear or suffering
meanings.example: a dreadful accident
meanings.example_cn: 可怕的事故

meanings.meaning_en: unusually large
meanings.example: a monstrous nose
meanings.example_cn: 很大的鼻子

meanings.meaning_en: A possibility is one of several different things that could be done.
meanings.example: There were several possibilities open to each manufacturer.
meanings.example_cn: 每个制造商都可以有几种不同的选择。

meanings.meaning_en: the degree to which something can reasonably be expected to happen
meanings.example: Using a seatbelt will reduce the likelihood of serious injury in a car accident.
meanings.example_cn: 系安全带可以降低在车祸中受重伤的可能性。

meanings.meaning_en: considered by society to be acceptable, good or correct
meanings.example: hard-working, respectable people
meanings.example_cn: 勤勉可敬的人

meanings.meaning_en: large enough to be noticed or considered important
meanings.example: There’s no appreciable change in the patient’s condition.
meanings.example_cn: 病人的状况没有明显改变。

meanings.meaning_en: that should make you feel ashamed
meanings.example: It’s shameful the way some people treat their pets.
meanings.example_cn: 有些人如此对待自己的宠物，真是可耻。

meanings.meaning_en: similar to something else in size, number, quality etc, so that you can make a comparison
meanings.example: A car of comparable size would cost far more abroad.
meanings.example_cn: 同样大小的汽车在国外要贵得多。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that you are referring to one individual person, thing or type of thing and not others
meanings.example: Most students choose one particular area for research.
meanings.example_cn: 大多数学生选择一个特定领域进行研究。

meanings.meaning_en: by means of which or according to which
meanings.example: a proposal whereby EU citizens would be allowed to reside anywhere in the EU
meanings.example_cn: 允许欧盟公民在欧盟任何地方居住的一项提议

meanings.meaning_en: to spend time thinking carefully and seriously about a problem, a difficult question, or something that has happened
meanings.example: He continued to ponder the problem as he walked home.
meanings.example_cn: 他一边往家走一边继续思考那个问题。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of travelling through a place in order to find out about it or find something such as oil or gold in it
meanings.example: oil exploration facilities in the North Sea
meanings.example_cn: 北海的石油勘探设施

meanings.meaning_en: a generous attitude, or generous behaviour
meanings.example: an act of great generosity
meanings.example_cn: 十分慷慨的行为

meanings.meaning_en: to notice or understand something by thinking about it carefully
meanings.example: You need a long series of data to be able to discern such a trend.
meanings.example_cn: 你需要一大串数据才能认清这一趋势。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut down a tree
meanings.example: More than 100 trees were felled in just over an hour.
meanings.example_cn: 短短一个多小时100多棵树就被砍倒了。

meanings.meaning_en: if a newspaper, a television or radio broadcast, or a website carries a piece of news, an advertisement etc, it prints it or broadcasts it
meanings.example: The morning paper carried a story about demonstrations in New York and Washington D.C.
meanings.example_cn: 晨报登载了纽约和华盛顿特区举行示威游行的报道。

meanings.meaning_en: to introduce a new public official or leader at a special ceremony
meanings.example: He will be inaugurated (as) President in January.
meanings.example_cn: 他将于一月份就任总统。

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange for something important to start, such as an official process or a new plan
meanings.example: They have decided to initiate legal proceedings against the newspaper.
meanings.example_cn: 他们决定向该报提起法律诉讼。

meanings.meaning_en: to begin or to start something
meanings.example: Work will commence on the new building immediately.
meanings.example_cn: 新大楼即将破土动工。

meanings.meaning_en: to make an area of desert, wet land etc suitable for farming or building
meanings.example: This land will be reclaimed for a new airport.
meanings.example_cn: 这块土地将被开发用来建新机场。

meanings.meaning_en: the gradual development of plants, animals, etc. over many years as they adapt to changes in their environment
meanings.example: the theory of evolution
meanings.example_cn: 进化论

meanings.meaning_en: to do something that you were not doing before, and continue doing it
meanings.example: There’s so much to do. I don’t know where to start.
meanings.example_cn: 有那么多的事情要做，我都不知道从哪里开始。

meanings.meaning_en: to unfasten the lock on a door, box etc
meanings.example: to unlock the door
meanings.example_cn: 打开门锁

meanings.meaning_en: the representative of the king or queen in a county of England and Wales, who has mostly ceremonial duties
meanings.example: ...the Sheriff of Oxford.
meanings.example_cn: 牛津的郡长

meanings.meaning_en: a king or queen
meanings.example: Britain's head of state is a constitutional monarch.
meanings.example_cn: 英国的国家元首是君主立宪的国王或女王。

meanings.meaning_en: a king or queen
meanings.example: In March 1889, she became the first British sovereign to set foot on Spanish soil.
meanings.example_cn: 1889年3月，她成为首位踏上西班牙国土的英国君主。

meanings.meaning_en: having the highest power in a country
meanings.example: a sovereign ruler
meanings.example_cn: 最高统治者

meanings.meaning_en: a musical instrument like a trumpet, that is used in the army to call soldiers
meanings.example: The bugle sounded as the troops advanced.
meanings.example_cn: 军号吹响前进的号令。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a type of plant, animal, etc.) no longer in existence
meanings.example: Dinosaurs have been extinct for millions of years.
meanings.example_cn: 恐龙已灭绝数千万年了。

meanings.meaning_en: very important for the final result of a particular situation
meanings.example: a decisive factor/victory/battle
meanings.example_cn: 决定性的因素 / 胜利 / 战役

meanings.meaning_en: to control or influence sb/sth or how sth happens, functions, etc.
meanings.example: Prices are governed by market demand.
meanings.example_cn: 价格的高低取决于市场的需求。

meanings.example: a long and winding road
meanings.example_cn: 漫长而曲折的道路

meanings.meaning_en: having a lot of curls or a curved shape
meanings.example: long dark curly hair
meanings.example_cn: 又长又黑的鬈发

meanings.meaning_en: to wind sth on/off a reel
meanings.example: I slowly reeled the fish in.
meanings.example_cn: 我慢慢地收卷鱼线，将鱼拉过来。

meanings.meaning_en: if people mob a famous person, they rush to get close to them and form a crowd around them
meanings.example: Fans ran onto the pitch and mobbed the batsman.
meanings.example_cn: 球迷冲上球场围住了那位击球手。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical compound that has a simple structure of large molecules
meanings.example: Many polymers, such as nylon, are artificial.
meanings.example_cn: 许多聚合物是人造的，比如说尼龙。

meanings.meaning_en: a storm that has very strong fast winds and that moves over water
meanings.example: Hurricane Betty is now approaching the coast of Florida.
meanings.example_cn: 飓风贝蒂正在逼近佛罗里达海岸。

meanings.meaning_en: a sharp pain in your eyes or skin, caused by being hit, by smoke etc
meanings.example: She felt the sting of tears in her eyes.
meanings.example_cn: 她感觉泪水刺痛了眼睛。

meanings.meaning_en: (of an insect or plant) to touch your skin or make a very small hole in it so that you feel a sharp pain
meanings.example: He was stung by a bee.
meanings.example_cn: 他被蜜蜂蜇了。

meanings.meaning_en: if something repels you, it is so unpleasant that you do not want to be near it, or it makes you feel ill
meanings.example: The smell repelled him.
meanings.example_cn: 这气味让他反感。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely big
meanings.example: a gigantic skyscraper
meanings.example_cn: 摩天大楼

meanings.meaning_en: to defend or support a law, system, or principle so that it continues to exist
meanings.example: We have a duty to uphold the law.
meanings.example_cn: 维护法律是我们的责任。

meanings.meaning_en: to give an example of something
meanings.example: Problems are exemplified in the report.
meanings.example_cn: 问题都在报告中作了举例说明。

meanings.meaning_en: a shape that has four straight sides, two of which are usually longer than the other two, and four 90˚ angles at the corners
meanings.example: Suppose the width of a rectangle is x metres.
meanings.example_cn: 设长方形的宽是 x 米。

meanings.meaning_en: to live in a particular place
meanings.example: He spent most of his time in Rutherglen, where his family resided.
meanings.example_cn: 他大部分时间都在拉瑟格伦度过，他的家人就在那里居住。

meanings.meaning_en: to live in a particular place
meanings.example: They dwelt in the forest.
meanings.example_cn: 他们住在森林里。

meanings.meaning_en: the introduction of someone into a new job, company, official position etc, or the ceremony at which this is done
meanings.example: Mrs Simpson is responsible for the induction of new library staff.
meanings.example_cn: 辛普森太太负责图书馆新职员的入职培训。

meanings.meaning_en: the man who is worshipped by Christians as the son of God
meanings.example: a follower of Christ
meanings.example_cn: 耶稣的门徒

meanings.meaning_en: a formal meeting in which people who know a lot about a particular subject have discussions about it
meanings.example: a symposium on women’s health
meanings.example_cn: 女性健康研讨会

meanings.meaning_en: used to mean ‘who’ at the beginning of a question to show surprise or anger
meanings.example: Whoever would do a thing like that to an old woman?
meanings.example_cn: 究竟是谁会对一位老太太做出那样的事？

meanings.meaning_en: to correct something that is wrong
meanings.example: I did my best to rectify the situation, but the damage was already done.
meanings.example_cn: 我竭尽全力去挽回局面，但损害已经造成了。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the tubes which carries blood to your heart from other parts of your body
meanings.example: the pulmonary vein
meanings.example_cn: 肺静脉

meanings.meaning_en: a person, team, company etc that is competing with another
meanings.example: Last year they sold twice as many computers as their competitors.
meanings.example_cn: 去年他们的计算机销量是竞争对手的两倍。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to competition
meanings.example: Competitive sports encourage children to work together as a team.
meanings.example_cn: 竞技体育鼓励孩子们进行团队协作。

meanings.meaning_en: to compete against someone in order to gain something
meanings.example: Inevitably, fights break out between the members of contending groups.
meanings.example_cn: 争权夺利的几个团体之间不可避免地发生了打斗。

meanings.meaning_en: giving all your attention to what is happening, being said etc
meanings.example: The animal raised its head, suddenly alert.
meanings.example_cn: 那只动物突然警觉地抬起头来。

meanings.meaning_en: something, especially a statement, that tells you that something bad, dangerous, or annoying might happen so that you can be ready or avoid it
meanings.example: a warning that grey squirrels are threatening the existence of red squirrels
meanings.example_cn: 关于灰松鼠正威胁到红松鼠生存的警告

meanings.meaning_en: a very large animal that lives in the sea and looks like a fish, but is actually a mammal
the careful choice of a particular person or thing from a group of similar people or things
meanings.example: The judges have made their final selection.
meanings.example_cn: 评委已经作出最后的评选。

meanings.meaning_en: including every possible detail
meanings.example: The doctor gave him a thorough check-up.
meanings.example_cn: 医生给他做了一次全面的体检。

meanings.meaning_en: in a very careful, delicate, or exact way
meanings.example: Saunders’ finely crafted drawings
meanings.example_cn: 桑德斯精心绘制的画作

meanings.meaning_en: relating to literature
meanings.example: a literary prize
meanings.example_cn: 文学奖

meanings.meaning_en: a factory where something such as oil or sugar is made purer
meanings.example: ...an oil refinery.
meanings.example_cn: …一家炼油厂。

meanings.meaning_en: strong and healthy
meanings.example: a vigorous young man
meanings.example_cn: 精力充沛的年轻男子

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden feeling of fear
meanings.example: You gave me such a fright creeping up on me like that!
meanings.example_cn: 你这样不声不响地过来，吓了我一跳！

meanings.meaning_en: complete surprise
meanings.example: She stared at him in astonishment.
meanings.example_cn: 她吃惊地看着他。

meanings.meaning_en: the worry, disappointment, or unhappiness you feel when something unpleasant happens
meanings.example: The thought of leaving filled him with dismay .
meanings.example_cn: 想到要离开，他心里充满了忧伤。

meanings.meaning_en: based on scientific testing or practical experience, not on ideas
meanings.example: empirical evidence
meanings.example_cn: 实验证据

meanings.meaning_en: the distance of a place east or west of the Greenwich meridian, measured in degrees
meanings.example: The town lies at longitude 12˚ east.
meanings.example_cn: 这个镇位于东经12度。

meanings.meaning_en: to hold the weight of something, keep it in place, or prevent it from falling
meanings.example: The middle part of the bridge is supported by two huge towers.
meanings.example_cn: 桥的中部由两个巨型桥塔支撑。

meanings.meaning_en: the study of the way in which money and goods are produced and used
meanings.example: a Harvard professor of economics
meanings.example_cn: 哈佛大学的经济学教授

meanings.meaning_en: the act of saying that something is illegal
meanings.example: the prohibition of the sale of firearms
meanings.example_cn: 枪支的禁售

meanings.meaning_en: a quicker way of getting somewhere than the usual route
meanings.example: I tried to take a shortcut and got lost.
meanings.example_cn: 我试着走近路，结果迷路了。

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow area of water that reaches from the sea or a lake into the land
meanings.example: There are several sheltered inlets along the coast.
meanings.example_cn: 沿着海岸线有几处有天然屏障的水湾。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being perfect
meanings.example: My father expected perfection from all of us.
meanings.example_cn: 父亲期望我们都尽善尽美。

meanings.meaning_en: in spite of something
meanings.example: Notwithstanding differences, there are clear similarities in all of the world’s religions.
meanings.example_cn: 世界上的宗教尽管各不相同，但都有明显的相似之处。

meanings.meaning_en: sensible and careful, especially by trying to avoid unnecessary risks
meanings.example: prudent house buyers
meanings.example_cn: 谨慎的购房者

meanings.meaning_en: packed or put together firmly and closely
meanings.example: The bushes grew in a compact mass.
meanings.example_cn: 灌木长成茂密的一片。

meanings.meaning_en: to press something together so that it becomes smaller or more solid
meanings.example: compacted earth
meanings.example_cn: 压实的土壤

meanings.meaning_en: closely and firmly; in a tight manner
meanings.example: Her eyes were tightly closed.
meanings.example_cn: 她的双眼紧闭着。

meanings.meaning_en: only with great difficulty or effort
meanings.example: She was very old and barely able to walk.
meanings.example_cn: 她年纪非常大，只能勉强走几步路。

meanings.meaning_en: made of metal or containing metal
meanings.example: metallic particles
meanings.example_cn: 金属微粒

meanings.meaning_en: a large sea fish caught for food
meanings.example: ...a shoal of tuna.
meanings.example_cn: …一群金枪鱼。

meanings.meaning_en: from this time on
meanings.example: multiple sclerosis (henceforth referred to as MS)
meanings.example_cn: 多发性硬化（以下称为MS）

meanings.meaning_en: a yellow sauce with a strong taste, eaten especially with meat
meanings.example: a jar of mustard
meanings.example_cn: 一罐芥末酱

meanings.meaning_en: an event at which you describe or explain a new product or idea
meanings.example: I’m going to ask each of you to make a short presentation.
meanings.example_cn: 我要请你们每一位作一个简短的介绍。

meanings.meaning_en: to translate spoken words from one language into another
meanings.example: They spoke good Spanish, and promised to interpret for me.
meanings.example_cn: 他们西班牙语说得很好，答应替我翻译。

meanings.meaning_en: a way of explaining or doing something that is typical of a particular group or period of time
meanings.example: Is the coffee break the adult version of recess?
meanings.example_cn: 工间喝咖啡是成人的休息方式吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to take the knots out of something, or unfasten something that has been tied
meanings.example: Peter untied his shoelaces.
meanings.example_cn: 彼得解开鞋带。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to deal with a difficult problem
meanings.example: There is more than one way to tackle the problem.
meanings.example_cn: 解决这个问题不止一个办法。

meanings.meaning_en: the equipment used in some sports and activities, especially fishing
meanings.example: fishing tackle
meanings.example_cn: 渔具

meanings.meaning_en: to formally end a parliament, business arrangement, marriage etc
meanings.example: The monarch had the power to dissolve parliament.
meanings.example_cn: 君主有权解散议会。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious infectious disease that affects many parts of your body, especially your lungs
meanings.example: She was infected with tuberculosis.
meanings.example_cn: 她被传染上了肺结核。

meanings.meaning_en: to include something as part of a group, system, plan etc
meanings.example: We’ve incorporated many environmentally friendly features into the design of the building.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在这座建筑的设计中加进了许多环保元素。

meanings.meaning_en: the materials used to build or make something, or its design and structure
meanings.example: The houses were partly timber in construction.
meanings.example_cn: 这些房子有些部分是木结构的。

meanings.meaning_en: in a way that is related to systems of money, trade, or business
meanings.example: In economically advanced countries, women marry later.
meanings.example_cn: 在经济发达国家，女性结婚比较晚。

meanings.meaning_en: a short form of a word or expression
meanings.example: ‘Dr’ is the written abbreviation of ‘Doctor’.
meanings.example_cn: Dr是Doctor的书面缩写形式。

meanings.meaning_en: using money carefully and wisely
meanings.example: hard-working, thrifty people
meanings.example_cn: 勤劳节俭的人们

meanings.meaning_en: an official meeting with someone who asks you questions
meanings.example: a police interview
meanings.example_cn: 警方问讯

meanings.meaning_en: a person who receives sth
meanings.example: Molly's more of a giver than a receiver.
meanings.example_cn: 莫莉更乐于给予而不是接受。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of fungus used for producing alcohol in beer and wine, and for making bread rise
meanings.example: dried/fresh yeast
meanings.example_cn: 干／新鲜酵母

meanings.meaning_en: a set of beliefs that form an important part of a religion or system of ideas
meanings.example: traditional doctrines of divine power
