meanings.example_cn: 神力的传统教义

meanings.meaning_en: to teach someone as a tutor
meanings.example: He was privately tutored.
meanings.example_cn: 他是由家庭教师教的。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone realize that something which they thought was true or good is not really true or good
meanings.example: I hate to disillusion you, but I don’t think she’s coming back.
meanings.example_cn: 我真不愿意让你失望，但我想她是不会回来了。

meanings.meaning_en: a hollow curved object that is narrow at one end and wide at the other
meanings.example: a wind-up gramophone with a big horn
meanings.example_cn: 带有一个大喇叭形扬声器的发条式留声机

meanings.meaning_en: a line of sharp rocks, often made of coral, or a raised area of sand near the surface of the sea
meanings.example: a proposal to protect several miles of thousand-year-old coral reef
meanings.example_cn: 保护绵延数英里的千年古珊瑚礁的提案

meanings.meaning_en: a solid black substance produced from coal and burned to provide heat
meanings.example: ...a coke-burning stove.
meanings.example_cn: …一个烧焦炭的炉子。

meanings.meaning_en: a long piece of music usually in four parts, written for an orchestra
meanings.example: Bruckner’s Fifth Symphony
meanings.example_cn: 布鲁克纳的《第五交响曲》

meanings.meaning_en: an exchange of ideas, feelings etc which make people or groups understand each other better
meanings.example: social intercourse
meanings.example_cn: 社交

meanings.meaning_en: the plant on which soya beans grow; the food obtained from soya beans
meanings.example: "I just added a little soy sauce," he informs us.
meanings.example_cn: “我就加了一点儿酱油，”他告诉我们。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment fastened to the back of people who jump out of planes, which makes them fall slowly and safely to the ground
meanings.example: a parachute jump
meanings.example_cn: 跳伞

meanings.meaning_en: the process by which something changes to a worse condition
meanings.example: ...air pollution, traffic congestion, and the steady degradation of our quality of life.
meanings.example_cn: …空气污染、交通阻塞以及我们生活质量的持续恶化。

meanings.meaning_en: a long pole with a wide flat blade at one end, used for rowing a boat
meanings.example: He pulled as hard as he could on the oars.
meanings.example_cn: 他拼命地划桨。

meanings.meaning_en: a serious speech or piece of writing on a particular subject
meanings.example: a discourse on art
meanings.example_cn: 有关艺术的演讲

meanings.meaning_en: the root of the ginger plant used in cooking as a spice
meanings.example: a teaspoon of ground ginger
meanings.example_cn: 一茶匙姜粉

meanings.meaning_en: (of liquid) to fall noisily onto a surface
meanings.example: Water splashed onto the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 水哗的一声泼洒在地板上。

meanings.meaning_en: the sound of sth hitting liquid or of liquid hitting sth
meanings.example: He splashed cold water on his face.
meanings.example_cn: 他把冷水往脸上泼。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to design buildings
meanings.example: They commissioned an architect to design the new library.
meanings.example_cn: 他们委托一位建筑师设计这座新图书馆。

meanings.meaning_en: an opinion or idea that sb believes is true but that is not proved
meanings.example: I have this theory that most people prefer being at work to being at home.
meanings.example_cn: 依我看，多数人喜欢工作而不愿待在家里。

meanings.meaning_en: to cut small amounts of something in order to make it tidier
meanings.example: The hedges had just been clipped.
meanings.example_cn: 树篱刚修剪过。

meanings.meaning_en: to become or make something become smaller or less
meanings.example: The party’s share of the electorate has diminished steadily.
meanings.example_cn: 支持这个政党的选民比例持续下降。

meanings.meaning_en: to become smaller in size, importance, or value, or make something do this
meanings.example: Gradually her anxiety lessened.
meanings.example_cn: 她的焦虑慢慢减轻了。

meanings.meaning_en: an official whose job is to check that something is satisfactory and that rules are being obeyed
meanings.example: ticket inspectors
meanings.example_cn: 查票员

meanings.meaning_en: a quality in someone’s character that makes them not like expressing their emotions or talking about their problems
meanings.example: She overcame her own natural reserve.
meanings.example_cn: 她克服了沉默寡言的天性。

meanings.meaning_en: a new or difficult task that tests sb's ability and skill
meanings.example: The role will be the biggest challenge of his acting career.
meanings.example_cn: 扮演这个角色将是他演艺生涯中最大的挑战。

meanings.meaning_en: a large project, especially one that is difficult
meanings.example: The programme is a joint enterprise with the London Business School.
meanings.example_cn: 这一计划是与伦敦商学院的合作项目。

meanings.meaning_en: doing something in a very determined way because you have very strong beliefs, aims etc
meanings.example: resolute opposition
meanings.example_cn: 坚决的反对

meanings.meaning_en: (of an object) strong and not easily damaged
meanings.example: That chair doesn’t look very sturdy.
meanings.example_cn: 那把椅子看上去不太结实。

meanings.meaning_en: firmly held in a particular position and not moving or shaking
meanings.example: It takes a steady hand to perform surgery.
meanings.example_cn: 做手术手要稳。

meanings.meaning_en: the condition of being steady and not changing
meanings.example: a period of relative stability
meanings.example_cn: 相对稳定的一段时期

meanings.meaning_en: demanding firmly and repeatedly that something should happen
meanings.example: She was insistent that they should all meet for dinner.
meanings.example_cn: 她坚持要大家聚在一起吃晚餐。

meanings.meaning_en: determination to do something even though it is difficult or other people oppose it
meanings.example: Her persistence paid off when she was offered the job of manager.
meanings.example_cn: 她得到了经理的职位，不懈坚持终于有了回报。

meanings.meaning_en: to continue trying to do something in a very determined way in spite of difficulties – use this to show approval
meanings.example: It can be tricky at first, but persevere.
meanings.example_cn: 一开始会有些棘手，不过要坚持。

meanings.meaning_en: (of sounds or voices) very high and loud, in an unpleasant way
meanings.example: ‘That’s not true,’ she protested in a shrill voice.
meanings.example_cn: “不是这样的。”她尖声抗议道。

meanings.meaning_en: to produce a very high and unpleasant sound
meanings.example: The telephone shrilled twice.
meanings.example_cn: 刺耳的电话铃响了两下。

meanings.meaning_en: to build or form a bridge over something
meanings.example: a fallen tree bridging the stream
meanings.example_cn: 倒下来架在小溪上的树

meanings.meaning_en: a charge or payment that is set according to a standard scale
meanings.example: $20 an hour is the going rate (= the usual amount paid ) for private tuition.
meanings.example_cn: 每小时20美元是私人授课的一般收费。

meanings.meaning_en: to think that someone or something has a particular quality, value, or standard
meanings.example: The company seems to rate him very highly (= think he is very good) .
meanings.example_cn: 公司好像对他的评价很高。

meanings.meaning_en: an idea that is suggested as an explanation for something, but that has not yet been proved to be true
meanings.example: One hypothesis is that the victim fell asleep while driving.
meanings.example_cn: 一种假设是受害人开车时睡着了。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that is not what they are claimed to be – used to show disapproval
meanings.example: The elections were a complete sham.
meanings.example_cn: 这次大选完全是一场骗局。

meanings.meaning_en: to pretend to be upset, ill etc to gain sympathy or an advantage
meanings.example: She’s not ill, she’s only shamming.
meanings.example_cn: 她没生病，只是在装病。

meanings.meaning_en: a copy of a valuable object, painting etc that is intended to deceive people
meanings.example: The painting was judged a fake.
meanings.example_cn: 这幅画被鉴定为赝品。

meanings.meaning_en: not real and seeming to be something it is not, in order to deceive people
meanings.example: I gave a fake name.
meanings.example_cn: 我报了个假名。

meanings.meaning_en: to accept something as being true and base something else on it
meanings.example: I presume you're here on business.
meanings.example_cn: 我想你是来这儿出差的吧。

meanings.meaning_en: an insect with a round hard back that is usually black
meanings.example: a black beetle
meanings.example_cn: 黑甲虫

meanings.meaning_en: to put or hold something in a position so that it cannot move
meanings.example: She clamped her hands over her ears.
meanings.example_cn: 她用手紧紧地捂住耳朵。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment for holding things together
meanings.example: Many openers have a magnet or set of clamps to grip the open lid.
meanings.example_cn: 许多开启器是用磁铁或夹具来夹紧要开启的盖子。

meanings.meaning_en: If you sandwich two things together with something else, you put that other thing between them. If you sandwich one thing between two other things, you put it between them.
meanings.example: Carefully split the sponge ring, then sandwich the two halves together with whipped cream.
meanings.example_cn: 小心地切开海绵蛋糕圈，然后在两半中间夹上生奶油。

meanings.meaning_en: simple and good
meanings.example: homely cooking
meanings.example_cn: 家常烹调

meanings.meaning_en: a bird, such as a chicken, that is kept for its meat and eggs, or the meat of this type of bird
meanings.example: Carve the fowl into 8 pieces.
meanings.example_cn: 将这只家禽切成8块。

meanings.meaning_en: birds such as chickens and ducks that are kept on farms in order to produce eggs and meat
meanings.example: ...a poultry farm.
meanings.example_cn: …一个家禽饲养场。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine for making air or water hotter
meanings.example: Did you turn the heater off?
meanings.example_cn: 你关掉加热器了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: if colour or light deepens or if sth deepens it, it becomes darker
meanings.example: deepening shadows
meanings.example_cn: 越来越暗的阴影

meanings.meaning_en: if something heightens a feeling, effect etc, or if a feeling etc heightens, it becomes stronger or increases
meanings.example: There are fears that the march will heighten racial tension.
meanings.example_cn: 有人担心这次游行会加深种族间的紧张局势。

meanings.meaning_en: to sew a piece of material onto the inside or back of another piece to make it stronger or warmer
meanings.example: Are those curtains lined?
meanings.example_cn: 那些窗帘加衬里了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being quiet and not moving
meanings.example: The sound of footsteps on the path broke the stillness.
meanings.example_cn: 小路上的脚步声打破了宁静。

meanings.meaning_en: a place to stay
meanings.example: It’s £90 a week for board and lodging (= meals and a room ).
meanings.example_cn: 食宿费每周90英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who takes a job or position previously held by someone else
meanings.example: His successor died after only 15 months in office.
meanings.example_cn: 他的继任者就任仅15个月就去世了。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of taking over an official job or position, or the right to be the next to take it
meanings.example: If the prince dies, the succession passes to his son.
meanings.example_cn: 王子如果去世，就由他的儿子继承。

meanings.meaning_en: produced or happening four times a year
meanings.example: We publish a quarterly journal.
meanings.example_cn: 我们出版一份季刊。

meanings.meaning_en: the skills needed for a particular profession
meanings.example: The musician spends years perfecting his craft.
meanings.example_cn: 这位音乐家多年来不断提高自己的艺术造诣。

meanings.meaning_en: an object that you buy or keep to remind yourself of a special occasion or a place you have visited
meanings.example: a souvenir shop
meanings.example_cn: 纪念品商店

meanings.meaning_en: giving a record of or report on the facts about sth, especially by using pictures, recordings, etc. of people involved
meanings.example: documentary films
meanings.example_cn: 纪录影片

meanings.meaning_en: not part of a main or important group or situation
meanings.example: marginal groups in society
meanings.example_cn: 社会中的非主流群体

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of computer equipment consisting of at least a keyboard and a screen, that you use for putting in or taking out information from a large computer
meanings.example: Carl sits at a computer terminal 40 hours a week.
meanings.example_cn: 卡尔每周要在电脑前坐40小时。

meanings.meaning_en: to secretly make clever and dishonest plans to get or achieve something
meanings.example: Everyone's always scheming and plotting.
meanings.example_cn: 每个人时刻都在算计和谋划。

meanings.example: geometrical progression
meanings.example_cn: 几何级数

meanings.meaning_en: a market or area where there are a lot of small shops, especially in India or the Middle East
meanings.example: Kamal was a vendor in Cairo's open-air bazaar.
meanings.example_cn: 卡莫尔曾是开罗露天集市的摊贩。

meanings.meaning_en: a meeting of a group of people
meanings.example: a select gathering of 20 or 30 people
meanings.example_cn: 二三十名特邀人士的聚会

meanings.meaning_en: a group of numbers, shapes etc in mathematics
meanings.example: The set (x, y) has two members.
meanings.example_cn: （x, y）这个集里有两个项。

meanings.meaning_en: a mental or physical illness which prevents part of your body from working properly
meanings.example: severe eating disorders such as bulimia and anorexia
meanings.example_cn: 像贪食症和厌食症这类严重的进食障碍

meanings.meaning_en: an illness that affects a particular part of your body
meanings.example: He is having treatment for a chest complaint.
meanings.example_cn: 他在接受胸部疾病的治疗。

meanings.meaning_en: going to happen, be published, etc. very soon
meanings.example: the forthcoming elections
meanings.example_cn: 即将到来的选举

meanings.meaning_cn: （人、意见或观念的）截然相反，截然对立；极性
meanings.meaning_en: a state in which people, opinions, or ideas are completely different or opposite to each other
meanings.example: ...the polarities of good and evil.
meanings.example_cn: ..善与恶的截然对立。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation, quality etc which is as great as it can possibly be – used especially when talking about two opposites
meanings.example: In fact, the truth lies between the two extremes.
meanings.example_cn: 事实上，真理存在于两个极端之间。

meanings.meaning_en: a musical instrument that usually has six strings, that you play with your fingers or with a plectrum
meanings.example: an acoustic/an electric/a classical, etc. guitar
meanings.example_cn: 原声吉他、电吉他、古典吉他等

meanings.meaning_en: done or happening at exactly the right time
meanings.example: The fight ended only with the timely arrival of the police.
meanings.example_cn: 幸亏警察及时赶到，打斗总算停止。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel annoyed or impatient, especially by doing something many times or for a long period of time
meanings.example: It really irritates me when he doesn’t help around the house.
meanings.example_cn: 家里的事情他一点都不帮忙，真让我恼火。

meanings.meaning_en: extreme and sudden
meanings.example: drastic cuts in government spending
meanings.example_cn: 政府开支的急剧削减

meanings.meaning_en: very difficult and needing a lot of effort and skill
meanings.example: The negotiations will be a severe test of his abilities.
meanings.example_cn: 这次谈判将是对他能力的严峻考验。

meanings.meaning_en: related to Christianity
meanings.example: the Christian religion
meanings.example_cn: 基督教

meanings.meaning_en: simple, basic, and important
meanings.example: Love and fear are two of the most elemental human emotions.
meanings.example_cn: 爱和恐惧是人类最基本的两种情感。

meanings.meaning_en: concerning the most basic and important parts of sth; thorough and complete
meanings.example: the need for radical changes in education
meanings.example_cn: 对教育进行彻底变革的需要

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s ultimate aim is their main and most important aim, that they hope to achieve in the future
meanings.example: Complete disarmament was the ultimate goal of the conference.
meanings.example_cn: 全面裁军是这次会议的最终目标。

meanings.meaning_en: having or needing a lot of energy or determination
meanings.example: an energetic man
meanings.example_cn: 精力旺盛的男子

meanings.meaning_en: having large strong muscles
meanings.example: She was fast and strong, with a slender, muscular body.
meanings.example_cn: 她动作敏捷，身体强壮，身材苗条，肌肉结实。

meanings.meaning_en: using words in a clever and amusing way
meanings.example: witty remarks
meanings.example_cn: 妙语

meanings.meaning_en: part of a machine or a set of parts that does a particular job
meanings.example: the brake mechanism
meanings.example_cn: 刹车装置

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to be careful about what you say or do, so that you do not upset or embarrass other people
meanings.example: With great tact, Clive persuaded her to apologize.
meanings.example_cn: 克莱夫十分巧妙地说服了她去道歉。

meanings.meaning_en: (of an object, a plan, an idea, etc.) very suitable for a particular purpose and resulting from clever new ideas
meanings.example: an ingenious device
meanings.example_cn: 精巧的装置

meanings.meaning_en: skill at inventing things and thinking of new ideas
meanings.example: Inspecting the nest can be difficult and may require some ingenuity.
meanings.example_cn: 仔细检查鸟巢可能有困难，也许需要一些巧妙的心思。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of ideas, rules, or beliefs from which something is developed, or on which decisions are based
meanings.example: We need to establish a legal framework for the protection of the environment.
meanings.example_cn: 我们需要建立一个法律体制来保护环境。

meanings.meaning_en: a table or a small shop with an open front, especially outdoors, where goods are sold
meanings.example: a market stall
meanings.example_cn: 市场摊位

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of friendship between people who do things together or share an interest
meanings.example: Regular outings contribute to a sense of fellowship among co-workers.
meanings.example_cn: 经常外出游玩可以增进同事之间的友谊。

meanings.meaning_en: the small red planet that is fourth in order from the Sun and is nearest the Earth
meanings.example: the enormous volcanoes known to exist on Mars
meanings.example_cn: 已知在火星上存在的大量火山

meanings.meaning_en: the upper part of a pig’s leg, or the meat from this that has been preserved with salt or smoke
meanings.example: a ham sandwich
meanings.example_cn: 火腿三明治

meanings.meaning_en: a part of an engine consisting of a short solid piece of metal inside a tube, which moves up and down to make the other parts of the engine move
meanings.example: The piston moves by steam pressure.
meanings.example_cn: 活塞在蒸汽压力下运动。

meanings.meaning_en: physical or mental energy and determination
meanings.example: He began working with renewed vigour.
meanings.example_cn: 他以更加旺盛的精力开始工作。

meanings.meaning_en: cloudy liquids are not clear
meanings.example: a rather cloudy wine
meanings.example_cn: 相当浑浊的葡萄酒

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment used to mix things together
meanings.example: an electric food mixer
meanings.example_cn: 电动食品搅拌器

meanings.meaning_en: an agreement between two people to marry, or the period of time they are engaged
meanings.example: Their engagement was announced in the paper.
meanings.example_cn: 他们订婚的消息在报上公布了。

meanings.meaning_en: money or a gift that you illegally give someone to persuade them to do something for you
meanings.example: The officials said that they had been offered bribes before an important game.
meanings.example_cn: 这几名官员说，有人在一场重要比赛之前向他们行贿。

meanings.meaning_en: to illegally give someone, especially a public official, money or a gift in order to persuade them to do something for you
meanings.example: The only way we could get into the country was by bribing the border officials.
meanings.example_cn: 我们要进入这个国家，唯一的办法是贿赂边境官员。

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage someone to start behaving in an immoral or dishonest way
meanings.example: Young prisoners are being corrupted by the older, long-term offenders.
meanings.example_cn: 年轻的囚犯正在被年纪较大、刑期长的犯人带坏。

meanings.meaning_en: using your power in a dishonest or illegal way in order to get an advantage for yourself
meanings.example: Corrupt judges have taken millions of dollars in bribes.
meanings.example_cn: 腐败的法官接受了几百万美元的贿赂。

meanings.meaning_en: something that is said or written as a reply
meanings.example: Carl made no response, and carried on with his meal.
meanings.example_cn: 卡尔没有回答，继续吃饭。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of metal or plastic, with a design or words on it, that a person wears to show that they belong to an organization, support sth, have achieved sth, have a particular rank, etc.
meanings.example: We were each handed a badge with our name on it.
meanings.example_cn: 我们每个人都拿到一个徽章，上面有我们的名字。

meanings.meaning_en: to hold sth, ready to use it as a weapon or tool
meanings.example: He was attacked by a man wielding a knife.
meanings.example_cn: 他遭到一名持刀男子的袭击。

meanings.meaning_en: an insect that lives mainly in Asia and Africa and flies in a very large group, eating and destroying crops
meanings.example: a swarm of locusts
meanings.example_cn: 一大群蝗虫

meanings.meaning_en: a thin black and yellow flying insect that can sting you
meanings.example: a wasp sting
meanings.example_cn: 黄蜂蜇伤

meanings.meaning_en: members of a royal family
meanings.example: At school the other children treated them like royalty.
meanings.example_cn: 在学校里，其他孩子将他们奉若王族。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a place) empty and without people, making you feel sad or frightened
meanings.example: a desolate landscape
meanings.example_cn: 荒凉的景色

meanings.meaning_en: an idea or opinion that is wrong, especially about yourself
meanings.example: She was under no illusion that he loved her.
meanings.example_cn: 她不再幻想他爱她了。

meanings.meaning_en: a small change made in something such as a design, plan, or system
meanings.example: They have used the same process for almost 50 years with only minor modifications.
meanings.example_cn: 同样的工序他们用了将近50年，期间只做过很小的改动。

meanings.meaning_en: concerning or affecting the air, land, or water on Earth
meanings.example: the environmental damage caused by the chemical industry
meanings.example_cn: 化学工业对环境造成的破坏

meanings.meaning_cn: 怀孕的；意义深长的；意义深长的
meanings.meaning_en: (of a woman or female animal) having a baby or young animal developing inside her/its body
meanings.example: care for pregnant women
meanings.example_cn: 孕妇保健

meanings.meaning_en: an animal or plant that lived many thousands of years ago and that has been preserved, or the shape of one of these animals or plants that has been preserved in rock
meanings.example: fossils of early reptiles
meanings.example_cn: 早期爬行动物的化石

meanings.meaning_en: a light plane that flies without an engine
a piece of equipment consisting of a wheel over which a rope or chain is pulled to lift heavy things
meanings.example: a system of ropes and pulleys
meanings.example_cn: 绳索滑轮系统

meanings.meaning_en: a sliding movement across a surface
meanings.example: The car went into a slide.
meanings.example_cn: 汽车打起滑来。

meanings.meaning_en: a very hard grey rock, often used in building
either of two things that correlate with each other
a nut that you can eat, shaped like a human brain
meanings.example: coffee and walnut cake
meanings.example_cn: 咖啡核桃蛋糕

meanings.meaning_en: a curved shape or line
meanings.example: the arc of a rainbow
meanings.example_cn: 彩虹的弧状

meanings.meaning_en: a sound, word, or short sentence that you say suddenly and loudly because you are surprised, angry, or excited
meanings.example: horrified exclamations of disgust
meanings.example_cn: 厌恶的惊叫

meanings.meaning_en: the final result of a meeting, discussion, war etc – used especially when no one knows what it will be until it actually happens
meanings.example: People who had heard the evidence at the trial were surprised at the outcome.
meanings.example_cn: 在审判过程中听过证词的人都对此结果感到吃惊。

meanings.meaning_en: a red jewel
meanings.example: ...a ruby and diamond ring.
meanings.example_cn: …一枚红宝石钻戒。

meanings.meaning_en: something such as a film, play, song etc that is very popular and successful
meanings.example: Which band had a hit with ‘Bohemian Rhapsody’?
meanings.example_cn: 《波希米亚狂想曲》是哪支乐队风行一时的歌曲？

meanings.meaning_en: to move across, over, or through something, especially an area of land or water
meanings.example: two minutes to traverse the park
meanings.example_cn: 两分钟横穿公园

meanings.meaning_en: lying or placed across something
meanings.example: a transverse beam
meanings.example_cn: 横梁

meanings.meaning_en: the flat ground at the bottom of a river, lake, or sea
meanings.example: the sea bed
meanings.example_cn: 海底

meanings.meaning_en: arranged together in a pleasing way so that each part goes well with the others
meanings.example: The decor is a harmonious blend of traditional and modern.
meanings.example_cn: 这种装饰风格是传统与现代的和谐统一。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of an all-male religious group that lives apart from other people in a monastery
meanings.example: ...saffron-robed Buddhist monks.
meanings.example_cn: …身穿黄袍的和尚们。

meanings.meaning_en: willing to cooperate
meanings.example: He was doing his best to be cooperative.
meanings.example_cn: 他在尽全力配合。

meanings.meaning_en: a business or organization owned equally by all the people working there
meanings.example: a women-only housing co-operative
meanings.example_cn: 只限女性成员的住房合作社

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of metal fastened to a door, lid etc that allows it to swing open and shut
meanings.example: The top swung open on well-oiled hinges.
meanings.example_cn: 盖子在上好油的折叶上一下子弹开了。

meanings.meaning_en: socially and morally acceptable
meanings.example: It is right and proper that parents take responsibility for their children's attendance at school.
meanings.example_cn: 父母负责督促子女上学上课，这是天经地义的事。

meanings.meaning_en: made up of different parts or materials
meanings.example: composite metals
meanings.example_cn: 复合金属

meanings.meaning_en: something made up of different parts or materials
meanings.example: The child’s character was a composite of two girls I knew.
meanings.example_cn: 这孩子的性格综合了我认识的两个女孩的个性。

meanings.meaning_cn: 综合，综合物；（化学或生物学物质的）合成；（用电子方式对声音、语音或音乐的）合成
meanings.meaning_en: something that has been made by combining different things, or the process of combining things
meanings.example: a synthesis of Eastern and Western philosophical ideas
meanings.example_cn: 东西方哲学思想的结合

meanings.meaning_en: the sound of many people hitting their hands together and shouting, to show that they have enjoyed something
meanings.example: She got a round of applause (= a short period of applause) when she finished.
meanings.example_cn: 她结束的时候获得一阵掌声。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit your open hands together, to show that you have enjoyed a play, concert, speaker etc
meanings.example: The audience applauded loudly.
meanings.example_cn: 观众掌声雷动。

meanings.meaning_en: a close friend
meanings.example: We’ve been pals since we were at school.
meanings.example_cn: 我们上学的时候就是好朋友。

meanings.meaning_en: friendly behaviour towards visitors
meanings.example: Thanks for your hospitality over the past few weeks.
meanings.example_cn: 感谢你几周来的热情款待。

meanings.meaning_en: having an attitude to life where imagination and the emotions are especially important; not looking at situations in a realistic way
meanings.example: Like many New Yorkers, he had a romantic image of country life.
meanings.example_cn: 像许多纽约人一样，他对乡村生活也有一种不切实际的美好幻想。

meanings.meaning_en: a loud cry or shout showing pain, anger, unhappiness etc
meanings.example: He let out a howl of anguish.
meanings.example_cn: 他发出一声痛苦的嚎叫。

meanings.meaning_en: the industry that designs and builds aircraft and space vehicles
meanings.example: employment in the aerospace industry
meanings.example_cn: 航空航天工业的工作

meanings.meaning_en: an official record of events, especially on a journey in a ship or plane
meanings.example: The captain always keeps a log.
meanings.example_cn: 船长坚持记航海日志。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is walking, especially along a street or other place used by cars
meanings.example: More than a third of all pedestrian injuries are to children.
meanings.example_cn: 所有受伤的行人中有1/3以上是儿童。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you decide to do in order to achieve something
meanings.example: She’s still thinking about her next move.
meanings.example_cn: 她还在考虑她的下一步行动。

meanings.meaning_en: to be slow to speak or act because you feel uncertain or nervous
meanings.example: She hesitated before replying.
meanings.example_cn: 她犹豫了一下才回答。

meanings.meaning_en: a small animal or insect that destroys crops or food supplies
meanings.example: a chemical used in pest control
meanings.example_cn: 用于防治虫害的一种化学品

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow passage of water between two areas of land, usually connecting two seas
meanings.example: the Bering Strait
meanings.example_cn: 白令海峡

meanings.meaning_en: a reptile that lives mainly in water and has a soft body covered by a hard shell
meanings.example: ...the giant sea turtle.
meanings.example_cn: …那只巨大的海龟。

meanings.meaning_en: the place where your bags are checked for illegal goods when you go into a country
meanings.example: She was stopped at customs and questioned.
meanings.example_cn: 她在海关被叫住接受问话。

meanings.meaning_en: a large town on or near a coast, with a harbour that big ships can use
meanings.example: ...the Baltic seaport of Rostock.
meanings.example_cn: ...波罗的海沿岸的海港城市罗斯托克。

meanings.meaning_en: a plastic or rubber tube containing wires that carry telephone messages, electronic signals, television pictures etc
meanings.example: overhead power cables
meanings.example_cn: 高架电缆

meanings.meaning_en: someone who sails on the seas, attacking other boats and stealing things from them
meanings.example: In the nineteenth century, pirates roamed the seas.
meanings.example_cn: 19世纪，海盗很猖獗。

meanings.meaning_en: the areas or towns near the sea, where people go to enjoy themselves
meanings.example: a trip to the seaside
meanings.example_cn: 去海滨的旅行

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of something that is more than what is needed or used
meanings.example: Any surplus can be trimmed away.
meanings.example_cn: 多出来的部分可以修剪掉。

meanings.meaning_en: to think something is better, more important etc than it really is
meanings.example: He tends to overestimate his own abilities.
meanings.example_cn: 他往往高估自己的能力。

meanings.meaning_en: greater than what seems reasonable or appropriate
meanings.example: excessively high prices
meanings.example_cn: 过高的价格

meanings.meaning_en: harmful actions that are socially or morally unacceptable
meanings.example: The government was unable to curb the excesses of the secret police.
meanings.example_cn: 政府无法约束秘密警察的过分行为。

meanings.meaning_en: a place where fruit trees are grown
meanings.example: a cherry orchard
meanings.example_cn: 樱桃园

meanings.meaning_en: the skin of some fruits and vegetables, especially the thick skin of fruits such as oranges, which you do not eat
meanings.example: ...grated lemon peel.
meanings.example_cn: …磨碎了的柠檬皮。

meanings.meaning_en: the large hard part at the centre of some fruits, such as a peach or cherry, which contains the seed
meanings.example: ...cherry stones.
meanings.example_cn: …樱桃核。

meanings.meaning_en: to hit someone with the flat part of your hand
meanings.example: Sarah slapped Aaron across the face.
meanings.example_cn: 萨拉在阿龙的脸上掴了一巴掌。

meanings.meaning_en: a quick hit with the flat part of your hand
meanings.example: Julia gave Roy a slap on the cheek.
meanings.example_cn: 朱莉娅扇了罗伊一个耳光。

meanings.meaning_en: located in or near the middle of a country, not near the edge or on the coast
meanings.example: the largest area of inland water in the southeast
meanings.example_cn: 东南部最大的内陆水域

meanings.meaning_en: a container for boiling water that is part of a steam engine, or is used to provide heating in a house
a piece of equipment consisting of a tube-shaped piece of wood, metal etc that rolls over and over, used for painting, crushing, making things smoother etc
meanings.example: a paint roller
meanings.example_cn: 刷漆滚筒

meanings.meaning_en: a large fish with silver skin and pink flesh that lives in the sea but swims up rivers to lay its eggs
meanings.example: a whole salmon
meanings.example_cn: 一整条鲑鱼

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical substance that exists as a solid or as a powder and is used to make glass, bricks, and parts for computers. It is a chemical element: symbol Si
meanings.example: The new chip will be made from a piece of silicon about the size of a postage stamp.
meanings.example_cn: 这种新的芯片将由大约邮票大小的一块硅片制成。

meanings.meaning_en: an official rule or order
meanings.example: There seem to be so many rules and regulations these days.
meanings.example_cn: 如今好像条条框框很多。

meanings.meaning_en: when the same thing keeps happening often, especially with the same amount of time between each occasion when it happens
meanings.example: Climate change is disrupting the regularity of the seasons.
meanings.example_cn: 气候的变化正在打乱季节的规律性。

meanings.meaning_en: to describe something correctly and thoroughly, and to say what standards, limits, qualities etc it has that make it different from other things
meanings.example: the ability to define clients’ needs
meanings.example_cn: 确定客户需求的能力

meanings.meaning_en: a condition in an agreement or law
meanings.example: The agreement includes a provision for each side to check the other side’s weapons.
meanings.example_cn: 协议有项规定，允许双方互查武器。

meanings.meaning_en: when you get something that is newer or better than the one you had before
meanings.example: Our old car is badly in need of replacement.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的旧车急需更换。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a room or building) large and with plenty of space for people to move around in
meanings.example: a spacious living area
meanings.example_cn: 宽敞的居住空间

meanings.meaning_en: the distance between the middle and the top or bottom of a wave such as a sound wave
meanings.example: As we fall asleep the amplitude of brain waves slowly becomes greater.
meanings.example_cn: 进入睡眠状态时，我们的脑电波振幅慢慢变大。

meanings.meaning_en: arranged in a circular shape with bars or lines coming from the centre
meanings.example: radial roads leading out of the city centre
meanings.example_cn: 从市中心向外辐射的道路

meanings.meaning_en: using an electrical current that is controlled by light
meanings.example: Advanced imported photoelectric supervision system is used.
meanings.example_cn: 采用先进的进口光电眼监控系统。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to machines or processes which are concerned with light, images, or the way we see things
meanings.example: microscopes and other optical instruments
meanings.example_cn: 显微镜和其他光学仪器

meanings.meaning_en: a small bush with several woody stems
meanings.example: ...flowering shrubs.
meanings.example_cn: …开花的灌木。

meanings.meaning_en: to supply water to an area of land through pipes or channels so that crops will grow
meanings.example: irrigation channels
meanings.example_cn: 灌溉渠

meanings.meaning_en: the force that keeps an object in the same position or keeps it moving until it is moved or stopped by another force
meanings.example: Inertia carried the plane onto the ground.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机靠惯性着陆。

meanings.meaning_en: a large group of musicians playing many different kinds of instruments and led by a conductor
meanings.example: the Berlin Symphony Orchestra
meanings.example_cn: 柏林交响乐团

meanings.meaning_en: a sudden very loud noise, especially one made by a whistle or horn
meanings.example: The station master gave a blast on his whistle and we were off.
meanings.example_cn: 站长一声哨响，我们出发了。

meanings.meaning_en: a musical instrument in the shape of a tube, played by blowing
a long box in which a dead person is buried or burnt
a complicated official system that is annoying or confusing because it has a lot of rules, processes etc
meanings.example: the reduction of unnecessary bureaucracy
meanings.example_cn: 消除不必要的官僚体制

meanings.meaning_en: an imaginary or ancient creature that is large, ugly, and frightening
meanings.example: the remains of a prehistoric monster
meanings.example_cn: 史前怪兽的遗骸

meanings.meaning_en: someone who gets services or advice from a professional person, company, or organization
meanings.example: a meeting with an important client
meanings.example_cn: 与一位重要客户的会面

meanings.meaning_en: determined not to change your ideas, behaviour, opinions etc, even when other people think you are being unreasonable
meanings.example: He was the most obstinate man I’ve ever met.
meanings.example_cn: 他是我遇到过的最固执的人。

meanings.meaning_en: a quality that is inherent in something is a natural part of it and cannot be separated from it
meanings.example: Every business has its own inherent risks.
meanings.example_cn: 每笔生意本身都有风险。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that is fixed inside a house or building and is sold as part of the house
meanings.example: light fixtures
meanings.example_cn: 照明设备

meanings.meaning_en: to force yourself to be brave and do something you are afraid of doing
meanings.example: He finally plucked up enough courage to ask her out.
meanings.example_cn: 他终于鼓起勇气约她出去。

meanings.meaning_en: public argument or action for social or political change
meanings.example: mass agitation for political reform
meanings.example_cn: 要求政治改革的大骚动

meanings.meaning_en: the structure consisting of all the bones in a human or animal body
meanings.example: the human skeleton
meanings.example_cn: 人体骨骼

meanings.meaning_en: the top part of your leg, between your knee and your hip
meanings.example: The shorts are so small I can't fit my thighs into any of them.
meanings.example_cn: 短裤太小了，我的大腿塞不进去。

meanings.meaning_en: a plant grown to produce grain, for example wheat, rice etc
meanings.example: cereal crops
meanings.example_cn: 谷类作物

meanings.meaning_en: (of furniture, jewellery, etc.) old and often valuable
meanings.example: an antique rosewood desk
meanings.example_cn: 古董红木书桌

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of furniture, jewellery etc that was made a very long time ago and is therefore valuable
meanings.example: The palace is full of priceless antiques.
meanings.example_cn: 宫殿里到处都是价值连城的古董。

meanings.meaning_en: a process in which you make a judgment about a person or situation, or the judgment you make
meanings.example: a reading assessment test
meanings.example_cn: 阅读评估测试

meanings.meaning_en: to be the parts that together form sth
meanings.example: We must redefine what constitutes a family.
meanings.example_cn: 我们必须对家庭的构成重新定义。

meanings.meaning_en: a dog that is fast and has a good sense of smell, used for hunting
meanings.example: Rainey's chief interest in life is hunting with hounds.
meanings.example_cn: 雷尼一生中的主要嗜好是带着猎犬去打猎。

meanings.meaning_en: the low part at the edge of a road where water collects and flows away
meanings.example: The gutters were blocked and overflowing.
meanings.example_cn: 排水沟堵住了，水都溢出来了。

meanings.meaning_en: something that you say, do, or give in order to express your respect or admiration for someone
meanings.example: This book is a fitting tribute to the bravery of the pioneers.
meanings.example_cn: 本书是对先驱们大无畏精神恰如其分的献礼。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a particular number when added together
meanings.example: The crowd numbered more than a thousand.
meanings.example_cn: 聚集的人群共计一千多人。

meanings.meaning_en: used in the official names of some countries, groups of countries, or parts of countries
meanings.example: ...the Commonwealth of Australia.
meanings.example_cn: …澳大利亚联邦。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure with a curved top that is supported by straight sides, sometimes forming an entrance or built as a monument
meanings.example: Go through the arch and follow the path.
meanings.example_cn: 穿过拱门沿小径往前走。

meanings.meaning_en: to form or make something form a curved shape
meanings.example: Two rows of trees arched over the driveway.
meanings.example_cn: 车道两旁树木交错，形成一个拱顶。

meanings.meaning_en: a roof or ceiling that consists of several arches that are joined together, especially in a church
meanings.example: ...the vault of a great cathedral.
meanings.example_cn: 一座大教堂的拱顶

meanings.meaning_en: a heavy silver-white poisonous metal that is liquid at ordinary temperatures, and is used in thermometers .It is a chemical element
meanings.example: Mercury is used in batteries, pesticides, and thermometers.
meanings.example_cn: 水银用于电池、杀虫剂与温度计中。

meanings.meaning_en: to strengthen the position of power or success that you have, so that it becomes more effective or continues for longer
meanings.example: The company has consolidated its position as the country’s leading gas supplier.
meanings.example_cn: 这家公司巩固了作为该国主要煤气供应商的地位。

meanings.meaning_en: not involved in a particular situation, and therefore able to give a fair opinion or piece of advice
meanings.example: We offer impartial advice on tax and insurance.
meanings.example_cn: 我们就税收和保险问题提供公充的建议。

meanings.meaning_en: a formal agreement, especially between countries, about particular rules or behaviour
meanings.example: ...the U.N. convention on climate change.
meanings.example_cn: …关于气候变化的联合国公约。

meanings.meaning_en: a nobleman of the highest rank
meanings.example: the Duke of Edinburgh
meanings.example_cn: 爱丁堡公爵

meanings.meaning_en: a male chicken
meanings.example: I heard a rooster crow.
meanings.example_cn: 我听见雄鸡啼叫。

meanings.meaning_en: a room where television and radio programmes are made and broadcast or where music is recorded
meanings.example: a recording studio in Nashville
meanings.example_cn: 在纳什维尔的一间录音室

meanings.meaning_en: the money that you receive for the work that you do
meanings.example: an employee’s average weekly earnings
meanings.example_cn: 雇员的平均周薪

meanings.meaning_en: a tool, especially one used for outdoor physical work
meanings.example: ...writing implements.
meanings.example_cn: …书写用具。

meanings.meaning_en: to take action or make changes that you have officially decided should happen
meanings.example: We have decided to implement the committee’s recommendations in full.
meanings.example_cn: 我们已决定全面实施委员会提出的建议。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of metal or other material that is in the process of being worked on or made or has actually been cut or shaped by a hand tool or machine
meanings.example: The workpiece is already on the lathe.
meanings.example_cn: 工件已经上了车床。

meanings.meaning_en: to fight against an enemy
meanings.example: to combat crime/terrorism/inflation/disease
meanings.example_cn: 打击犯罪／打击恐怖主义／抑制通货膨胀／与疾病作斗争

meanings.meaning_en: to give a particular quality to something
meanings.example: Use a piece of fresh ginger to impart a East Asian flavour to simple ingredients.
meanings.example_cn: 用一片鲜姜给简单的原料添上东亚的风味。

meanings.meaning_en: to supply power or energy to a machine, an atom, etc.
to protect a person or animal from a disease by giving them a vaccine
meanings.example: All children should be vaccinated against measles.
meanings.example_cn: 所有儿童都应该接种麻疹疫苗。

meanings.meaning_en: to give something a particular taste or more taste
meanings.example: Lime preserved in salt is a North African speciality which is used to flavour chicken dishes.
meanings.example_cn: 用盐腌的酸橙是用来给鸡肉调味的一种北非特产。

meanings.meaning_en: a material or object which does not allow electricity, heat, or sound to pass through it
meanings.example: Wood is an excellent insulator.
meanings.example_cn: 木材是很好的绝缘体。

meanings.meaning_en: a pattern or structure made of long pieces of wood, plastic etc that cross each other so that the spaces between them are shaped like diamonds
meanings.example: We were crawling along the narrow steel lattice of the bridge.
meanings.example_cn: 我们沿着大桥窄窄的钢制格子爬行着。

meanings.meaning_en: a kind of small white pigeon often used as a sign of peace
meanings.example: A dove cooed softly.
meanings.example_cn: 一只鸽子轻柔地咕咕叫。

meanings.meaning_en: to make known something that was previously secret or unknown
meanings.example: He may be prosecuted for revealing secrets about the security agency.
meanings.example_cn: 他可能因泄露安全部门的机密而被起诉。

meanings.meaning_en: a large area of flat land that is higher than the land around it
meanings.example: A broad valley opened up leading to a high, flat plateau of cultivated land.
meanings.example_cn: 一个宽阔的山谷展开，通向一片平坦的高原耕地。

meanings.meaning_en: (of buildings, mountains, etc.) very high and impressive
meanings.example: He stayed at the Four Seasons Hotel, from whose lofty heights he could see across New York.
meanings.example_cn: 他住在四季酒店，从酒店高处可以看到纽约的全景。

meanings.meaning_en: to be much taller than the people or things around you
meanings.example: The cliffs towered above them.
meanings.example_cn: 悬崖峭壁高耸于他们上方。

meanings.meaning_en: the height of a place, especially its height above sea level
meanings.example: The city is at an elevation of 2 000 metres.
meanings.example_cn: 这座城市海拔2000米。

meanings.meaning_en: to become involved in an argument, fight, or other difficult situation in order to change what happens
meanings.example: The army will have to intervene to prevent further fighting.
meanings.example_cn: 军队将不得不干预以阻止进一步的战斗。

meanings.meaning_en: not interesting
meanings.example: Government reports tend to make dry reading.
meanings.example_cn: 政府报告读起来往往枯燥无味。

meanings.meaning_en: a small bitter egg-shaped black or green fruit, used as food and for making oil
meanings.example: ...a pile of black olives.
meanings.example_cn: …一堆黑橄榄。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling or an opinion, especially one based on emotions
meanings.example: the spread of nationalist sentiments
meanings.example_cn: 民族主义情绪的传播

meanings.meaning_en: the way you notice things, especially with the senses
meanings.example: our perception of reality
meanings.example_cn: 我们对现实的认识

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling that you get from one of your five senses, especially the sense of touch
meanings.example: One sign of a heart attack is a tingling sensation in the left arm.
meanings.example_cn: 心脏病发作的一个征兆是左臂有刺痛感。

meanings.meaning_en: a public holiday in the US and in Canada when families have a large meal together to celebrate and be thankful for food, health, families etc
meanings.example: We always eat turkey on Thanksgiving.
meanings.example_cn: 我们过感恩节时总是吃火鸡。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone very cold
meanings.example: The wind blew across her body, chilling her wet skin.
meanings.example_cn: 风吹在她身上，她湿漉漉的皮肤感到非常寒冷。

meanings.meaning_en: to describe something in a general way, giving the main points but not the details
meanings.example: The new president outlined plans to deal with crime, drugs, and education.
meanings.example_cn: 新总统概述了解决犯罪、毒品和教育问题的计划。

meanings.meaning_en: an idea, belief, or opinion
meanings.example: She had no notion what he meant.
meanings.example_cn: 她根本不明白他是什么意思。

meanings.meaning_en: an idea about what something is like, or a general understanding of something
meanings.example: the conception of parliamentary democracy
meanings.example_cn: 议会民主的概念

meanings.meaning_en: giving only the main points of sth, not the details
meanings.example: a summary financial statement
meanings.example_cn: 财务汇总报表

meanings.meaning_en: to form a general principle or opinion after considering only a small number of facts or examples
meanings.example: She has a tendency to generalize from her husband to all men.
meanings.example_cn: 她总爱把自己对丈夫的看法推及所有的男人。

meanings.meaning_en: to press something into a soft surface so that a mark or pattern appears on it
meanings.example: patterns impressed in the clay
meanings.example_cn: 压印在黏土上的图案

meanings.meaning_en: to repair sth that has been damaged or broken so that it can be used again
meanings.example: Could you mend my bike for me?
meanings.example_cn: 你能帮我修一下自行车吗？

meanings.meaning_en: an exact copy of something that you can use in the same way
meanings.example: She kept both the duplicate and the original.
meanings.example_cn: 她把复制本和原本都保留着。

meanings.meaning_en: to copy something exactly
meanings.example: New copies of the form can be duplicated from a master copy.
meanings.example_cn: 可以用原件来复制新的表格。

meanings.meaning_en: a problem or situation that makes something more difficult to understand or deal with
meanings.example: The fact that the plane was late added a further complication to our journey.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机误点给我们的旅行带来了更大的麻烦。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being complicated
meanings.example: a design of great complexity
meanings.example_cn: 一项非常复杂的设计

meanings.meaning_en: a country, area, or organization that is controlled by or is dependent on another larger one
meanings.example: a satellite country
meanings.example_cn: 卫星国

meanings.meaning_en: a part at the end of a book containing additional information
meanings.example: See Appendix 2.6.
meanings.example_cn: 见附录2.6。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of something, especially money, in addition to the usual, basic, or necessary amount
meanings.example: I earn extra for working on Sunday.
meanings.example_cn: 我星期天工作挣外快。

meanings.meaning_en: used to add more information to what you have just said, or to introduce a new subject that you have just thought of
meanings.example: Incidentally, where were you born?
meanings.example_cn: 顺便问一下，你在哪儿出生的？

meanings.meaning_en: electricity that is put into a piece of electrical equipment such as a battery
meanings.example: Leave the battery on charge all night.
meanings.example_cn: 让电池充一晚上的电

meanings.meaning_en: to fill a glass
meanings.example: Please charge your glasses and drink a toast to the bride and groom!
meanings.example_cn: 请各位斟满酒杯向新娘、新郎敬酒！

meanings.meaning_en: less than zero
meanings.example: a negative trade balance
meanings.example_cn: 贸易逆差

meanings.meaning_en: the gradual destruction of metal by the effect of water, chemicals etc or a substance such as rust produced by this process
meanings.example: They are sprayed with oil to prevent corrosion.
meanings.example_cn: 它们被喷了油以防腐蚀。

meanings.meaning_en: the process by which rock or soil is gradually destroyed by wind, rain, or the sea
meanings.example: the problem of soil erosion
meanings.example_cn: 水土流失的问题

meanings.meaning_en: connected with, but less important than, something else
meanings.example: The marketing department has always played a subsidiary role to the sales department.
meanings.example_cn: 营销部一直都扮演着销售部的辅助角色。

meanings.meaning_en: to teach a person or team the skills they need for a sport
meanings.example: Nigel coaches a cricket team in his spare time.
meanings.example_cn: 奈杰尔业余时间担任一个板球队的教练。

meanings.meaning_en: to be suitable for sth; to match sth
meanings.example: Does this answer your requirements?
meanings.example_cn: 这个符合你的要求吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to appear or come out from somewhere
meanings.example: The flowers emerge in the spring.
meanings.example_cn: 花儿在春天开放。

meanings.meaning_en: always doing what you are told to do, or what the law, a rule etc says you must do
meanings.example: an obedient child
meanings.example_cn: 听话的孩子

meanings.meaning_en: when someone does what they are told to do, or what a law, rule etc says they must do
meanings.example: obedience classes for dogs and their owners
meanings.example_cn: 为狗和主人安排的服从训练课

meanings.meaning_en: money paid by someone who is divorced to their former wife or husband
meanings.example: They have to find the fathers who abandon their children and make them pay maintenance.
meanings.example_cn: 他们必须找到那些抛弃子女的父亲，让他们支付抚养费。

meanings.meaning_en: a refusal to give official permission for something, or the right to refuse to give such permission
meanings.example: The Senate had a sufficient majority to override the presidential veto (= not accept his refusal ).
meanings.example_cn: 参议院有足够的多数票可以推翻总统的否决。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement saying that something is not true
meanings.example: The government issued an official denial of the rumour.
meanings.example_cn: 政府发表了正式声明，否认谣言。

meanings.meaning_en: a religion of east and central Asia, based on the teaching of Gautama Buddha
meanings.example: Mr White has converted to Buddhism.
meanings.example_cn: 怀特先生已改信佛教。

meanings.meaning_en: to give all your attention and effort to one particular thing
meanings.example: The actress now dedicates herself to children’s charity work.
meanings.example_cn: 这名女演员现在致力于儿童慈善工作。

meanings.meaning_en: to praise someone in order to please them or get something from them, even though you do not mean it
meanings.example: Perry would always flatter Mrs. Mitchell by praising her cooking.
meanings.example_cn: 佩里常常奉承米切尔太太，称赞她的烹调手艺。

meanings.meaning_en: a large yellow-brown tropical fruit or its sweet juicy yellow flesh
meanings.example: pineapple chunks
meanings.example_cn: 菠萝块

meanings.meaning_en: a line where two pieces of cloth, leather etc have been stitched together
meanings.example: She was repairing Billy’s trousers, where the seam had come undone.
meanings.example_cn: 她在补比利裤子的开线处。

meanings.meaning_en: an area of countryside or land of a particular type, used especially when talking about its appearance
meanings.example: the beauty of the New England landscape
meanings.example_cn: 新英格兰风光之美

meanings.meaning_en: a building or structure with parts that turn around in the wind, used for producing electrical power or crushing grain
meanings.example: The sails of the windmill are now at rest.
meanings.example_cn: 风车的帆叶现在静止不动了。

meanings.meaning_en: slightly fat in a fairly pleasant way – used especially about women or children, often to avoid saying the word ‘fat’
meanings.example: The nurse was a cheerful plump woman.
meanings.example_cn: 那护士是个性格开朗、体形丰满的女人。

meanings.meaning_en: a large quantity of something
meanings.example: an abundance of wavy red hair
meanings.example_cn: 浓密的红色鬈发

meanings.meaning_en: feelings of anger and surprise because you feel insulted or unfairly treated
meanings.example: To his indignation, Charles found that his name was not on the list.
meanings.example_cn: 查尔斯发现他的名字没有出现在名单上，这让他深感愤慨。

meanings.meaning_en: to break suddenly into very small pieces, or to make something break in this way
meanings.example: The explosion shattered the building.
meanings.example_cn: 这次爆炸把大楼炸成一片废墟。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to or involving molecules
meanings.example: ...the molecular structure of fuel.
meanings.example_cn: …燃料的分子结构。

meanings.meaning_en: an arm or leg
meanings.example: an artificial limb
meanings.example_cn: 假肢

meanings.meaning_en: to use one cost, payment or situation in order to cancel or reduce the effect of another
meanings.example: He was able to offset his travel expenses against tax.
meanings.example_cn: 他可以用旅费抵税。

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a whole number in mathematics, such as ½ or ¾
meanings.example: The students had a grasp of decimals, percentages and fractions.
meanings.example_cn: 学生们掌握了小数、百分数和分数。

meanings.meaning_en: to take someone’s attention away from something by making them look at or listen to something else
meanings.example: Try not to distract the other students.
meanings.example_cn: 尽量不要让其他学生分心。

meanings.meaning_en: one of a series of regular payments that you make until you have paid all the money you owe
a serious disagreement that divides an organization or group of people into smaller groups
meanings.example: The argument could lead to a damaging split in the party.
meanings.example_cn: 这场争吵可能会导致党内出现分裂，对该党产生不利影响。

meanings.meaning_en: to remove sth from sth larger; to become separated from sth
meanings.example: Please detach and fill out the application form.
meanings.example_cn: 请撕下申请表并填好。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of separating a country into two or more independent countries
meanings.example: the partition of Germany after the war
meanings.example_cn: 战后对德国的分割

meanings.meaning_en: the way in which you see the information from a computer program on a screen, or how you type information into the program
meanings.example: ...the development of better user interfaces.
meanings.example_cn: …更好用户界面的开发。

meanings.meaning_en: to pass a message from one person or place to another
meanings.example: He quickly relayed this news to the other members of staff.
meanings.example_cn: 他马上就把这个消息转告给了其他员工。

meanings.meaning_en: to separate and go in different directions
meanings.example: The parallel lines appear to diverge.
meanings.example_cn: 这些平行线像是岔开了。

meanings.meaning_en: waste paper, cans etc that people have thrown away and left on the ground in a public place
meanings.example: People who drop litter can be fined in some cities.
meanings.example_cn: 在有些城市，乱扔垃圾的人会被罚款。

meanings.meaning_en: to leave waste paper, cans etc on the ground in a public place
meanings.example: A litter of notes, papers, and textbooks were strewn on the desk.
meanings.example_cn: 一堆笔记、考卷和课本乱七八糟地摊在桌子上。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially end a law, system etc, especially one that has existed for a long time
meanings.example: Slavery was abolished in the US in the 19th century.
meanings.example_cn: 美国于19世纪废除了奴隶制。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of a violent group of criminals
meanings.example: ...a gangster film.
meanings.example_cn: …一部黑帮片。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely
meanings.example: We were extraordinarily lucky.
meanings.example_cn: 我们极其幸运。

meanings.meaning_en: to move somewhere quickly and suddenly
meanings.example: Ellen flew across the room and greeted her uncle with a kiss.
meanings.example_cn: 埃伦从房间那头飞奔过来，给了她叔叔一个吻。

meanings.meaning_en: the science or practice of flying in aircraft
meanings.example: ...the aviation industry.
meanings.example_cn: …航空工业。

meanings.meaning_en: to allow yourself to have or do sth that you like, especially sth that is considered bad for you
meanings.example: He returned to Britain so that he could indulge his passion for football...
meanings.example_cn: 他重返英国，为的是可以尽情释放自己对足球的激情。

meanings.meaning_en: to bring people together in a large group, especially roughly
meanings.example: The prisoners were herded together.
meanings.example_cn: 犯人们被集合起来。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something seem bigger or louder, especially using special equipment
meanings.example: At the Sheffield arena, the speakers were magnified ten times on a giant screen.
meanings.example_cn: 在谢菲尔德体育馆，演讲者在一个巨大的屏幕上被放大了十倍。

meanings.meaning_en: a copy of something
meanings.example: She wore an imitation of a sailor’s hat.
meanings.example_cn: 她戴着一顶仿制的水手帽。

meanings.meaning_en: to be designed or made in a way that is copied from something else
meanings.example: The exam system is patterned after the one used in Japan.
meanings.example_cn: 这种考试制度是仿效日本建立的。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a copy of a picture, piece of text, etc.
meanings.example: The effect has proved hard to reproduce.
meanings.example_cn: 这种效果经证实很难再造。

meanings.meaning_en: all of someone’s property and money, especially everything that is left after they die
meanings.example: The property is part of the deceased’s estate.
meanings.example_cn: 该产业是死者遗产的一部分。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it difficult for someone to do something
meanings.example: She tried to run, but was hampered by her heavy suitcase.
meanings.example_cn: 她想跑，但沉重的旅行箱拖累了她。

meanings.meaning_en: to make it difficult for someone to do something that they want or need to do
meanings.example: The charity is handicapped by lack of funds.
meanings.example_cn: 这个慈善机构因为缺乏资金难以开展工作。

meanings.meaning_en: easy to use or to do
meanings.example: a handy little tool
meanings.example_cn: 好用的小工具

meanings.meaning_en: an illegal action or a crime
meanings.example: His solicitor said he committed the offence because he was heavily in debt.
meanings.example_cn: 他的律师说他犯罪是因为欠下巨债。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a big mistake, especially because you have been careless or stupid
meanings.example: They blundered badly when they gave him the job.
meanings.example_cn: 他们犯了大错，让他做这份工作。

meanings.meaning_en: a careless or stupid mistake
meanings.example: to make a terrible blunder
meanings.example_cn: 犯大错

meanings.meaning_en: something that gives a clear idea of what something else is like
meanings.example: We believe the polls are an accurate mirror of public opinion.
meanings.example_cn: 我们相信民意测验是准确反映公众意见的一面镜子。

meanings.meaning_en: a large structure used for the controlled production of nuclear energy
meanings.example: They shut down the nuclear reactor for safety reasons.
meanings.example_cn: 出于安全原因他们关闭了核反应堆。

meanings.meaning_en: if a sound echoes, you hear it again because it was made near something such as a wall or hill
meanings.example: The sound of an engine echoed back from the thick forest.
meanings.example_cn: 从茂密的森林里传来引擎的回声。

meanings.meaning_en: to disagree with something, especially by saying that the opposite is true
meanings.example: Deborah opened her mouth to contradict, but closed it again.
meanings.example_cn: 黛博拉张口想要反驳，但又把嘴闭上了。

meanings.meaning_en: to spread an idea, belief etc to many people
meanings.example: The group launched a website to propagate its ideas.
meanings.example_cn: 这个团体建了一个网站来宣扬他们的主张。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep changing your position in bed because you cannot sleep
meanings.example: I’ve been tossing and turning all night.
meanings.example_cn: 我一晚上辗转反侧。

meanings.meaning_en: an official order or decision, especially one made by the ruler of a country
meanings.example: The Emperor issued the decree repealing martial law.
meanings.example_cn: 皇帝下诏令取消了军事管制。

meanings.meaning_en: soft cloth, usually made of cotton or wool, used for making clothes
meanings.example: a flannel shirt
meanings.example_cn: 法兰绒衬衫

meanings.meaning_en: a part of a tube or pipe that opens and shuts like a door to control the flow of liquid, gas, air etc passing through it
meanings.example: heart valves
meanings.example_cn: 心脏瓣膜

meanings.meaning_en: to come from a particular place or start in a particular situation
meanings.example: How did the plan originate?
meanings.example_cn: 这个计划最早是怎么想到的？

meanings.meaning_en: a man who has been chosen to speak officially for a group, organization, or government
meanings.example: a White House spokesman
meanings.example_cn: 白宫发言人

meanings.meaning_en: a way of expressing or getting rid of strong feelings
meanings.example: Is football a good outlet for men’s aggression?
meanings.example_cn: 足球是男人宣泄好斗情绪的有效途径吗？

meanings.meaning_en: the extent to which sth happens or has an effect
meanings.example: an area with a high incidence of crime
meanings.example_cn: 犯罪率高的地区

meanings.meaning_en: to produce or create sth
meanings.example: to generate electricity/heat/power
meanings.example_cn: 发电；产生热 / 动力

meanings.meaning_en: a list of goods that have been supplied or work that has been done, showing how much you owe for them
meanings.example: We will then send you an invoice for the total course fees.
meanings.example_cn: 然后我们将寄给你一张全部课程费用的发票。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine or piece of equipment that finds or measures something
meanings.example: a smoke detector
meanings.example_cn: 烟雾探测器

meanings.meaning_en: to burn brightly
meanings.example: A great fire flamed in an open fireplace.
meanings.example_cn: 敞开的壁炉里火烧得很旺。

meanings.meaning_en: to use your power, influence etc in order to make something happen
meanings.example: They exerted considerable influence within the school.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在校内施加了很大的影响力。

meanings.meaning_en: shining in the dark
meanings.example: luminous paint
meanings.example_cn: 发光涂料

meanings.meaning_en: to send out a line of light, heat, energy etc
meanings.example: The sun beamed through the clouds.
meanings.example_cn: 阳光穿透了云层。

meanings.meaning_en: causing movement or action
meanings.example: Water provided the motive power for the mill.
meanings.example_cn: 水为磨坊提供了动力。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that changes some other form of power directly into electricity
meanings.example: bicycle lights powered by a dynamo
meanings.example_cn: 以直流发电机供电的自行车车灯

meanings.meaning_en: to make a series of short loud sounds when hitting against sth hard; to make sth do this
meanings.example: Every time a bus went past, the windows rattled.
meanings.example_cn: 每逢公共汽车经过这里，窗户都格格作响。

meanings.meaning_en: a chemical compound that contains two atoms of oxygen and one atom of another chemical element
meanings.example: carbon/sulphur dioxide
meanings.example_cn: 二氧化碳／硫

meanings.meaning_en: food used to attract fish, animals, or birds so that you can catch them
meanings.example: We used worms as bait.
meanings.example_cn: 我们用小虫子作诱饵。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or coming after something else
meanings.example: These skills were passed on to subsequent generations.
meanings.example_cn: 这些技能代代相传。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say that although something is true of one thing, it is not true of another
meanings.example: The old system was fairly complicated whereas the new system is really very simple.
meanings.example_cn: 旧系统相当复杂，而新系统却很简单。

meanings.meaning_en: a child or young person
meanings.example: Other youngsters are not so lucky.
meanings.example_cn: 其他的年轻人没有这么幸运。

meanings.meaning_en: someone’s child or children – often used humorously
meanings.example: a young mother trying to control her offspring
meanings.example_cn: 一个想管住自己孩子的年轻妈妈

meanings.meaning_en: the desire to harm someone because you hate them
meanings.example: James bore her no malice (= did not feel any malice towards her ) .
meanings.example_cn: 詹姆斯对她并无恶意。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of wanting to hurt or upset people, for example because you are jealous or think you have been unfairly treated
meanings.example: She broke it just out of spite.
meanings.example_cn: 她就是出于恶意把它打破的。

meanings.meaning_en: a very frightening dream
meanings.example: a recurring nightmare
meanings.example_cn: 一再出现的噩梦

meanings.meaning_en: a wooden bar used for keeping two animals together, especially cattle, when they are pulling heavy loads
meanings.example: the yoke of imperialism
meanings.example_cn: 帝国主义的枷锁

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent someone from having something, especially something that they need or should have
meanings.example: A lot of these children have been deprived of a normal home life.
meanings.example_cn: 这些孩子中有许多被剥夺了正常的家庭生活。

meanings.meaning_en: having many mountains
meanings.example: the mountainous coast of Wales
meanings.example_cn: 威尔士多山的海岸

meanings.meaning_en: (of weather, etc.) with a lot of wind
meanings.example: It’s too windy for a picnic.
meanings.example_cn: 风太大，不适合野餐。

meanings.meaning_en: having many different uses
meanings.example: The potato is an extremely versatile vegetable.
meanings.example_cn: 马铃薯是一种用途极广的蔬菜。

meanings.meaning_en: to cook something slowly in liquid
meanings.example: Stew the apple and blackberries to make a thick pulp.
meanings.example_cn: 把苹果和黑莓炖成浓稠的果浆。

meanings.meaning_en: a hot meal made by cooking meat and vegetables slowly in liquid for a long time
meanings.example: beef stew
meanings.example_cn: 炖牛肉

meanings.meaning_en: a thing used for washing floors, consisting of a long stick with threads of thick string or a piece of sponge fastened to one end
meanings.example: a mop and bucket
meanings.example_cn: 拖把和水桶

meanings.meaning_en: to cut or divide something into two equal pieces
meanings.example: Halve the potatoes lengthwise.
meanings.example_cn: 把马铃薯竖着切成两半。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a body, a design, an object, etc.) having two halves, parts or sides that are the same in size and shape
meanings.example: The pattern was perfectly symmetrical.
meanings.example_cn: 该图案完全对称。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being symmetrical
meanings.example: the symmetry of the design
meanings.example_cn: 图案的对称性

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone angry, especially deliberately
meanings.example: Paul tried to provoke Fletch into a fight.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗试图激怒弗莱琪打一架。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel angry or upset about a situation or about something that someone has done, especially because you think that it is not fair
meanings.example: Paul resented the fact that Carol didn’t trust him.
meanings.example_cn: 保罗非常气愤，因为卡萝尔不信任他。

meanings.meaning_en: the state of being arranged in a line with something or parallel to something
meanings.example: the geometrical alignment of the Sun, Moon, and Earth at the eclipse
meanings.example_cn: 日蚀或月蚀发生时太阳、月亮和地球成几何直线的排列

meanings.meaning_en: to state firmly that something is true
meanings.example: She continued to assert that she was innocent.
meanings.example_cn: 她仍然坚称自己无辜。

meanings.meaning_en: to state publicly that something is true
meanings.example: The general affirmed rumors of an attack.
meanings.example_cn: 将军证实了袭击的传闻。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which there is not enough of something that people need
meanings.example: There is no heating available due to fuel shortages.
meanings.example_cn: 因为燃料短缺，所以没有供暖。

meanings.meaning_en: a boat that carries people or goods across a river or a narrow area of water
meanings.example: They had recrossed the River Gambia by ferry.
meanings.example_cn: 他们乘船又一次渡过了冈比亚河。

meanings.meaning_en: to carry people or things a short distance from one place to another in a boat or other vehicle
meanings.example: The ship was used to ferry supplies to Russia during the war.
meanings.example_cn: 这艘船在战时被用来往俄罗斯 运送补给。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of being jealous
meanings.example: Sexual jealousy is a common motive for murder.
meanings.example_cn: 性嫉妒是常见的谋杀动机。

meanings.meaning_en: a grey European bird that puts its eggs in other birds’  nests and that makes a sound that sounds like its name
meanings.example: In England the cuckoo is the herald of spring.
meanings.example_cn: 在英国杜鹃鸟是报春的使者。

meanings.meaning_en: an action that you take when you know there is a risk but when you hope that the result will be a success
meanings.example: Ellen had to admit the gamble had paid off (= succeeded ).
meanings.example_cn: 埃伦不得不承认这一次赌赢了。

meanings.meaning_en: to risk losing sth in the hope of being successful
meanings.example: It was wrong to gamble with our children's future.
meanings.example_cn: 拿孩子们的未来冒险是错误的。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which it is difficult or impossible to move because there are so many cars or people
meanings.example: Sorry we’re late. We got stuck in a traffic jam.
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，我们来晚了，路上堵车。

meanings.meaning_en: If vehicles jam a road, there are so many of them that they cannot move.
meanings.example: Hundreds of departing motorists jammed the roads.
meanings.example_cn: 数百名打算驾车离开的司机堵住了道路。

meanings.meaning_en: easily or clearly heard, seen, felt, etc.
meanings.example: The outline of the ship became more distinct.
meanings.example_cn: 船的轮廓变得更加清晰了。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of music for one performer
meanings.example: a gorgeous piano solo
meanings.example_cn: 一首极其美妙的钢琴独奏曲

meanings.meaning_en: a ruler who has complete power over a country, especially one whose power has been gained by force
meanings.example: the downfall of the hated dictator
meanings.example_cn: 遭人痛恨的独裁者的垮台

meanings.meaning_en: to stay somewhere a little longer, especially because you do not want to leave
meanings.example: I spent a week at Kandersteg and could happily have lingered on.
meanings.example_cn: 我在坎德施泰格逗留了一个星期，本来还可以开开心心地多待几天。

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh at someone and make jokes in order to have fun by embarrassing them, either in a friendly way or in an unkind way
meanings.example: Don’t get upset. I was only teasing .
meanings.example_cn: 别生气，我只是在逗你玩。

meanings.meaning_en: a small fast military plane that can destroy other planes
meanings.example: He was shot down by enemy fighters.
meanings.example_cn: 他被敌军战斗机击落。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who publicly fights for and defends an aim or principle, such as the rights of a group of people
meanings.example: a champion of women’s rights
meanings.example_cn: 妇女权利捍卫者

meanings.meaning_en: the ability to understand and realize what people or situations are really like
meanings.example: a writer of great insight
meanings.example_cn: 有深刻洞察力的作家

meanings.meaning_en: a hole or space inside something
meanings.example: Put herbs inside the body cavity of the fish.
meanings.example_cn: 把香草放进鱼肚里。

meanings.meaning_en: a soft sweet food made from fruit juice and gelatin
meanings.example: raspberry jelly
meanings.example_cn: 山莓果冻

meanings.meaning_en: to encourage people to support something in an active way
meanings.example: an attempt to mobilize popular opinion
meanings.example_cn: 鼓动公众舆论的尝试

meanings.meaning_en: a fatty or oily substance that comes off meat when it is cooked, or off food made using butter or oil
meanings.example: plates covered with grease
meanings.example_cn: 油腻的盘子

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which people behave violently in public
meanings.example: There were disturbances in the crowd as fans left the stadium.
meanings.example_cn: 球迷离开体育场时，人群中发生了骚乱。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to movement
meanings.example: kinetic energy
meanings.example_cn: 动能

meanings.meaning_en: the eastern part of the world, especially China and Japan
the act of finding the position of something
meanings.example: The main problem for engineers was the location of underground rivers in the area.
meanings.example_cn: 工程师们面临的主要难题是要确定该地区地下河的位置。

meanings.meaning_en: a statement, especially in mathematics, that you can prove by showing that it has been correctly developed from facts
meanings.example: a mathematical theorem
meanings.example_cn: 数学定理

meanings.meaning_en: to pay money, usually once a year, to have copies of a newspaper or magazine sent to you, or to have some other service
meanings.example: My main reason for subscribing to New Scientist is to keep abreast of advances in science.
meanings.example_cn: 我订阅《新科学家》的主要原因是要跟上科学的进步。

meanings.meaning_en: the highest point of sth
meanings.example: His election as President represented the summit of his career.
meanings.example_cn: 他当选总统意味着他到达了事业的顶峰。

meanings.meaning_en: an object made out of stone, wood, clay etc by an artist
meanings.example: a sculpture of an elephant
meanings.example_cn: 一尊大象雕塑

meanings.meaning_en: the study or industry of making equipment, such as computers and televisions, that work electronically
meanings.example: an electronics engineer
meanings.example_cn: 电子工程师

meanings.meaning_en: a condition of the air in the Earth’s atmosphere , which affects the weather
meanings.example: A ridge of high pressure is building up strongly over the Atlantic.
meanings.example_cn: 一个强大的高压脊正在大西洋上空形成。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment that collects and stores electricity
meanings.example: The second resistor has been replaced by a capacitor.
meanings.example_cn: 第二个电阻已由一个电容所代替。

meanings.meaning_en: the property of a system that enables it to store electric charge
a small piece of metal or a wire that is used to send electricity through a system or through a person’s body
meanings.example: The monkeys have electrodes implanted into the brain to measure their brain activity.
meanings.example_cn: 这些猴子的脑中植入了电极，以监测其大脑活动。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose job is to connect or repair electrical wires or equipment
meanings.example: The electrician refitted my old radio set.
meanings.example_cn: 电工将我的旧收音机加以改装。

meanings.meaning_en: a message sent or received by telex
meanings.example: He sent a telex to the British High Commission in Delhi.
meanings.example_cn: 他给德里的英国高级专员公署发了份电传。

meanings.meaning_en: to start burning; to make a fire start burning
meanings.example: We watched as the fire slowly kindled.
meanings.example_cn: 我们看着火慢慢地燃烧起来。

meanings.meaning_en: the scientific study of the earth, including the origin and history of the rocks and soil of which the earth is made
meanings.example: He was visiting professor of geology at the University of Georgia.
meanings.example_cn: 他曾是佐治亚大学的地质学客座教授。

meanings.meaning_en: a room or area in a building that is under the level of the ground
meanings.example: They bought an old schoolhouse to live in and built a workshop in the basement.
meanings.example_cn: 他们买了座旧校舍居住，还在地下室建了个作坊。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the place in an area, country etc where something or someone is
meanings.example: their geographical proximity to Japan (= nearness to Japan )
meanings.example_cn: 它们和日本相邻的地理位置

meanings.meaning_en: someone, not usually a lawyer, who works as a judge in a local court of law, dealing with less serious crimes
meanings.example: She will face a local magistrate on Tuesday.
meanings.example_cn: 她将在星期二面见一位地方治安法官。

meanings.meaning_en: a legal arrangement by which you borrow money from a bank or similar organization in order to buy a house, and pay back the money over a period of years
meanings.example: Your building society or bank will help arrange a mortgage.
meanings.example_cn: 你加入的购房互助协会或银行将会给你安排抵押贷款。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a bank, etc. the legal right to own your house, land, etc. if you do not pay the money back that you have borrowed from the bank to buy the house or land
meanings.example: We mortgaged our house to start Paul’s business.
meanings.example_cn: 为了让保罗创业，我们把房子抵押出去了。

meanings.meaning_en: angry and deliberately unfriendly towards someone, and ready to argue with them
meanings.example: Southampton fans gave their former coach a hostile reception.
meanings.example_cn: 南安普敦队的球迷对球队的前任教练很不友善。

meanings.meaning_en: to speak or say something very quietly, using your breath rather than your voice
meanings.example: You don’t have to whisper, no one can hear us.
meanings.example_cn: 你不必轻声轻语，没人听得到我们说话。

meanings.meaning_en: to think or guess that something is smaller, cheaper, easier etc than it really is
meanings.example: We underestimated how long it would take to get there.
meanings.example_cn: 我们低估了到那里所需的时间。

meanings.meaning_en: a continuous low sound, like the noise of a river or of voices far away.
meanings.example: The piano music mixes with the murmur of conversation.
meanings.example_cn: 钢琴的弹奏声混杂着低低的交谈声。

meanings.meaning_en: equal in value, amount, meaning, importance, etc.
to officially arrange to join a school, university, or course, or to arrange for someone else to do this
meanings.example: You need to enroll before the end of August.
meanings.example_cn: 你必须在八月底前注册。

meanings.meaning_en: one of the round parts on the top of a cooker that produce heat
having gained a victory or success
meanings.example: the triumphant army
meanings.example_cn: 得胜的军队

meanings.example: the clatter of horses' hoofs
meanings.example_cn: 嗒嗒的马蹄声

meanings.meaning_en: beliefs or ideas about what is right and wrong and about how people should behave
meanings.example: the decline in standards of personal morality
meanings.example_cn: 个人道德标准的下降

meanings.meaning_en: an act of stealing something
meanings.example: There have been a number of thefts in the area.
meanings.example_cn: 该地区发生了几宗偷窃案。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone goes to a meeting, class etc, or an occasion when they go
meanings.example: The doctor will have a record of her attendances.
meanings.example_cn: 医生会记录她的出诊次数。

meanings.meaning_en: in the space or period of time separating two or more points, objects, etc. or two dates, events, etc.
meanings.example: The house was near a park but there was a road in between.
meanings.example_cn: 房子在一处公园附近，但两者之间隔着一条马路。

meanings.meaning_en: the yellow part in the centre of an egg
meanings.example: Only the yolk contains cholesterol.
meanings.example_cn: 只有蛋黄含胆固醇。

meanings.meaning_en: a tube containing explosive powder and a bullet that you put in a gun
meanings.example: Only four of the five spent cartridges were recovered by police.
meanings.example_cn: 5个子弹壳中只有4个被警方收回。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially prevent someone from leaving a place
meanings.example: Two suspects have been detained by the police for questioning .
meanings.example_cn: 两名嫌疑人被警方拘留审问。

meanings.meaning_en: used to emphasize that only one thing is involved
meanings.example: Completing the race is not just a simple matter of physical fitness.
meanings.example_cn: 跑完比赛不仅仅是纯粹的体力问题。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being simple and not complicated, especially when this is attractive or useful
meanings.example: Mona wrote with a beautiful simplicity of style.
meanings.example_cn: 莫娜的文笔朴实优美。

meanings.meaning_en: to perform a particular job, activity, or purpose in an organization, or to find someone or something to do this
meanings.example: Women fill 35% of senior management positions.
meanings.example_cn: 女性担任35%的高级管理职位。

meanings.meaning_en: a deep round container with a very narrow opening at the top and a handle, used for holding liquids
meanings.example: a five-gallon jug of beer
meanings.example_cn: 五加仑装的啤酒罐

meanings.meaning_en: a type of mathematics that uses letters and other signs to represent numbers and values
meanings.example: He was not good at algebra in middle school.
meanings.example_cn: 他中学时不擅长代数。

meanings.meaning_en: a lawyer
meanings.example: ...a prosecuting attorney.
meanings.example_cn: …一位公诉律师。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is directly below another person in rank, and who is officially in charge when that person is not there
meanings.example: the Deputy Secretary of State
