meanings.example_cn: 助理国务卿

meanings.meaning_en: typical of a particular group or thing
meanings.example: The latest incident is representative of a wider trend.
meanings.example_cn: 最近发生的事件代表了一个更大的趋势。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has been elected or chosen to speak, vote, or take decisions for a group
meanings.example: Around 350 delegates attended the conference.
meanings.example_cn: 大约有350名代表参加了大会。

meanings.meaning_en: a very large African monkey that is the largest of the apes
the great size or importance of something
meanings.example: an increase of this order of magnitude
meanings.example_cn: 如此大幅度的增长

meanings.meaning_en: when a lot of people are killed violently, especially people who cannot defend themselves
meanings.example: the only survivor of the massacre
meanings.example_cn: 这场大屠杀的唯一幸存者

meanings.meaning_en: to walk quickly with long steps
meanings.example: He strode toward her.
meanings.example_cn: 他大步向她走去。

meanings.meaning_en: a long step you make while you are walking
meanings.example: Paco reached the door in only three strides.
meanings.example_cn: 帕科三大步就走到了门口。

meanings.meaning_en: a group of officials who represent their government in a foreign country, or the building they work in
meanings.example: the American Embassy in Paris
meanings.example_cn: 美国驻巴黎大使馆

meanings.meaning_en: an important official who represents his or her government in a foreign country
meanings.example: the US ambassador to Spain
meanings.example_cn: 美国驻西班牙大使

meanings.meaning_en: a very large house
meanings.example: a beautiful country mansion
meanings.example_cn: 漂亮的乡村宅第

meanings.meaning_en: a very large number of people or things
meanings.example: I had never seen such a multitude of stars before.
meanings.example_cn: 我以前从未见过这么多的星星。

meanings.meaning_en: a plant that produces a grain used for making food or alcohol
meanings.example: ...fields of ripening wheat and barley.
meanings.example_cn: …快要成熟的小麦和大麦田。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to a large mass of land
meanings.example: the warming-up of continental interiors
meanings.example_cn: 内陆地区的变暖

meanings.meaning_en: a number that is too large to be calculated
meanings.example: In the equation below, as E goes to zero, n approaches infinity.
meanings.example_cn: 在下面的方程式中，E趋向于零时，n接近无穷大。

meanings.meaning_en: good quality beef, or a large thick piece of any good quality red meat
meanings.example: ...a steak sizzling on the grill.
meanings.example_cn: …一块儿在烤架上滋滋作响的牛排。

meanings.meaning_en: a large round container for collecting or storing liquids
meanings.example: a rainwater butt
meanings.example_cn: 接雨水的大桶

meanings.meaning_en: mostly or mainly
meanings.example: The state of Nevada is largely desert.
meanings.example_cn: 内华达州大部分是沙漠。

meanings.meaning_en: to a large degree – used when talking about differences
meanings.example: The quality of the applicants varies widely.
meanings.example_cn: 申请人的素质差异很大。

meanings.meaning_en: a wide open area of fairly flat land in North America which is covered in grass or wheat
meanings.example: Andrew traversed the prairie on horseback.
meanings.example_cn: 安德鲁骑马穿越大草原。

meanings.meaning_en: to break into pieces violently or noisily, or to make something do this by dropping, throwing, or hitting it
meanings.example: Vandals had smashed all the windows.
meanings.example_cn: 破坏分子打碎了所有的窗子。

meanings.meaning_en: to have air come suddenly and noisily out through your nose and mouth in a way that you cannot control, for example because you have a cold
meanings.example: She started coughing and sneezing.
meanings.example_cn: 她开始咳嗽、打喷嚏。

meanings.meaning_en: a small object that produces a flame for lighting cigarettes etc
meanings.example: a cigarette lighter
meanings.example_cn: 香烟打火机

meanings.meaning_en: to breathe in a noisy way through your mouth and nose while you are asleep
meanings.example: He could hear the old man snoring.
meanings.example_cn: 他听到老人在打鼾。

meanings.meaning_en: to separate grains of corn, wheat etc from the rest of the plant by beating it with a special tool or machine
meanings.example: The grain was still sown, cut and threshed as it was a hundred years ago.
meanings.example_cn: 谷物的播种、收割、脱粒方法还和一百年前一样。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something from a piece of metal by heating the metal and shaping it
meanings.example: swords forged from steel
meanings.example_cn: 用钢锻造的刀剑

meanings.meaning_en: a thing that makes sth possible or enables you to achieve sth
meanings.example: The only passport to success is hard work.
meanings.example_cn: 获得成功的唯一途径就是艰苦奋斗。

meanings.meaning_en: difficult or impossible to reach
meanings.example: In winter, the villages are inaccessible by road.
meanings.example_cn: 冬天时，进入这些村子的路很难走。

meanings.meaning_en: to prevent someone’s plans, efforts, or attempts from succeeding
meanings.example: Their attempts to speak to him were frustrated by the guards.
meanings.example_cn: 他们想跟他说话，但被警卫拦住了。

meanings.meaning_en: existing, but not yet very noticeable, active or well developed
meanings.example: The virus remains latent in the body for many years.
meanings.example_cn: 这种病毒会在体内潜伏许多年。

meanings.meaning_en: weak; easily damaged or broken
meanings.example: Human nature is frail.
meanings.example_cn: 人性脆弱。

meanings.meaning_en: weak and uncertain; easily destroyed or spoilt
meanings.example: The economy remains extremely fragile.
meanings.example_cn: 经济仍然极其脆弱。

meanings.meaning_en: (of food) pleasantly hard and dry
meanings.example: a crisp green salad
meanings.example_cn: 脆爽的蔬菜色拉

meanings.meaning_en: a substance that makes a chemical reaction happen more quickly without being changed itself
meanings.example: They hope his election will act as a catalyst for reform.
meanings.example_cn: 他们希望他的当选会成为改革的催化剂。

meanings.meaning_en: the activity of helping something to develop or increase
meanings.example: a society for the promotion of religious tolerance
meanings.example_cn: 一个促进宗教包容的团体

meanings.meaning_en: not caring or worrying about the possible bad or dangerous results of your actions
meanings.example: He was accused of causing death by reckless driving .
meanings.example_cn: 他被控因鲁莽驾驶致人死亡。

meanings.meaning_en: not having or showing good taste; not polite, elegant or well behaved
meanings.example: vulgar behaviour
meanings.example_cn: 粗俗的行为

meanings.meaning_en: very large, solid, and heavy
meanings.example: The bell is massive, weighing over 40 tons.
meanings.example_cn: 那口钟非常大，有40多吨重。

meanings.meaning_en: too strong and rough and likely to damage sth
meanings.example: My skin is quite sensitive and I find some soaps too harsh.
meanings.example_cn: 我的皮肤很敏感，我觉得有些肥皂刺激性太强。

meanings.meaning_en: a thick tropical forest with many large plants growing very close together
meanings.example: the Amazon jungle
meanings.example_cn: 亚马孙丛林

meanings.meaning_en: to do a particular job
to be so full that the contents go over the sides
meanings.example: The drains flooded and water overflowed down the main street.
meanings.example_cn: 下水道被淹，水溢到了大街上。

meanings.meaning_en: to feel a sharp stinging pain in a part of your body
meanings.example: My eyes were smarting with the smoke.
meanings.example_cn: 我的眼睛被烟熏得发痛。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a small hole in something using something sharp
meanings.example: Prick the sausages before you grill them.
meanings.example_cn: 烤之前把香肠戳孔。

meanings.meaning_en: a slight pain you get when something sharp goes into your skin
meanings.example: I didn’t feel the prick of the needle.
meanings.example_cn: 我感觉不到针的刺痛。

meanings.meaning_en: after a particular event or time
meanings.example: 10,000 men had volunteered by the end of September; thereafter, approximately 1,000 men enlisted each month.
meanings.example_cn: 到9月底时已有10,000人志愿参军，此后，每个月差不多有1,000人应征入伍。

meanings.meaning_en: the physical force that makes two metal objects pull towards each other or push each other apart
meanings.example: ...his research in electricity and magnetism.
meanings.example_cn: …他在电、磁领域的研究。

meanings.meaning_en: a hard shiny white substance that is used for making expensive plates, cups etc
meanings.example: a porcelain vase
meanings.example_cn: 瓷花瓶

meanings.meaning_en: a list of special words and explanations of their meanings, often at the end of a book
meanings.example: A glossary of terms is included for the reader's convenience.
meanings.example_cn: 为了方便读者，还收录了术语汇编。

meanings.meaning_en: a list of words with explanations of their meanings, especially in a book for learning a foreign language
the part of a word that stays the same when different endings are added to it, for example ‘driv-’ in ‘driving’
meanings.example: ‘Writ ’ is the stem of the forms ‘writes ’, ‘writing ’ and ‘written ’.
meanings.example_cn: writ是writes、writing和written三个词的词干。

meanings.meaning_en: to quickly push your finger or some other pointed object into something or someone
meanings.example: Andy poked the fish with his finger to see if it was still alive.
meanings.example_cn: 安迪用手指戳了戳那条鱼，看它是否还活着。

meanings.meaning_en: something used for adding colour to your lips, in the shape of a small stick
meanings.example: She was wearing red lipstick.
meanings.example_cn: 她涂着红色唇膏。

meanings.meaning_en: resistant to discoloration, esp discoloration resulting from corrosion; rust-resistant
meanings.example: stainless steel
meanings.example_cn: 不锈钢

meanings.meaning_en: complete and not mixed with anything else
meanings.example: The concert was sheer delight.
meanings.example_cn: 这场音乐会是一次十足的享受。

meanings.meaning_en: not leaning to one side or the other but exactly vertical
meanings.example: a perpendicular line
meanings.example_cn: 垂直线

meanings.meaning_en: the person who starts a plan or idea
meanings.example: the author of the state reforms
meanings.example_cn: 州政府改革的发起者

meanings.meaning_en: the introduction of new ideas or methods
meanings.example: We must encourage innovation if the company is to remain competitive.
meanings.example_cn: 公司要想保持竞争力，就必须鼓励革新。

meanings.meaning_en: a new plan for dealing with a particular problem or for achieving a particular purpose
meanings.example: a United Nations peace initiative
meanings.example_cn: 联合国的和平倡议

meanings.meaning_en: to breathe quickly and with difficulty after the effort of running, carrying something heavy etc
meanings.example: George puffed and panted and he tried to keep up.
meanings.example_cn: 乔治喘着粗气想跟上。

meanings.meaning_en: the destruction of a ship in an accident
meanings.example: survivors of the shipwreck
meanings.example_cn: 此次海难的幸存者

meanings.meaning_en: information that something has happened, which may or may not be true
meanings.example: Government officials have denied reports of rebel advances.
meanings.example_cn: 政府官员否认了有关叛军正在推进的传言。

meanings.meaning_en: an infectious illness can be passed from one person to another, especially through the air you breathe
meanings.example: infectious diseases
meanings.example_cn: 传染性疾病

meanings.meaning_en: a story that has brave characters and exciting events
meanings.example: a Medieval romance
meanings.example_cn: 中世纪的传奇故事

meanings.meaning_en: someone who carried messages from a ruler in the past
someone who has been sent to a foreign country to teach people about Christianity and persuade them to become Christians
meanings.example: My mother would still like me to be a missionary in Africa.
meanings.example_cn: 我母亲还是想让我在非洲做一名传教士。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of equipment used for discovering the presence of light, heat, movement etc
meanings.example: The latest Japanese vacuum cleaners contain sensors that detect the amount of dust and type of floor.
meanings.example_cn: 日本最新款吸尘器装有传感器，能测出灰尘量和地板类型。

meanings.meaning_en: a printed advertisement, notice etc that is sent to lots of people at the same time
meanings.example: The proposal has been widely publicized in press information circulars sent to 1,800 newspapers.
meanings.example_cn: 通过向1800份报纸发送新闻通告，这项提议得到了广泛地宣传。

meanings.meaning_en: a small book or piece of paper advertising something or giving information on a particular subject
meanings.example: a leaflet on skin cancer
meanings.example_cn: 有关皮肤癌的宣传页

meanings.meaning_en: to communicate or express something, with or without using words
meanings.example: All this information can be conveyed in a simple diagram.
meanings.example_cn: 所有这些信息可以通过一张简单的图表来表示。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a small hole in or through something, using an object with a sharp point
meanings.example: Steam the corn until it can easily be pierced with a fork.
meanings.example_cn: 把玉米蒸到用叉子可以轻易扎透。

meanings.meaning_en: the act or process of making a way into or through sth
meanings.example: The floor is sealed to prevent water penetration.
meanings.example_cn: 地板加了密封涂料防止渗水。

meanings.meaning_en: one of two long thin parts on an insect’s head, that it uses to feel things
meanings.example: The minister was praised for his acute political antennae (= ability to understand complicated political situations) .
meanings.example_cn: 这位部长以政治触觉敏锐而为人称道。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who has never had sex
meanings.example: I was a virgin until I was thirty years old.
meanings.example_cn: 我到30岁时还是个处女。

meanings.meaning_en: without sexual experience
meanings.example: a virgin bride
meanings.example_cn: 贞洁的新娘

meanings.meaning_en: a business deal or action, such as buying or selling something
meanings.example: The bank charges a fixed rate for each transaction.
meanings.example_cn: 银行对每一笔业务收取固定费用。

meanings.meaning_en: a punishment for breaking a law, rule, or legal agreement
meanings.example: No littering. Penalty $500.
meanings.example_cn: 禁止乱扔垃圾。 违者罚款500美元。

meanings.meaning_en: not including something
meanings.example: Our prices are exclusive of sales tax.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的价格不包括销售税。

meanings.meaning_en: famous or well-known for something bad
meanings.example: a notorious computer hacker
meanings.example_cn: 声名狼藉的电脑黑客

meanings.meaning_en: an event in which someone, especially someone important, behaves in a bad way that shocks people
meanings.example: It caused quite a scandal when he left his wife.
meanings.example_cn: 他离开妻子成了一大丑闻。

meanings.meaning_en: a small amount or piece that is taken from something, so that it can be tested or examined
meanings.example: a blood specimen
meanings.example_cn: 血样

meanings.meaning_en: the process of removing or obtaining something from something else
meanings.example: the extraction of salt from seawater
meanings.example_cn: 从海水中提取盐

meanings.meaning_en: to love someone very much and feel very proud of them
meanings.example: It's obvious that she adores him.
meanings.example_cn: 她显然深深地爱着他。

meanings.meaning_en: to admire and love someone very much
meanings.example: He absolutely worships her.
meanings.example_cn: 他太崇拜她了。

meanings.meaning_en: a small insect
meanings.example: We noticed tiny bugs that were all over the walls.
meanings.example_cn: 我们发现墙上爬满了小虫。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a hole in something, using a metal tool or other sharp object
meanings.example: The guard punched my ticket and I got on.
meanings.example_cn: 守卫在我的票上打孔后，我就上去了。

meanings.meaning_en: a metal tool for cutting holes or for pushing something into a small hole
meanings.example: a hole punch
meanings.example_cn: 打孔器

meanings.meaning_en: trouble between two or more people or groups
meanings.example: a time of political strife
meanings.example_cn: 政治纷争四起的时代

meanings.meaning_en: an imaginary line drawn around the middle of the Earth that is exactly the same distance from the North Pole and the South Pole
meanings.example: a small village near the equator
meanings.example_cn: 赤道附近的小村庄

meanings.meaning_en: machinery in a vehicle that turns engine power (or power on a bicycle) into movement forwards or backwards
meanings.example: Careless use of the clutch may damage the gears.
meanings.example_cn: 离合器使用不慎可能会损坏传动装置。

meanings.meaning_en: if something bad persists, it continues to exist or happen
meanings.example: If the pain persists, you must see a doctor.
meanings.example_cn: 如果一直痛，你就必须去看医生了。

meanings.meaning_en: to eat breakfast
meanings.example: All the ladies breakfasted in their rooms.
meanings.example_cn: 所有女士在她们房间里用了早餐。

meanings.meaning_en: to eat dinner
meanings.example: He was dining with friends at the Ritz.
meanings.example_cn: 他和朋友在里茨饭店一起进餐。

meanings.meaning_en: The proceedings are an organized series of events that take place in a particular place
meanings.example: The proceedings of the inquiry will take place in private.
meanings.example_cn: 调查行动将秘密进行。

meanings.meaning_en: the measurement of how long something is from one end to the other
meanings.example: It is about a metre in length.
meanings.example_cn: 它大约有一米长。

meanings.meaning_en: to admit or accept that something is true or that a situation exists
meanings.example: The family acknowledge the need for change.
meanings.example_cn: 全家人都承认需要改变一下。

meanings.meaning_en: to accept a difficult or unpleasant responsibility, duty etc
meanings.example: The residents are being asked to shoulder the costs of the repairs.
meanings.example_cn: 居民们被要求承担这笔修理费用。

meanings.meaning_en: the quality of being honest and strong about what you believe to be right
meanings.example: I have always regarded him as a man of integrity.
meanings.example_cn: 我一直把他当作一个正直诚实的人。

meanings.meaning_en: if an opportunity to do something offers itself, it becomes available to you
meanings.example: I’ll raise the subject when a suitable occasion offers itself.
meanings.example_cn: 等有合适的机会，我会把这件事提出来的。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone is a member of a club, group, or organization
meanings.example: You should carry your membership card with you at all times.
meanings.example_cn: 你应该随身携带会员卡。

meanings.meaning_en: done according to a system or plan, in a thorough, efficient or determined way
meanings.example: a systematic approach to solving the problem
meanings.example_cn: 系统解决问题的办法

meanings.meaning_en: a set of tools, equipment etc that you use for a particular purpose or activity
meanings.example: Sally keeps her make-up kit in her bag.
meanings.example_cn: 萨莉把化妆包放在手提包里。

meanings.meaning_en: to praise or approve of someone or something publicly
meanings.example: The paper was highly commended in the UK Press Awards.
meanings.example_cn: 该报获得了“英国新闻奖”的高度褒奖。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep thinking about something that you are worried or upset about
meanings.example: Don’t sit at home brooding all day.
meanings.example_cn: 别整天坐在家里闷闷不乐的。

meanings.meaning_en: to think about something for a long time
meanings.example: He mused on how different his life would have been, had he not met Louisa.
meanings.example_cn: 他默默地想，如果没有遇到路易莎，他的人生会有多么不同。

meanings.meaning_en: to think seriously and deeply about something
meanings.example: She sat quietly, meditating on the day’s events.
meanings.example_cn: 她静静地坐着，思考着这一天发生的事。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of silence, especially when people are expecting something to happen
meanings.example: A sudden hush fell over the crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 人群突然变得鸦雀无声。

meanings.meaning_en: used to tell people to be quiet, or to comfort a child who is crying or upset
meanings.example: Hush, now. Try to get to sleep.
meanings.example_cn: 嘘，别哭了。 好好睡吧。

meanings.meaning_en: to become or make sb completely involved in sth
meanings.example: She immersed herself in her work.
meanings.example_cn: 她埋头工作。

meanings.meaning_en: if a government repeals a law, it officially ends that law
meanings.example: The government has just repealed the law segregating public facilities.
meanings.example_cn: 政府刚刚废除了隔离公共设施的法令。

meanings.meaning_en: a machine that shapes wood or metal, by turning it around and around against a sharp tool
to shape, bore, or cut a screw thread in or on (a workpiece) on a lathe
a short angry argument, especially between people who know each other well
meanings.example: a family row
meanings.example_cn: 家庭争吵

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh at someone or something and try to make them look stupid by saying unkind things about them or by copying them
meanings.example: Opposition MPs mocked the government’s decision.
meanings.example_cn: 反对党议员讥笑政府的这一决策。

meanings.meaning_en: the period when someone is king, queen, or emperor
meanings.example: changes that took place during Charlemagne’s reign
meanings.example_cn: 查理曼大帝统治时期的变革

meanings.meaning_en: faster than the speed of sound
meanings.example: supersonic aircraft
meanings.example_cn: 超音速飞机

meanings.meaning_en: (of sounds) higher than humans can hear
meanings.example: ultrasonic waves
meanings.example_cn: 超声波

meanings.meaning_en: to be even better or greater than someone or something else
meanings.example: He had surpassed all our expectations .
meanings.example_cn: 他超越了我们所有的预期。

meanings.meaning_en: a name given to someone, especially by their friends or family, that is not their real name and is often connected with what they look like or something they have done
meanings.example: Stephen earned himself the nickname Hawkeye.
meanings.example_cn: 斯蒂芬得了个“鹰眼”的绰号。

meanings.meaning_en: a large open container pulled by a train, used for carrying goods
a very impressive show or scene
meanings.example: a multimedia dance and opera spectacle
meanings.example_cn: 盛大的多媒体舞蹈戏剧表演

meanings.meaning_en: someone who lives or stays in a particular place
meanings.example: the residents of Westville
meanings.example_cn: 韦斯特维尔的居民

meanings.meaning_en: if the soul of a dead person haunts a place, it appears there often
meanings.example: The pub is said to be haunted by the ghost of a former landlord.
meanings.example_cn: 据说这个酒吧里经常有一位前任房主的鬼魂出没。

meanings.meaning_en: to go and spend time in a place or with someone, especially for pleasure or interest
meanings.example: Eric went to Seattle to visit his cousins.
meanings.example_cn: 埃里克到西雅图去看望他的表兄弟。

meanings.meaning_en: happening or doing something often
meanings.example: Trains rushed past at frequent intervals.
meanings.example_cn: 火车频频驶过。

meanings.meaning_en: a tool with a rounded blade and a long handle used for moving earth, stones etc
meanings.example: ...a coal shovel.
meanings.example_cn: …一把煤铲。

meanings.meaning_en: to lift and move earth, stones etc with a shovel
meanings.example: The workmen shovelled gravel onto the road.
meanings.example_cn: 工人们把碎石铲到路面上。

meanings.meaning_en: a small animal that looks like a large frog and lives mostly on land
meanings.example: Toads have drier, lumpier skins than frogs and spend less time in the water.
meanings.example_cn: 蟾蜍的皮比青蛙干燥，疙瘩也更多，呆在水中的时间比青蛙少。

meanings.meaning_en: a vehicle that uses diesel
meanings.example: Our new car is a diesel.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的新车是柴油车。

meanings.meaning_en: a short journey in order to do something for someone, for example delivering or collecting something for them
meanings.example: I seemed to spend my life running errands for people.
meanings.example_cn: 我好像一辈子都在为别人跑腿。

meanings.meaning_en: to find out something
meanings.example: A postmortem was ordered to try to ascertain the cause of death.
meanings.example_cn: 下令验尸以查明死因。

meanings.meaning_en: the line far away where the land or sea seems to meet the sky
meanings.example: We could see a ship on the horizon.
meanings.example_cn: 我们能看见地平线上有一艘船。

meanings.meaning_en: the art and science of the detailed direction and control of movement or manoeuvre of forces in battle to achieve an aim or task
covered with grass
meanings.example: a grassy bank
meanings.example_cn: 长满青草的河岸

meanings.meaning_en: a small plant that is used to improve the taste of food, or to make medicine
meanings.example: Sprinkle the dish with chopped fresh herbs.
meanings.example_cn: 在菜肴上撒些切碎的新鲜香草。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin line cut into a hard surface
meanings.example: The bolt slid easily into the groove.
meanings.example_cn: 插销顺畅地滑入凹槽。

meanings.meaning_en: to work skilfully with information, systems etc to achieve the result that you want
meanings.example: software designed to store and manipulate data
meanings.example_cn: 用于存储和处理数据的软件

meanings.meaning_en: to form a plan etc in secret
meanings.example: Have you been hatching up a deal with her?
meanings.example_cn: 你是不是在和她密谋什么交易？

meanings.meaning_en: a large building for storing large quantities of goods
meanings.example: The goods have been sitting in a warehouse for months because a strike has prevented distribution.
meanings.example_cn: 因为罢工无法发货，货物已经堆在仓库里好几个月了。

meanings.meaning_en: behaviour or actions that deliberately cause pain to people or animals
meanings.example: The children had suffered cruelty and neglect.
meanings.example_cn: 这些孩子遭受虐待，无人照管。

meanings.meaning_en: a square piece of cloth or paper used for protecting your clothes and for cleaning your hands and lips during a meal
meanings.example: ...taking tiny bites of a hot dog and daintily wiping my lips with a napkin.
meanings.example_cn: …小口咬着热狗并用餐巾文雅地擦着我的嘴唇。

meanings.meaning_en: to take part in an activity or event
meanings.example: Some members refused to participate.
meanings.example_cn: 有些会员拒绝参加。

meanings.meaning_en: a member of the Senate or a senate
meanings.example: Senator Kennedy
meanings.example_cn: 肯尼迪参议员

meanings.meaning_en: a book, article etc from which information has been obtained
meanings.example: a comprehensive list of references
meanings.example_cn: 详尽的参考书目清单

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is taking part in an activity or event
meanings.example: an active participant in the negotiations
meanings.example_cn: 积极参与谈判的人

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is watching an event or game
meanings.example: The match attracted over 40,000 spectators.
meanings.example_cn: 这场比赛吸引了四万多名观众。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of fixed limits that control the way that something should be done
meanings.example: ...some of the parameters that determine the taste of a wine.
meanings.example_cn: …一些决定葡萄酒味道的参数。

meanings.meaning_en: a set of instructions for cooking a particular type of food
meanings.example: a recipe book
meanings.example_cn: 一本烹饪书

meanings.meaning_en: something that you think is true although you have no definite proof
meanings.example: A lot of people make the assumption that poverty only exists in the Third World.
meanings.example_cn: 许多人以为贫困仅仅存在于第三世界。

meanings.meaning_en: to make an official decision about something, especially a legal problem
meanings.example: The judge ruled that she should have custody of the children.
meanings.example_cn: 法官判定孩子的监护权归她。

meanings.meaning_en: the most important ideas contained in an argument or piece of writing
meanings.example: The substance of his argument was that people on welfare should work.
meanings.example_cn: 他论点的主旨是享受社会福利的人应该去工作。

meanings.meaning_en: when one surface rubs against another
meanings.example: Check your rope frequently, as friction against the rock can wear it away.
meanings.example_cn: 要经常检查绳索，因为与岩石摩擦会使它磨损。

meanings.meaning_en: a talk given as part of a Christian church service, usually on a religious or moral subject
meanings.example: The vicar gave a sermon on charity.
meanings.example_cn: 牧师作了一次关于仁爱的布道。

meanings.meaning_en: not at work, school, a meeting etc, because you are sick or decide not to go
meanings.example: students who are regularly absent from school
meanings.example_cn: 经常缺课的学生

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which people express different opinions about something and sometimes argue
meanings.example: We’ve had a few disagreements , but we’re still good friends.
meanings.example_cn: 虽然有过一些分歧，但我们仍是好朋友。

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel embarrassed so that you are not sure what to do or say
meanings.example: I hoped he would stop asking awkward questions .
meanings.example_cn: 我希望他不要再问令人难堪的问题。

meanings.meaning_en: living or continuing for ever
meanings.example: Plato believed that the soul is immortal.
meanings.example_cn: 柏拉图认为灵魂不灭。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is wretched is very unhappy or ill, and you feel sorry for them
meanings.example: the poor, wretched girl
meanings.example_cn: 极其不幸的可怜姑娘

meanings.meaning_en: very bad luck, or something that happens to you as a result of bad luck
meanings.example: It seems the banks always profit from farmers’ misfortunes.
meanings.example_cn: 银行似乎总是从农民的不幸中获益。

meanings.meaning_en: two things that are incompatible cannot exist or be accepted together
meanings.example: Politeness and truth are often mutually incompatible.
meanings.example_cn: 礼貌和实话往往互不相容。

meanings.meaning_en: when a situation is not certain because there is the possibility of sudden change
meanings.example: the instability of the market
meanings.example_cn: 市场的变化无常

meanings.meaning_en: not having everything that should be there, or not completely finished
meanings.example: Unfortunately, I do not have the information because our records are incomplete.
meanings.example_cn: 很遗憾，由于我们的记录不完整，我无法提供有关资料。

meanings.meaning_en: (of a building, room, etc.) warm in an unpleasant way and without enough fresh air
meanings.example: It’s getting stuffy in here – do you mind if I open the window?
meanings.example_cn: 这里越来越闷了，我开开窗行吗？

meanings.meaning_en: (of glass, liquid, etc.) not clear enough to see through or allow light through
meanings.example: a shower with an opaque glass door
meanings.example_cn: 装有不透明玻璃门的淋浴间

meanings.meaning_en: not sensible, right, or fair in a particular situation
meanings.example: It would be improper of me to comment before the election outcome is known.
meanings.example_cn: 在选举结果未知的情况下我作出评论是不恰当的。

meanings.meaning_en: a feeling of not being satisfied
meanings.example: 30% of customers expressed dissatisfaction with the service.
meanings.example_cn: 30%的顾客对服务表示不满意。

meanings.meaning_en: that does not allow water to get in or out
meanings.example: a watertight container
meanings.example_cn: 不漏水的容器

meanings.meaning_en: used for saying that something is certain to happen and cannot be avoided
meanings.example: The decision will inevitably lead to political tensions.
meanings.example_cn: 该决定必然导致政治局势的紧张。

meanings.meaning_en: used when saying that a particular fact has no effect on a situation and is not important
meanings.example: The course is open to anyone, irrespective of age.
meanings.example_cn: 这门课任何人都可参加，没有年龄限制。

meanings.meaning_en: not completely correct
meanings.example: A lot of what has been written about him is inaccurate.
meanings.example_cn: 关于他的文字描述有大量失实之处。

meanings.meaning_en: not fair or sensible
meanings.example: I think he’s being unreasonable.
meanings.example_cn: 我认为他是在无理取闹。

meanings.meaning_en: not welcome or wanted because they may affect a situation or person in a bad way
meanings.example: punishment of undesirable behaviour
meanings.example_cn: 对不良行为的惩罚

meanings.meaning_en: not good enough to do something or to be used for a particular purpose
meanings.example: Jenkins is unfit for public office.
meanings.example_cn: 詹金斯不适合担任公职。

meanings.meaning_en: completely stupid or unreasonable
meanings.example: It seems an absurd idea.
meanings.example_cn: 这似乎是个荒唐的想法。

meanings.meaning_en: something that does not happen at regular intervals
meanings.example: a slight irregularity in his heartbeat
meanings.example_cn: 他略微的心律不齐

meanings.meaning_en: to ignore something or treat it as unimportant
meanings.example: He ordered the jury to disregard the witness’s last statement.
meanings.example_cn: 他指示陪审团忽略证人的最后一句话。

meanings.meaning_en: when someone ignores something that they should not ignore
meanings.example: his disregard for her feelings
meanings.example_cn: 他对她情感的忽略

meanings.meaning_en: feeling doubt about something
meanings.example: He was uncertain how much further he could walk.
meanings.example_cn: 他不清楚自己还能走多远。

meanings.meaning_en: a substance of a low quality that is contained in or mixed with something else, making it less pure
meanings.example: All natural minerals contain impurities.
meanings.example_cn: 凡天然矿物都含有杂质。

meanings.meaning_en: not good enough, big enough, skilled enough etc for a particular purpose
meanings.example: inadequate resources
meanings.example_cn: 资源缺乏

meanings.meaning_en: always
meanings.example: It invariably rains when I go there.
meanings.example_cn: 我每次去那儿都下雨。

meanings.meaning_en: not comfortable, peaceful, or relaxed
meanings.example: She eventually fell into an uneasy sleep.
meanings.example_cn: 她终于睡着了，但睡得并不踏实。

meanings.meaning_en: a type of animal that drinks milk from its mother’s body when it is young. Humans, dogs, and whales are mammals.
meanings.example: Humans, dogs, elephants, and dolphins are all mammals, but birds, fish, and crocodiles are not.
meanings.example_cn: 人、狗、大象和海豚都是哺乳动物，而鸟、鱼和鳄鱼则不是。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a good combination with someone or something else
meanings.example: The team needs players who complement each other.
meanings.example_cn: 球队需要能够相互取长补短的队员。

meanings.meaning_en: someone or something that emphasizes the good qualities of another person or thing
meanings.example: This wine would be a nice complement to grilled dishes.
meanings.example_cn: 这种葡萄酒配烧烤食物会很不错。

meanings.meaning_en: money paid to someone because they have suffered injury or loss, or because something they own has been damaged
meanings.example: People who are wrongly arrested may be paid compensation .
meanings.example_cn: 被误抓的人有可能得到补偿费。

meanings.meaning_en: concerned with improving bad living conditions and preventing unfair treatment of people
meanings.example: Humanitarian aid is being sent to the refugees.
meanings.example_cn: 正向难民提供人道主义援助。

meanings.meaning_en: a person involved in or connected with improving people's lives and reducing suffering
meanings.example: The well-known humanitarian, Joseph Rowntree, was concerned with the welfare of his employees.
meanings.example_cn: 著名的人道主义者约瑟夫.荣特里非常关心其雇员的福利。

meanings.meaning_en: a large low boat with a flat bottom, used for carrying goods on a canal or river
meanings.example: Carrying goods by train costs nearly three times more than carrying them by barge.
meanings.example_cn: 通过铁路运货的成本比驳船运货成本高出近3倍。

meanings.meaning_en: a change in a price, amount, level etc
meanings.example: Prices are subject to fluctuation.
meanings.example_cn: 价格可能会有波动。

meanings.meaning_en: to change frequently in size, amount, quality, etc., especially from one extreme to another
meanings.example: Insect populations fluctuate wildly from year to year.
meanings.example_cn: 昆虫的数量每年变化很大。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who cannot look after themselves because of illness, old age, or injury
meanings.example: I hate being treated as an invalid.
meanings.example_cn: 我讨厌被当作病人对待。

meanings.meaning_en: a large room in a hospital where people who need medical treatment stay
meanings.example: the other patients in the ward
meanings.example_cn: 病房里的其他病人

meanings.meaning_en: the number of people in a team, army etc
meanings.example: The police force is below strength at the moment (= there are fewer police than there should be ).
meanings.example_cn: 目前警力不足。

meanings.meaning_en: extremely cold
meanings.example: an icy wind
meanings.example_cn: 刺骨寒风

meanings.meaning_en: something that you are trying hard to achieve, especially in business or politics
meanings.example: He vowed to achieve certain objectives before the end of his presidency.
meanings.example_cn: 他立誓要在他的总统任期结束之前实现某些目标。

meanings.meaning_en: (grammar) the objective case is the one which is used for the object of a sentence
a house that you use or rent while you are on holiday
meanings.example: We rented a holiday villa in Spain.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在西班牙租了一座假日别墅。

meanings.meaning_en: to describe the qualities of someone or something in a particular way
meanings.example: The group was characterized as being well-educated and liberal.
meanings.example_cn: 该群体被描绘成受过良好教育，思想开明。

meanings.meaning_en: to represent, mean, or be a sign of something
meanings.example: Some tribes use special facial markings to signify status.
meanings.example_cn: 有些部落使用特殊的面部标记来表示地位。

meanings.meaning_en: to show a feeling, attitude etc
meanings.example: The shareholders have manifested their intention to sell the shares.
meanings.example_cn: 股东们表明了要出售股票的意图。

meanings.meaning_en: plain and easy to see
meanings.example: a manifest error of judgment
meanings.example_cn: 明显的判断错误

meanings.meaning_en: appearing to have a particular quality, when this may or may not be true
meanings.example: seemingly unrelated bits of information
meanings.example_cn: 似乎互不相关的零星信息

meanings.meaning_en: seeming to have a particular quality, although this is not true or real
meanings.example: Despite their superficial similarities, the two novels are, in fact, very different.
meanings.example_cn: 这两本小说尽管表面上有相似之处，但实际上大不一样。

meanings.meaning_en: a standard that you use to judge something or make a decision about something
meanings.example: the criteria we use to select candidates
meanings.example_cn: 我们挑选候选人的标准

meanings.meaning_en: the usual or normal situation, way of doing something etc
meanings.example: Joyce’s style of writing was a striking departure from the literary norm.
meanings.example_cn: 乔伊斯的写作风格与传统的文学风格大相径庭。

meanings.meaning_en: the title written at the beginning of a piece of writing, or at the beginning of part of a book
meanings.example: chapter headings
meanings.example_cn: 章节标题

meanings.meaning_en: to form a particular judgment about a situation after carefully considering the facts
meanings.example: They reasoned that other businesses would soon copy the idea.
meanings.example_cn: 他们推断其他企业也会很快仿效这个点子。

meanings.meaning_en: to publicly support a particular way of doing something
meanings.example: Extremists were openly advocating violence.
meanings.example_cn: 极端主义者公开鼓吹使用暴力。

meanings.meaning_en: a person who defends sb in court
the practice of treating one person or group differently from another in an unfair way
meanings.example: laws to prevent discrimination
meanings.example_cn: 防止歧视的法律

meanings.meaning_en: to completely change the appearance, form, or character of something or someone, especially in a way that improves it
meanings.example: Your metabolic rate is the speed at which your body transforms food into energy.
meanings.example_cn: 你的新陈代谢率就是你身体将食物转换成能量的速度。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something less tight or less firmly fastened, or to become less tight or less firmly fastened
meanings.example: You’ll need a spanner to loosen that bolt.
meanings.example_cn: 你需要扳手来拧开那个螺栓。

meanings.meaning_en: a small change that makes someone or something slightly different, or the process of this change
meanings.example: If you make alterations to the Windows setup, save the new settings before closing.
meanings.example_cn: 如果更改了视窗操作系统的设置，关闭前要保存新的设置。

meanings.meaning_en: to pass into a particular state; to begin to be sth
meanings.example: He had fallen asleep on the sofa.
meanings.example_cn: 他在沙发上睡着了。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a computer a set of instructions that it can use to perform a particular operation
meanings.example: Any large high-speed computer can be programmed to learn.
meanings.example_cn: 任何大型高速计算机都可以通过编程获得学习能力。

meanings.meaning_en: to prepare a book, piece of film etc for printing or broadcasting by removing mistakes or parts that are not acceptable
meanings.example: a collection of essays edited by John Gay
meanings.example_cn: 由约翰·盖伊编辑的论文集

meanings.meaning_en: an edge or rim; margin
meanings.example: They set up camp on the verge of the desert.
meanings.example_cn: 他们在沙漠边缘扎下了营地。

meanings.meaning_en: the outside edge of something circular
meanings.example: the rim of a glass
meanings.example_cn: 玻璃杯口

meanings.meaning_en: the area of floor around a fireplace in a house
meanings.example: It was winter and there was a huge fire roaring in the hearth.
meanings.example_cn: 时值冬天，壁炉里的炉火在熊熊燃烧。

meanings.meaning_en: a special place in the wall of a room, where you can make a fire
meanings.example: In the evenings, we gathered around the fireplace and talked in hushed whispers.
meanings.example_cn: 晚上，我们聚集在壁炉周围轻声交谈。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who supports the activities of an organization, for example by giving money
meanings.example: a wealthy patron
meanings.example_cn: 富有的赞助人

meanings.meaning_en: a document showing that a student has successfully completed their high school or university education
meanings.example: a High School diploma
meanings.example_cn: 高中毕业文凭

meanings.meaning_en: too important to be without
meanings.example: Mobile phones have become an indispensable part of our lives.
meanings.example_cn: 移动电话已经成为我们生活中的必需品。

meanings.meaning_en: angry and silent, especially because you feel life has been unfair to you
meanings.example: Bill sat in sullen silence and refused to eat his lunch.
meanings.example_cn: 比尔一声不响，闷闷不乐地坐着，不肯吃午饭。

meanings.meaning_en: a narrow piece of cloth that you tie around a wound or around a part of the body that has been injured
meanings.example: We put some ointment and a bandage on his knee.
meanings.example_cn: 我们在他的膝盖上涂了些药膏，还缠了一条绷带。

meanings.meaning_en: a failure of a relationship, discussion or system
meanings.example: A sudden rise in oil prices could lead to a breakdown of the economy.
meanings.example_cn: 油价暴涨会导致经济崩溃。

meanings.meaning_en: the most basic and important quality of something
meanings.example: In essence his message was very simple.
meanings.example_cn: 实质上他想表达的意思很简单。

meanings.meaning_en: kept in prison or in a place that you are not allowed to leave
meanings.example: captive soldiers
meanings.example_cn: 被俘的士兵

meanings.meaning_en: the less important side or the back of an object that has two sides
meanings.example: The British ten-pence coin has a lion on the reverse.
meanings.example_cn: 英国十便士硬币的背面图案是一头狮子。

meanings.meaning_en: a noticeable difference from what is expected or acceptable
meanings.example: deviation from the normal procedure
meanings.example_cn: 背离正常的程序

meanings.meaning_en: relating to the most northern part of the world
meanings.example: the Arctic island of Novaya Zemlya
meanings.example_cn: 北极的新地岛

meanings.meaning_en: the regions of the world around the North Pole
meanings.example: winter in the Arctic
meanings.example_cn: 北极的冬天。

meanings.meaning_en: making you feel very sad, usually because sb has died or suffered a lot
meanings.example: The parents were not to blame for the tragic death of their son.
meanings.example_cn: 儿子的惨死不是他父母的错。

meanings.meaning_en: great sadness
meanings.example: He listened to my tale of woe.
meanings.example_cn: 他听了我悲伤的故事。

meanings.meaning_en: extreme sadness, especially because someone you love has died
meanings.example: The grief she felt over Helen’s death was almost unbearable.
meanings.example_cn: 她因海伦的去世而悲痛难当。

meanings.meaning_en: a small container filled with powder that burns or explodes to produce coloured lights and noise in the sky
meanings.example: a New Year’s Eve fireworks display
meanings.example_cn: 除夕夜的烟火表演

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which people suddenly express very strong feelings about something that someone has said or done
meanings.example: The governor found himself at the center of a political storm .
meanings.example_cn: 州长发现自己处于一场政治风暴的中心。

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly attack and enter a place using a lot of force
meanings.example: An angry crowd stormed the embassy.
meanings.example_cn: 愤怒的人群突然袭击大使馆。

meanings.meaning_en: cruel and unfair government
meanings.example: organizations which have criticized the tyrannies of the government
meanings.example_cn: 批判政府暴政的组织

meanings.meaning_en: extreme anger
meanings.example: He was scared of incurring his father’s wrath .
meanings.example_cn: 他害怕惹他父亲大发脾气。

meanings.meaning_en: a ruler who has complete power and uses it in a cruel and unfair way
meanings.example: The country had long been ruled by tyrants.
meanings.example_cn: 这个国家长期受暴君统治。

meanings.meaning_en: a large wild animal that is black and a member of the cat family
a large animal of the cat family, with yellow fur and black spots, which lives in Africa and South Asia
meanings.example: The young leopard separated from its mother would be eaten by other beast.
meanings.example_cn: 与母亲离散的幼豹很可能被其他的野兽吃掉。

meanings.meaning_en: to keep complaining in an unhappy way
meanings.example: ‘This is boring,’ Kathleen grumbled.
meanings.example_cn: “这真无聊。”凯瑟琳抱怨道。

meanings.meaning_en: to officially tell people that someone has arrived at a particular place
meanings.example: All visitors to the apartment building must be announced.
meanings.example_cn: 那幢公寓楼的访客都必须通报。

meanings.meaning_en: a violent or harmful action that someone does to punish someone for harming them or their family
meanings.example: a desire for vengeance
meanings.example_cn: 复仇的愿望

meanings.meaning_en: a large strong building used for defending an important place
meanings.example: a 13th-century fortress
meanings.example_cn: 一座13世纪的城堡

meanings.meaning_en: a promise that something will definitely happen or is definitely true, made especially to make someone less worried
meanings.example: Despite my repeated assurances, Rob still looked very nervous.
meanings.example_cn: 尽管我再三保证，罗布看起来还是很紧张。

meanings.meaning_en: a short thin piece of wire inside electrical equipment which prevents damage by melting and stopping the electricity when there is too much power
meanings.example: two 13 amp fuses
meanings.example_cn: 两根13安培的保险丝

meanings.meaning_en: an arrangement which you make so that a place in a hotel, restaurant, plane etc is kept for you at a particular time in the future
meanings.example: a dinner reservation
meanings.example_cn: 预订晚餐

meanings.meaning_en: a rule, agreement etc that is intended to protect someone or something from possible dangers or problems
meanings.example: International safeguards prevent the increase of nuclear weapons.
meanings.example_cn: 国际安全条约防止核武器数量增加。

meanings.meaning_en: when something is kept in its original state or in good condition
meanings.example: methods of food preservation
meanings.example_cn: 保存食物的各种方法

meanings.meaning_en: the state or process that happens when no more of sth can be accepted or added because there is already too much of it or too many of them
meanings.example: a business beset by price wars and market saturation (= the fact that no new customers can be found)
meanings.example_cn: 一家受价格战和市场饱和困扰的企业

meanings.meaning_en: a light cloud low over the ground that makes it difficult for you to see very far
meanings.example: We could just see the outline of the house through the mist.
meanings.example_cn: 薄雾中我们只能看到房子的轮廓。

meanings.meaning_en: a small piece of wood, stone, metal etc that has been broken off something
meanings.example: Wood chips covered the floor of the workshop.
meanings.example_cn: 工场的地板上满是木屑。

meanings.meaning_en: an inclusive price or cost includes everything
meanings.example: The fully inclusive fare for the trip is £22.
meanings.example_cn: 这次出行的全部费用为22英镑。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which an army or the police surround a place and try to gain control of it or force someone to come out of it
meanings.example: The siege lasted almost four months.
meanings.example_cn: 这次封锁历时近四个月。

meanings.meaning_en: to include something as part of a subject, discussion etc
meanings.example: This course embraces several different aspects of psychology.
meanings.example_cn: 这门课程涉及心理学的几个不同方面。

meanings.meaning_en: an outdoor game between two teams of nine players, in which players try to get points by hitting a ball and running around four bases
meanings.example: a baseball bat/team/stadium
meanings.example_cn: 棒球球棒 / 球队 / 球场

meanings.meaning_en: a half of the Earth, especially one of the halves above and below the equator
meanings.example: the Northern hemisphere
meanings.example_cn: 北半球

meanings.meaning_en: an area that covers a particular distance in all directions from a central point
meanings.example: The shock of the explosion was felt over a radius of forty miles.
meanings.example_cn: 爆炸引起的剧烈震动在方圆40英里内都能感觉得到。

meanings.meaning_en: a permanent mark that is left on your skin after you have had a cut or wound
meanings.example: a deep cut that could leave a permanent scar
meanings.example_cn: 可能会留下永久性疤痕的一道很深的伤口

meanings.meaning_en: A large commercial ship or airplane, especially one carrying passengers on a regular route.
the part of a gun that you pull with your finger to fire it
meanings.example: He took aim and squeezed the trigger.
meanings.example_cn: 他瞄准目标，扣动了扳机。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something happen very quickly, especially a series of events
meanings.example: The assassination triggered off a wave of rioting.
meanings.example_cn: 这次暗杀事件引发了一阵骚乱。

meanings.meaning_en: a black substance, thick and sticky when hot but hard when cold, used especially for making road surfaces
meanings.example: The oil has hardened to tar.
meanings.example_cn: 油已经硬化成柏油了。

meanings.meaning_en: a covering, especially one made of cloth, that can be rolled up and down to cover a window inside a building
meanings.example: The blinds were drawn (=  pulled down  ) to protect the new furniture from the sun.
meanings.example_cn: 窗帘都放了下来，避免太阳光照在新的家具上。

meanings.meaning_en: one of a pair of wooden or metal covers on the outside of a window that can be closed to keep light out or prevent thieves from coming in
meanings.example: She opened the shutters and gazed out over village roofs.
meanings.example_cn: 她打开了百叶窗，朝村里的房顶望去。

meanings.meaning_en: one of several types of plant with large bell-shaped flowers of various colours, especially white
someone who is very rich and has at least a million pounds or dollars
meanings.example: an American millionaire
meanings.example_cn: 一位美国百万富翁

meanings.meaning_en: belonging to the race of people with pale skin
meanings.example: young white males
meanings.example_cn: 年轻的白种男性

meanings.meaning_en: someone who is mentally ill or has a very low level of intelligence
meanings.example: You're an idiot!
meanings.example_cn: 你是个白痴！

meanings.meaning_en: to put or keep money in a bank
meanings.example: Did you bank that check?
meanings.example_cn: 你把那张支票存入银行了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to arrange figures or information together in a set or a list, so that they can be easily compared
meanings.example: Results for the test programme haven't been tabulated.
meanings.example_cn: 试验项目的结果还没有制成表格。

meanings.meaning_en: to give someone something of great value or importance
meanings.example: honours bestowed on him by the Queen
meanings.example_cn: 女王授予他的荣誉

meanings.meaning_en: to divide into smaller parts something that is already divided
meanings.example: Over time, developers subdivided the land.
meanings.example_cn: 开发商们渐渐地把这块土地进行了再分割。

meanings.meaning_en: if a ship docks, or if the captain docks it, it sails into a dock so that it can unload
meanings.example: We docked at Rangoon the next morning.
meanings.example_cn: 第二天早晨我们在仰光停靠码头。

meanings.meaning_en: to become straight, or to make something straight
meanings.example: Can you straighten your leg?
meanings.example_cn: 你能把腿伸直吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to make something flat or flatter, or to become flat or flatter
meanings.example: Use a rolling pin to flatten the dough.
meanings.example_cn: 用擀面杖把面团擀平。

meanings.meaning_en: to claim that something is caused by a particular person, situation etc
meanings.example: The report ascribes the rise in childhood asthma to the increase in pollution.
meanings.example_cn: 这份报告认为儿童哮喘发病率上升是因为污染加剧。

meanings.meaning_en: to not include something
meanings.example: High technology equipment would be excepted from any trade agreement.
meanings.example_cn: 任何贸易协定都不会把高科技设备包括在内。

meanings.meaning_en: to give a title to a book, play, etc.
meanings.example: a documentary entitled ‘The Price of Perfection’
meanings.example_cn: 一部名为《完美的代价》的纪录片

meanings.meaning_en: a style of dancing that tells a dramatic story with music but no talking or singing
meanings.example: She wants to be a ballet dancer .
meanings.example_cn: 她想当芭蕾舞演员。

meanings.meaning_en: behaving in a proud unfriendly way
meanings.example: a haughty laugh
meanings.example_cn: 傲慢的大笑

meanings.meaning_en: very dirty
meanings.example: extractor fans to remove foul air from the tunnel
meanings.example_cn: 排出隧道污浊空气的排气扇

meanings.meaning_en: to murder an important person
meanings.example: a plot to assassinate the President
meanings.example_cn: 刺杀总统的阴谋

meanings.meaning_en: the act or ceremony of putting a dead body into a grave
meanings.example: The priest prepared the body for burial.
meanings.example_cn: 牧师为尸体做好了下葬的准备。

meanings.meaning_en: very expensive, beautiful, and comfortable
meanings.example: a luxurious 30-room villa
meanings.example_cn: 一栋有30个房间的豪华度假别墅

meanings.meaning_en: someone who loves their country and is willing to defend it – used to show approval
meanings.example: It has been suggested the founders were not true patriots but men out to protect their own interests.
meanings.example_cn: 有人指出创建者并非真正的爱国者，而是一些维护自己利益的人。

meanings.meaning_en: having or expressing a great love of your country
meanings.example: patriotic songs
meanings.example_cn: 爱国歌曲

meanings.meaning_en: an extremely small person, who will never grow to a normal size because of a physical problem; a person suffering from dwarfism
fairly fat and heavy, or having a thick body
meanings.example: a short, stout man
meanings.example_cn: 一个矮胖的男人

meanings.meaning_en: used to express sadness, shame, or fear
meanings.example: For many people, alas, hunger is part of everyday life.
meanings.example_cn: 唉，对很多人来说，挨饿是家常便饭。

meanings.meaning_en: relating to Egypt or its people
meanings.example: ...the Egyptian pharaoh.
meanings.example_cn: ...古埃及法老。

meanings.meaning_en: someone from Egypt
making you feel pity or sympathy
meanings.example: The child looked a pathetic sight.
meanings.example_cn: 那个孩子看上去很可怜。

meanings.meaning_en: used to say what is the right or sensible thing to do
meanings.example: He shouldn’t be so selfish.
meanings.example_cn: 他不该这么自私。

meanings.meaning_en: You use ought to have with a past participle to indicate that although it was best or correct for someone to do something in the past, they did not actually do it.
meanings.example: I realize I ought to have told you about it.
meanings.example_cn: 我意识到我本该告诉你这件事的。

meanings.meaning_en: the Bible
meanings.example: the way God is portrayed in Scripture
meanings.example_cn: 《圣经》中对上帝的描写

meanings.meaning_en: someone who makes sure that the rules of a sport such as football, basketball , or boxing , are followed
meanings.example: He was sent off for arguing with the referee.
meanings.example_cn: 他因为和裁判发生争执而被罚出场。

meanings.meaning_en: a long metal stick with a weight at the bottom that swings regularly from side to side to control the working of a clock
meanings.example: The political pendulum has swung in favour of the liberals.
meanings.example_cn: 政治的钟摆已经摆向了自由派。

meanings.meaning_en: a pointed tool used in weaving, to pass a thread over and under the threads that form the cloth
the sudden start of sth unpleasant, especially violence or a disease
meanings.example: the outbreak of war
meanings.example_cn: 战争的爆发

meanings.meaning_en: to try to persuade people to buy a product by advertising it in a particular way, using attractive packages etc
meanings.example: If you could ever figure out how to market this you’d make a fortune.
meanings.example_cn: 如果能想出办法来推销这个东西，你就发财了。

meanings.meaning_en: If you say that someone's speech or behaviour is gross, you think it is very coarse, vulgar, or unacceptable
meanings.example: He abused the Admiral in the grossest terms.
meanings.example_cn: 他用最粗俗的字眼辱骂那位海军上将。

meanings.meaning_en: to pull or lift something very heavy with one great effort
meanings.example: Alan heaved his suitcase onto his bed.
meanings.example_cn: 艾伦把他的手提箱拖到床上。

meanings.meaning_en: to suddenly appear, especially when not expected
meanings.example: The window opened and a dog's head popped out.
meanings.example_cn: 窗子打开了，冷不防一只狗探出头来。

meanings.meaning_en: a piece of material that covers the inside of something, especially a piece of clothing
meanings.example: a jacket with a silk lining
meanings.example_cn: 有丝绸衬里的夹克

meanings.meaning_en: not very strong or hot-tasting
meanings.example: a mild curry
meanings.example_cn: 淡味咖喱

meanings.meaning_en: a group of people with skills or specialist knowledge who have been chosen to give advice or opinions on a particular subject
meanings.example: A panel of experts has looked at the proposal.
meanings.example_cn: 一组专家审核了那项提议。

meanings.meaning_en: demanding that particular rules, processes, etc. are strictly followed
meanings.example: The work failed to meet their rigorous standards.
meanings.example_cn: 工作没有达到他们的严格标准。

meanings.meaning_en: the most exciting or important part of a story or experience, which usually comes near the end
meanings.example: The festival reaches its climax with the traditional boat-burning ceremony.
meanings.example_cn: 传统的烧船仪式将节庆活动推向了高潮。

meanings.meaning_en: a period of history
meanings.example: the Victorian epoch
meanings.example_cn: 维多利亚时代

meanings.meaning_en: a small sea creature that you can eat, which has ten legs and a soft shell
meanings.example: Add the shrimp and cook for 30 seconds.
meanings.example_cn: 放入小虾，煮 30 秒。

meanings.meaning_en: a part that forms a point above a surface or at the top of something
meanings.example: Whisk the egg whites until they form stiff peaks.
meanings.example_cn: 将蛋清搅打至起尖发稠。

meanings.meaning_en: thin pieces of the stems of plants, used for making furniture and baskets
meanings.example: a cane chair
meanings.example_cn: 藤椅

meanings.meaning_en: if liquid drains away, it flows away
meanings.example: I watched the bath water drain away.
meanings.example_cn: 我看着浴缸里的水流光。

meanings.meaning_en: a thin stick that bends easily
meanings.example: a riding switch
meanings.example_cn: 马鞭

meanings.meaning_en: to live and take meals in sb's home, in return for payment
meanings.example: She always had one or two students boarding with her.
meanings.example_cn: 她的家总有一两名寄宿学生。

meanings.meaning_en: to come into a country in order to live there permanently
meanings.example: His father and mother immigrated when he was two.
meanings.example_cn: 他的父母在他两岁时移民到这里。

meanings.meaning_en: if a group of people disperse or are dispersed, they go away in different directions
meanings.example: Police used tear gas to disperse the crowd.
meanings.example_cn: 警察用催泪瓦斯驱散人群。

meanings.meaning_en: to collect into a mass or group
to change what you are doing so that you are not following an expected plan, idea, or type of behaviour
meanings.example: The plane had to deviate from its normal flight path.
meanings.example_cn: 飞机不得不偏离正常的航线。

meanings.meaning_en: to sit or stand in a particular position in order to be photographed or painted, or to make someone do this
meanings.example: We posed for photographs.
meanings.example_cn: 我们摆好姿势准备拍照。

meanings.meaning_en: the action of spending or using time, money, energy etc
meanings.example: the expenditure of time and money on your house or garden
meanings.example_cn: 你在房子或花园上所花费的时间和金钱

meanings.meaning_en: if a particular period of time elapses, it passes
meanings.example: Several months elapsed before his case was brought to trial.
meanings.example_cn: 过了几个月他的案子才开审。

meanings.meaning_en: if you are hoarse, or if your voice is hoarse, you speak in a low rough voice, for example because your throat is sore
meanings.example: He was hoarse from laughing.
meanings.example_cn: 他笑得嗓子都沙哑了。

meanings.meaning_en: a small area in a forest where there are no trees
meanings.example: A helicopter landed in a clearing in the dense jungle.
meanings.example_cn: 一架直升机在茂密丛林中的一片空地着陆了。

meanings.meaning_en: a particular type of red, green, blue etc
meanings.example: a delicate/pale/rich/soft shade of red
meanings.example_cn: 淡 / 浅 / 艳 / 柔和的红色

meanings.meaning_en: an occasion when the sun or the moon cannot be seen, because the Earth is passing directly between the moon and the sun, or because the moon is passing directly between the Earth and the sun
meanings.example: an eclipse of the sun
meanings.example_cn: 日食

meanings.meaning_en: your health and your body’s ability to fight illness
meanings.example: She’s got a strong constitution – she’ll recover in no time.
meanings.example_cn: 她体质强壮，很快就会恢复。

meanings.meaning_en: a fall from a horse, bicycle etc
meanings.example: Tyson broke a rib when he took a spill on his motorcycle.
meanings.example_cn: 泰森从摩托车上摔下来，断了一根肋骨。

meanings.meaning_en: a unanimous decision, vote, agreement etc is one in which all the people involved agree
meanings.example: It was decided by a unanimous vote that the school should close.
meanings.example_cn: 关闭学校是大家一致通过的决定。

meanings.meaning_en: to shake slightly because you are cold, or because you feel very afraid, angry, excited etc
meanings.example: The child was quivering in her arms.
meanings.example_cn: 那孩子在她怀里发抖。

meanings.meaning_en: a branch or stick where a bird sits
meanings.example: A small, yellow bird in a cage sat on its perch outside the house.
meanings.example_cn: 屋外，一只小黄鸟站在鸟笼的栖木上。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a bridge, arch etc that goes across from one support to another
meanings.example: The bridge crosses the river in a single span.
meanings.example_cn: 河上的桥为单跨桥。

meanings.meaning_en: a structure that is built over and into the water so that boats can stop next to it or people can walk along it
meanings.example: ...Chicago's Navy Pier.
meanings.example_cn: …芝加哥的海军码头。

meanings.meaning_en: a woman’s or girl’s dress
meanings.example: a party frock
meanings.example_cn: 宴会礼裙

meanings.meaning_en: if a bird or insect flutters, or if it flutters its wings, it flies by moving its wings lightly up and down
meanings.example: A small bird fluttered past the window.
meanings.example_cn: 一只小鸟拍打着翅膀飞过窗前。

meanings.meaning_en: a short written account of your education and your previous jobs that you send to an employer when you are looking for a new job
meanings.example: Send a resume, please.
meanings.example_cn: 请寄一份简历。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who wears funny clothes, a red nose, bright make-up on their face etc, and does silly things to make people laugh, especially at a circus
meanings.example: The performance of the clown kept the public rolling about.
meanings.example_cn: 小丑的表演使观众笑得前仰后合。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk first in one direction and then in another many times, especially because you are nervous
meanings.example: I found Mark at the hospital, pacing restlessly up and down.
meanings.example_cn: 我看见马克在医院里焦躁不安地踱来踱去。

meanings.meaning_en: a public room in a hotel or other building, that is used by many people as a place to relax
meanings.example: the television lounge
meanings.example_cn: 电视放映室

meanings.meaning_en: the leader of the Roman Catholic Church
meanings.example: The Pope will visit El Salvador this year.
meanings.example_cn: 教皇今年将访问萨尔瓦多。

meanings.meaning_en: the bar connecting two wheels on a car or other vehicle
meanings.example: the front/rear axle
meanings.example_cn: 前 / 后车轴

meanings.meaning_en: the length, height etc of something
meanings.example: What’s your waist measurement?
meanings.example_cn: 你腰围是多少？

meanings.meaning_en: when you achieve something that you had planned or hoped for
meanings.example: the realization of his dreams
meanings.example_cn: 他的梦想成真

meanings.meaning_en: a combination of several musical notes that are played at the same time and sound pleasant together
meanings.example: the opening chords of 'Stairway to Heaven'
meanings.example_cn: 《通往天堂的阶梯》的开篇和弦

meanings.meaning_en: a soft pair of trousers and a top that you wear in bed
meanings.example: striped pyjamas
meanings.example_cn: 条纹睡衣裤

meanings.meaning_en: beautiful, attractive, or graceful
meanings.example: a tall, elegant young woman
meanings.example_cn: 身材高挑、举止优雅的年轻女子

meanings.meaning_en: very strong
meanings.example: hard liquor
meanings.example_cn: 烈酒

meanings.meaning_en: the experience of being made to feel less tired or hot
meanings.example: a place to rest and find refreshment for mind and body
meanings.example_cn: 休息和恢复身心的场所

meanings.meaning_en: a printed note ordering you to pay money because you have done something illegal while driving or parking your car
meanings.example: Slow down or you'll get a ticket.
meanings.example_cn: 开慢点儿，否则你会接到一张罚款通知单。

meanings.meaning_en: to move your hand, arm, or head to tell someone something, or show them what you mean
meanings.example: Brad gestured towards the door. ‘Get out.’
meanings.example_cn: 布拉德指着门口说﹕“出去。”

meanings.meaning_en: the type of area where a building is situated - used especially by people who sell or advertise buildings
meanings.example: The house is in a charming situation, on a wooded hillside.
meanings.example_cn: 房子位于林木茂密的小山坡上，环境十分优美。

meanings.meaning_en: the sets of programs that tell a computer how to do a particular job
meanings.example: She loaded the new software .
meanings.example_cn: 她给电脑装上新的软件。

meanings.meaning_en: a priest with a high rank in some Christian religions, who is the head of all the churches and priests in a large area
meanings.example: the Bishop of Durham
meanings.example_cn: 达勒姆郡的主教

meanings.meaning_en: to put something inside or into something else
meanings.example: His hand shook slightly as he inserted the key into the lock.
meanings.example_cn: 他把钥匙插进锁里，手微微颤抖。

meanings.meaning_en: the part of a nut or seed inside the shell, or the part inside the stone of some fruits
meanings.example: The nutshell includes the kernel.
meanings.example_cn: 果壳裹着果仁。

meanings.meaning_en: good sense and judgment, based especially on your experience of life
meanings.example: a man of great wisdom
meanings.example_cn: 一个有大智慧的男人

meanings.meaning_en: (of animals, especially dogs) to make a low sound in the throat, usually as a sign of anger
meanings.example: The dog growled at me.
meanings.example_cn: 那狗冲着我低声吼叫。

meanings.meaning_en: a long handle on a tool, spear etc
meanings.example: golf clubs with steel shafts
meanings.example_cn: 带钢柄的高尔夫球棒

meanings.meaning_en: to make a continuous sound, like the sound of a bee
meanings.example: a loud buzzing noise
meanings.example_cn: 很大的嗡嗡声

meanings.meaning_en: a type of animal that is kept as a pet or on a farm
meanings.example: Spaniels are my favourite breed of dog.
meanings.example_cn: 西班牙猎犬是我最喜欢的犬种。

meanings.meaning_en: the top part of a plant such as wheat that produces grain
meanings.example: an ear of corn
meanings.example_cn: 玉米穗

meanings.meaning_en: someone in a university who is responsible for a particular area of work
meanings.example: the admissions dean
meanings.example_cn: 招生主任

meanings.meaning_en: (of a person's mind or imagination) that produces a lot of new ideas
meanings.example: the product of a fertile imagination
meanings.example_cn: 想象力丰富的产物

meanings.meaning_en: a large open container that you fill with water and use for washing yourself, washing dishes etc
meanings.example: Dirty plates were piled high in the sink.
meanings.example_cn: 脏盘子在洗涤槽里堆得很高。

meanings.meaning_en: used to show that two people or teams are competing against each other in a game or court case
meanings.example: the New York Knicks versus the LA Lakers
meanings.example_cn: 纽约尼克斯队对洛杉矶湖人队

meanings.meaning_en: a very large farm in the western US and Canada where sheep, cattle, or horses are bred
meanings.example: He lives on a cattle ranch in Texas.
meanings.example_cn: 他住在德克萨斯州的一个养牛的大牧场里。

meanings.meaning_en: to try to find something that you cannot see by feeling with your hands
meanings.example: Ginny groped for her glasses on the bedside table.
meanings.example_cn: 金尼在床头柜上摸着找眼镜。

meanings.meaning_en: someone who, in the past, walked from place to place selling small things
meanings.example: The pedlar sponged money off us.
meanings.example_cn: 那个小商贩骗了我们的钱。

meanings.meaning_en: to come together, or to bring people together, to support an idea, a political party etc
meanings.example: an attempt to rally support for the party
meanings.example_cn: 为政党争取支持的努力

meanings.meaning_en: to sit with your knees bent under you and your bottom just off the ground, balancing on your feet
meanings.example: He squatted down beside the little girl.
meanings.example_cn: 他在小女孩身边蹲了下来。

meanings.meaning_en: to throw something somewhere using a lot of force
meanings.example: He flung the box into the river.
meanings.example_cn: 他把盒子扔进河里。

meanings.meaning_en: to rub something hard, especially with a stiff brush, in order to clean it
meanings.example: She was on her hands and knees scrubbing the floor.
meanings.example_cn: 她正趴着擦地板。

meanings.meaning_en: if you give something a scrub, you clean it by rubbing it hard
meanings.example: I gave the floor a good scrub.
meanings.example_cn: 我把地板仔细刷洗了一遍。

meanings.meaning_en: to put your foot on or in something while you are walking
meanings.example: Sorry, did I tread on your foot?
meanings.example_cn: 对不起，我踩到你的脚了吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to make a quick loud sound like the sound of something breaking, or to make something do this
meanings.example: Thunder cracked overhead.
meanings.example_cn: 雷声在头顶炸响。

meanings.meaning_en: a false spoken statement about someone, intended to damage the good opinion that people have of that person
meanings.example: a vicious slander on the company's good name
meanings.example_cn: 对那家公司良好声誉的恶意诽谤

meanings.meaning_en: to say false things about someone in order to damage other people’s good opinion of them
meanings.example: He angrily accused the investigators of slandering both him and his family.
meanings.example_cn: 他气愤地指责调查者诋毁他和他的家人。

meanings.meaning_en: to take someone somewhere, especially when you are protecting or guarding them
meanings.example: The shipment was escorted by guards.
meanings.example_cn: 货物的运输由卫兵护送。

meanings.meaning_en: a person or a group of people or vehicles that go with someone in order to protect or guard them
meanings.example: a police escort
meanings.example_cn: 警察护卫队

meanings.meaning_en: to become larger and rounder than normal – used especially about parts of the body
meanings.example: Her ankle was already starting to swell.
meanings.example_cn: 她的脚踝已经开始肿起来了。

meanings.meaning_en: a threatening quality, feeling, or way of behaving
meanings.example: There was menace in his voice.
meanings.example_cn: 他的语气里带着威胁。

meanings.meaning_en: to threaten
meanings.example: The elephants are still menaced by poachers.
meanings.example_cn: 大象仍然面临非法捕猎者的威胁。

meanings.meaning_en: to walk somewhere slowly and with heavy steps
meanings.example: The walk involved tramping through mud.
meanings.example_cn: 走这段路要在泥地中跋涉。

meanings.meaning_en: a long or difficult walk
meanings.example: a long tramp through the snow
meanings.example_cn: 雪地里的长途跋涉

meanings.meaning_en: to step heavily on something, so that you crush it with your feet
meanings.example: There was a small fence to stop people trampling on the flowers.
meanings.example_cn: 有一道小小的围栏，防止人们践踏花草。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of trampling
the act of killing yourself
meanings.example: More people commit suicide at Christmas than at any other time.
meanings.example_cn: 圣诞节期间自杀的人比其他任何时候都多。

meanings.example: My mother attempted suicide on many occasions.
meanings.example_cn: 我母亲多次试图自杀。

meanings.meaning_en: to close or fasten something firmly by turning it
meanings.example: Tighten the screws firmly.
meanings.example_cn: 把螺丝拧紧。

meanings.meaning_en: to shake small metal things together so that they make a sound, or to make this sound
meanings.example: He jingled his car keys.
meanings.example_cn: 他把汽车钥匙弄得叮当响。

meanings.meaning_en: to worry about something, especially when there is no need
meanings.example: Don’t fret – everything will be all right.
meanings.example_cn: 别担心——一切都会好的。

meanings.meaning_en: to make someone feel excited and happy
meanings.example: His music continues to thrill audiences.
meanings.example_cn: 他的音乐依然能扣人心弦。

meanings.meaning_en: to change direction or make sth change direction, especially after hitting sth
meanings.example: He deflected the blow with his forearm.
meanings.example_cn: 他用前臂挡开了打来的一拳。

meanings.meaning_en: to move, or make sth move, into a position with one side or end higher than the other
meanings.example: My mother tilted her head and smiled.
meanings.example_cn: 我妈妈歪着头笑了。

meanings.meaning_en: to move around like a wheel, or to make something move around like a wheel
meanings.example: The wheel began to revolve.
meanings.example_cn: 轮子开始旋转。

meanings.meaning_en: to turn with a circular movement around a central point, or to make something do this
meanings.example: The Earth rotates on its axis once every 24 hours.
meanings.example_cn: 地球每24小时绕地轴自转一周。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay someone money because they have suffered injury, loss, or damage
meanings.example: the government’s promise to compensate victims of the flood
meanings.example_cn: 政府对水灾灾民给予补偿的许诺

meanings.meaning_en: failure to do something that you are supposed to do according to the law or because it is your duty
meanings.example: Mortgage defaults have risen in the last year.
meanings.example_cn: 按揭借款违约在近一年里呈上升趋势。

meanings.meaning_en: to not do something that you are supposed to do, especially that you are legally supposed to do
meanings.example: to default on a loan/debt
meanings.example_cn: 拖欠借款 / 债务

meanings.meaning_en: to form an opinion that something is probably true because of information that you have
meanings.example: A lot can be inferred from these statistics.
meanings.example_cn: 根据这些统计资料可以推断出很多事情。

meanings.meaning_en: to pay back money that you have borrowed
meanings.example: Your mortgage will be repaid over 25 years.
meanings.example_cn: 你的按揭贷款将在25年内还清。

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh at a person or idea, and talk about them in a way that shows you think they are stupid
meanings.example: ‘You, a scientist!’ he scoffed.
meanings.example_cn: “就你，还科学家！”他讥笑道。

meanings.meaning_en: to break up soil, remove plants, etc. with a hoe
meanings.example: to hoe the flower beds
meanings.example_cn: 用锄头给花坛除草松土

meanings.meaning_en: to reply quickly, in an angry or humorous way
meanings.example: ‘It’s all your fault!’ he retorted.
meanings.example_cn: “那都是你的错！”他反驳道。

meanings.meaning_en: to make something wider, or to become wider
meanings.example: Mark’s smile broadened.
meanings.example_cn: 马克笑得更加灿烂了。

meanings.meaning_en: to decay or make something decay
meanings.example: As the waste materials decompose, they produce methane gas.
meanings.example_cn: 废物腐烂时会产生沼气。

meanings.meaning_en: to sing or say sth all together
meanings.example: "Hi," they chorused.
meanings.example_cn: “嗨，”他们齐声说道。

meanings.meaning_en: to be in charge of an activity or person, and make sure that things are done in the correct way
meanings.example: Griffiths closely supervised the research.
meanings.example_cn: 格里菲思密切指导该项研究。

meanings.meaning_en: used to warn someone to be careful because something is dangerous
meanings.example: Police warned drivers to beware.
meanings.example_cn: 警方提醒司机小心行驶。

meanings.meaning_en: to take hold of someone or something with a sudden or violent movement
meanings.example: I grabbed my bag and ran off.
meanings.example_cn: 我抓起我的包就跑。

meanings.meaning_en: to ask someone, in a very emotional way, to do something for you
meanings.example: His friends entreated him not to go.
meanings.example_cn: 他的朋友们恳求他不要去。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a substance or liquid stronger by removing some of the water from it
to strongly suggest that someone does something
meanings.example: The charity urged quick action.
meanings.example_cn: 慈善机构敦促迅速采取行动。

meanings.meaning_en: a situation in which a large crowd of people are behaving in a violent and uncontrolled way, especially when they are protesting about something
meanings.example: urban riots
meanings.example_cn: 城市骚乱

meanings.meaning_en: (of a crowd of people) to behave in a violent way in a public place, often as a protest
meanings.example: University students rioted in protest at tuition fees.
meanings.example_cn: 大学生闹事，抗议学费过高。

meanings.meaning_en: to raise and then lower your shoulders in order to show that you do not know something or do not care about something
meanings.example: I just shrugged my shoulders and ignored him.
meanings.example_cn: 我只是耸耸肩，没有理睬他。

meanings.meaning_en: a movement of your shoulders upwards and then downwards again that you make to show that you do not know something or do not care about something
meanings.example: ‘Suit yourself,’ he said with a shrug.
meanings.example_cn: “随你的便。”他耸耸肩说道。

meanings.meaning_en: to become, or to make sb/sth become, conscious or healthy and strong again
meanings.example: The paramedics couldn't revive her.
meanings.example_cn: 护理人员无法使她苏醒。

meanings.meaning_en: ito end; to make sth end
meanings.example: The court ruled that the contract must be terminated.
meanings.example_cn: 法庭裁决该合同必须终止。

meanings.meaning_en: to become solid or make something solid
meanings.example: The volcanic lava solidifies as it cools.
meanings.example_cn: 火山熔岩冷却后变成固体。

meanings.meaning_en: if a very bright light dazzles you, it stops you from seeing properly for a short time
meanings.example: a deer dazzled by the headlights
meanings.example_cn: 被车头灯光照得目眩的鹿

meanings.meaning_cn: 移植（器官、皮肤等）；移植，移种（植物）
meanings.meaning_en: to move an organ, piece of skin etc from one person’s body and put it into another as a form of medical treatment
meanings.example: Surgeons have successfully transplanted a liver into a four-year-old boy.
meanings.example_cn: 外科医生成功地给一个四岁的男孩移植了肝脏。

meanings.meaning_en: to make a copy of a letter, document, etc. by using Xerox or a similar process
meanings.example: Could you xerox this letter, please?
meanings.example_cn: 请复印一下这封信好吗？

meanings.meaning_en: (of birds) to move the beak forward quickly and hit or bite sth
meanings.example: birds pecking at breadcrumbs on the pavement
meanings.example_cn: 在人行道上啄食面包屑的鸟儿

meanings.meaning_en: if a horse trots, it moves fairly quickly with each front leg moving at the same time as the opposite back leg
meanings.example: Alan took the reins and the small horse started trotting.
meanings.example_cn: 艾伦抓住缰绳，小马开始慢跑起来。

meanings.meaning_en: the movement of a horse at trotting speed
meanings.example: Our horses slowed to a trot.
meanings.example_cn: 我们的马减速慢跑。

meanings.meaning_en: to laugh at a person, idea etc and say that they are stupid
meanings.example: At the time, his ideas were ridiculed.
meanings.example_cn: 当时他的观点被人讥笑。

meanings.meaning_en: unkind laughter or remarks that are intended to make someone or something seem stupid
meanings.example: He had become an object of ridicule among the other teachers.
meanings.example_cn: 他成了其他教师嘲笑的对象。

meanings.meaning_en: to talk quickly in a friendly way without stopping, especially about things that are not serious or important
meanings.example: She chattered away happily until she noticed I wasn’t listening.
meanings.example_cn: 她开心地说个不停，直到发觉我没在听才停下来。

meanings.meaning_en: continuous rapid talk about things that are not important
meanings.example: Jane's constant chatter was beginning to annoy him.
meanings.example_cn: 简无休止的唠叨开始使他心烦。

meanings.meaning_en: to smile or speak in a very unkind way that shows you have no respect for someone or something
meanings.example: ‘Is that your best outfit?’ he sneered.
meanings.example_cn: “那就是你最好的衣服了？”他讥笑道。

meanings.meaning_en: an unkind smile or remark that shows you have no respect for something or someone
meanings.example: ‘You probably wouldn’t understand,’ he said with a sneer.
meanings.example_cn: “你可能明白不了。”他冷笑了一声说道。

meanings.meaning_en: to refuse to buy something, use something, or take part in something as a way of protesting
meanings.example: We boycott all products tested on animals.
meanings.example_cn: 我们抵制所有拿动物做试验的产品。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of boycotting something, or the period of time when it is boycotted
meanings.example: They are now trying to organize a boycott.
meanings.example_cn: 他们正试图组织一场抵制行动。

meanings.meaning_en: to steal large amounts of money or property from somewhere, especially while fighting in a war
meanings.example: The rich provinces of Asia Minor were plundered by the invaders.
meanings.example_cn: 小亚细亚的富饶地区遭到侵略者的劫掠。

meanings.meaning_en: the act of plundering
meanings.example: fear of invasion and plunder
meanings.example_cn: 对侵略和掠夺的恐惧

meanings.meaning_en: to try very hard
meanings.example: We always endeavor to please our customers.
meanings.example_cn: 我们总是竭尽全力让顾客满意。

meanings.meaning_en: an attempt to do something new or difficult
meanings.example: an outstanding example of human endeavor
meanings.example_cn: 人类努力进取的突出例证

meanings.meaning_en: to climb up, down, or over something quickly and with difficulty, especially using your hands to help you
meanings.example: They tried to scramble up the cliff.
meanings.example_cn: 他们想爬上悬崖。

meanings.meaning_en: a difficult climb in which you have to use your hands to help you
meanings.example: The village was a 20-minute scramble away.
meanings.example_cn: 村子离这里有20分钟的攀登路程。

meanings.meaning_en: to move or to make sth move up and down or from side to side, often making a noise
meanings.example: The sails flapped in the breeze.
meanings.example_cn: 风帆在微风中摆动。

meanings.meaning_en: the noisy movement of something such as cloth in the air
meanings.example: the flap of the sails
meanings.example_cn: 船帆的拍动

meanings.meaning_en: to kill a lot of people in a cruel or violent way
meanings.example: Men, women and children were slaughtered and villages destroyed.
meanings.example_cn: 村庄被毁，男人、女人和儿童惨遭杀戮。

meanings.meaning_en: when large numbers of people are killed in a cruel or violent way
meanings.example: Lack of chicken feed means that chicken farms are having to slaughter their stock.
meanings.example_cn: 饲料不足意味着养鸡场将不得不宰杀鸡。

meanings.meaning_en: to pull a vehicle or ship along behind another vehicle, using a rope or chain
meanings.example: The ship had to be towed into the harbor.
meanings.example_cn: 那艘轮船不得不被拖进港口。

meanings.meaning_en: an act of pulling a vehicle behind another vehicle, using a rope or chain
meanings.example: Can you give us a tow to the garage?
meanings.example_cn: 你能帮我们把车拖到修车厂吗？

meanings.meaning_en: to believe that something is true
meanings.example: We found his statement hard to credit.
meanings.example_cn: 我们觉得他的说法令人难以信服。

meanings.meaning_en: the belief that something is true or correct
meanings.example: The witness’s story gained credit with the jury.
meanings.example_cn: 证人的陈述被陪审团采信了。

meanings.meaning_en: in the same direction as the hands of a clock move
meanings.example: Screw the lid on clockwise.
meanings.example_cn: 按顺时针方向拧紧盖子。

meanings.example: a clockwise direction
meanings.example_cn: 顺时针方向

meanings.meaning_en: with your head first and the rest of your body following
meanings.example: I fell headlong into a pool of icy water.
meanings.example_cn: 我一个倒栽葱跌入了冰冷的池水中。

meanings.example: a headlong dive/rush
meanings.example_cn: 头先入水的跳水；莽撞的向前冲

meanings.meaning_en: to be the opposite of something
meanings.example: Some actions by the authorities ran counter to the President’s call for leniency.
meanings.example_cn: 当局的某些行为和总统呼吁的宽容背道而驰。

meanings.meaning_en: to be the opposite of something
towards the east
meanings.example: A powerful snow storm is moving eastward.
meanings.example_cn: 一场强暴风雪正在东移。

meanings.meaning_en: someone whose religion is Islam
relating to Islam or Muslims
a feeling of sadness for no particular reason
meanings.example: He sank into deep melancholy.
meanings.example_cn: 他陷入深深的忧郁之中。

meanings.meaning_en: very sad
meanings.example: The music suited her melancholy mood.
meanings.example_cn: 这音乐很适合她的伤感情绪。

meanings.meaning_en: an official statement that tells people about something important
meanings.example: At 3:30 p.m. a bulletin was released announcing that the president was out of immediate danger.
meanings.example_cn: 下午3:30发布了公告，宣布总统暂时脱离了危险。

meanings.meaning_en: an amount of money that you are given regularly or for a special purpose
meanings.example: Sales staff get a generous mileage allowance or a company car.
meanings.example_cn: 销售人员有优厚的里程补贴或者公司提供的专用汽车。
